name: Team Voter Action Project
subject: We always knew it was headed this way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Trump’s order is the culmination of years of attacks on absentee ballots and vote-by-mail. In the months before the 2020 election, Trump repeatedly spread disinformation and conspiracy theories about the legitimacy of mail-in ballots as he campaigned for reelection. With MAGA angling for total control, Trump wants to end their use forever.
RUSH $25 or more right now to help us defend the use of mail-in ballots across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=092125_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: With New Order, Trump Tries to Kill Off Vote By Mail [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=092125_3&amount=25]
We're going to keep hammering this home, Team, because the mainstream media continues to ignore this executive order and how it will change our elections forever.
President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order has sent lawmakers, election officials, and voting rights advocates into a frenzy. One provision focuses on a goal that for years has been a borderline obsession for MAGA: Cracking down on voting by mail.
For background: After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day.
So of course, this order directs Attorney General Pam Bondi to “take all necessary action” against any states that count absentee or mail-in ballots received after Election Day.
This order makes it clear that the MAGA crew will do anything they can to codify their power permanently and silence the will of the people by suppressing and eliminating the votes we cast.
We've got to keep fighting and work to protect our elections and our fundamental right to vote. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=092125_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_3&amount=35]
We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections . Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.
Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.
Our partners at VoteAmerica said it best: “ There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access, reject ballots without postmarks, or refuse to count ballots that arrive after Election Day. If the administration moves forward with these proposals, they will effectively disenfranchise older voters, rural voters, and military voters. ”
Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=092125_3&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092125_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092125_3&amount=20]

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. I share my thoughts on Charlie Kirk's memorial service. It was powerful, moving, and most of all, Jesus was lifted in every part of it. In the midst of the sorrow, there was hope, because the Gospel was boldly proclaimed.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/658872f7-5faf-458c-8739-2d90acbd4b84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It was so encouraging to see Christ at the center and to be reminded that even in loss, God is still working for His glory. [#CharlieKirk](https://substack.com/redirect/60b2c560-3264-45a1-9d97-eb621b433e58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#Faith](https://substack.com/redirect/831bae74-5524-45f7-a803-7a175ba83208?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#JesusSaves](https://substack.com/redirect/29c9c740-2ca3-4843-81d0-3fe52d1eb490?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#HopeInChrist](https://substack.com/redirect/1a790a7f-0338-4881-9f1e-e00f05c9a483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#MemorialService](https://substack.com/redirect/627fd808-861c-4945-9825-c6d354d36515?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#GodAndCountry](https://substack.com/redirect/4583e0b6-97aa-42ae-b7f6-a7ba17287431?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#ChristianConservative](https://substack.com/redirect/9801bd3f-0754-4bad-9558-efef6f6e01f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#JesusIsLord](https://substack.com/redirect/346f5cba-ac8a-48b8-95c3-a26e108c43f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Here I am, Lord — I will carry Charlie’s torch.
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?” _

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, friend. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.” _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.” **_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.” _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side. _
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, patriot. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory. **
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn. **

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bdnd/?__vbtrk=MzIxNTMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIxNTMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Patriot, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.” **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves. _

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired. **
** **
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too. **

Patriot, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.” **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here. _**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bdnd/?__vbtrk=MzIxNTMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIxNTMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

clean_body: | | | Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this: I miss him. Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him. My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life. You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation. But to me... He was just Charlie. He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy. The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: “How can I love you better today?” That’s who Charlie really was. That’s who I fell in love with. And I want to tell you that story, friend. We met at what I thought was a job interview. Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold: “Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.” I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t. He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future. Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think. Then Charlie looked at me and said: “I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.” I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.” He didn’t skip a beat: “I have enough friends.” That was Charlie. Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right. God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.” God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." We fell fast — and we fell deep. It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights. But we understood each other... Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — to stand by his side. He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. Charlie also believed in you, patriot. He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before. He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all. Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior. But above all, Charlie was obedient... Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart. Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — we built a calling. And now... I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead. I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Jimmy Kimmel...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
The Trump Administration didn't approve of Jimmy Kimmel's political satire, so it threatened ABC's broadcast license, and ABC took Kimmel off the air.
**As you no doubt recognize: this is what happens in authoritarian states, where disfavored political speech is met with official punishment.**
You mustn't offend the king!
Shame on ABC and its owner Disney for capitulating to censorship. Their cowardly refusal to fight for the First Amendment will become infamous.
The Trump Administration’s intent is to chill political speech and repress critics — to send the message that if you offend Trump, his Administration will use official power to attack you.
This is the next step in Donald Trump’s growing, unprecedented, and deeply un-American campaign to punish and silence his critics by abusing the powers of state.
We cannot allow this man even more power. _And the thing he fears most is losing his rubber-stamp Congress._
It is more vital than at any time in modern American history that the political opposition has the resources to win.
**And to be very blunt, the big-money national GOP groups have more money than the big-money national Democratic groups right now.**
So it’s going to come down to grassroots supporters.
Are there enough Americans committed to opposing this assault on our Constitution to power a landslide Democratic victory in the midterms?
I am the Democratic Senator facing the toughest reelection campaign.
So if you are horrified by this latest abuse of power, one real thing you can do is send my campaign resources.
**[Send $10. Send $100.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250921-2-f&t=1&akid=793%2E5691347%2EHZQ5pU)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250921-2-f&t=2&akid=793%2E5691347%2EHZQ5pU)**
Trust me: MAGA really, really won’t like it when we post a huge fundraising quarter.
Keep up the fight!
Senator Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=793%2E5691347%2EHZQ5pU) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=793%2E5691347%2EHZQ5pU) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: “Send me.” Charlie meant it. And he never looked back.
body:
This is the story of Charlie I want to tell
I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

| | | [ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05106208bbd64362a9805203ca6381f8&_e=9MYv3PIGg6-0j3MK7YuxlKIq4MEga7lzjxzkIwoISujzwtngGJFyGdhFXq-83C3qL_s09tSvpIlE9OrIXLEb013x-ryLg4fDrqiD0QqT2lLIisYseug7gFqUXYvdpQ0-JA6YqVLvjKcXJ57kjTqt_wXedWF2zZgcbiATDWkfwvUWOjBzJljYv6KOjuYxWUNsYStBHbYyXks1TVi2rVxaO0KiSZMx5k4lHqKlYsorjTw2YTsQMd-wh-fmCD4pgFoYIahC2f2th6FvOjJvRHKV2qgm99Br6PZOGz9HIarS8_2w78yxAJIsdomkMztPylEXVgSKhNTtmZX4j-ll-cFp4ldE7hYbAiLrTgejeSZoYIeUpLTOqYHF-U74Tkqd4R8MHH_AfuI79uyY3qfFFBLtadJsSA7BjKadHmIdub9YLI6jo4FSc6qxn0YozReueAXp5uLp_IvfZ-wzdDIHfTargDcJ2zuVpNbAVsiHaB3-uw43hqFjKY_-FDGLPY9UbN6HXIpJ0On3J8xhTH9EKsNtRxdhL3LHJwbZ6k9L-ophpqzsmsiBeBcXVmANvU-nGBNmGiMwB0ktQ_c-Vvbz81ImBnOk5EHi_MubySb2dk_Myw_esIIRSz9ushSy8vVzF8t7Hw3AeU-8UnfZ_vtIuMZ3SyRxo_h_j-f2YJtDeyodD4yxBbIPxJnfciXEgvaQXQZkpvc295Ib6UrSgrlkW7NeoA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05106208bbd64362a9805203ca6381f8&_e=9MYv3PIGg6-0j3MK7YuxlKIq4MEga7lzjxzkIwoISujzwtngGJFyGdhFXq-83C3qL_s09tSvpIlE9OrIXLEb013x-ryLg4fDrqiD0QqT2lLIisYseug7gFqUXYvdpQ0-JA6YqVLvjKcXJ57kjTqt_wXedWF2zZgcbiATDWkfwvUWOjBzJljYv6KOjuYxWUNsYStBHbYyXks1TVi2rVxaO0KiSZMx5k4lHqKlYsorjTw2YTsQMd-wh-fmCD4pgFoYeUP2ntuyA81f7N1h9t84A3DskKx9gUHa9afzfQuD_vFJEonlQ_N6o9_JPGKDLAFgQmruyQneZDXdJTrHnAF5L9dezT8XmdxLbwMG4kn3b5XZsj1Rk6OT_eGv9KrJOqO4Pf_yl38rqclU0QOOkIWYxHB2ItpYhigK1bP5nwNDSds4xnIW2SS9rmsXOsa3odEE1zL_q-CUYIk3lnYVbnF3vW93ZZias-5zv_PF0O8Nml6P3hrJMXmjT4PUw_c-69OVAMJSLTysELBdKfphTnoIL55CGFCoPKBXZ52XSF5MMNDrzuiZ2G_htePKLuaDwFyYNlVgoYb5U883la90Uu3RghBWneUyHFt-xoa7pb3inT4rYMEZmPRfEoXogYJod5wsXv_KElqtJeTqI8o2vji7NtNXWFdbYGqKipV9D9Ls8YspjDkd3sHIYib9dgYkUlPRAgF1hzoM1MH2ijmW0e2cug%3D%3D)
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
---
[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05106208bbd64362a9805203ca6381f8&_e=9MYv3PIGg6-0j3MK7YuxlKIq4MEga7lzjxzkIwoISujzwtngGJFyGdhFXq-83C3qL_s09tSvpIlE9OrIXLEb013x-ryLg4fDrqiD0QqT2lLIisYseug7gFqUXYvdpQ0-JA6YqVLvjKcXJ57kjTqt_wXedWF2zZgcbiATDWkfwvUWOjBzJljYv6KOjuYxWUNsYStBHbYyXks1TVi2rVxaO0KiSZMx5k4lHqKlYsorjTw2YTsQMd-wh-fmCD4pgFoYSZ_hRf8GtNKmQ0SKjS_UBXEqKIjhlsF7L_Jhj13epRMy4ZlvNhM9nrkTCNvR_3fgLXplxknkb5FsXOCkQ0_vqE7lGa7YS9Ibril-IkDgqX4DcrXnMTf92NDyHwWGCMANT7EQUhjwOIBpNxATcf-Nebe3oesFEgnx2K7i7DohMkSCEEcUVURrkVVPkIHWf3XmxhZB0tl4tgHCjDA9SG-0F8I9Dv9hxZ5NtlV77aLCdBxeyv9oiLtYiUuJ4yIbmnGfbPU-I-BzCM6kDL7ofRyn_NF-QruW2AEB0HArFi6viDEW6Jnu5DYSuMVHmWaFC521naKK5FLQX3LSrDmYNSGN_s62miqh2X9omzOPBQDXiHLiNmfG8WZ9ngWuAaYH2MC_gLm3tr-L7j_2g5ntBQ28iW5NFwH_72hTR2dNBmC1eUKX9w1XnXbzS8IMd_tNPe1NPOUGfa2BsFB0KOVW6EjhNg%3D%3D)
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
---
[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05106208bbd64362a9805203ca6381f8&_e=9MYv3PIGg6-0j3MK7YuxlKIq4MEga7lzjxzkIwoISujzwtngGJFyGdhFXq-83C3qL_s09tSvpIlE9OrIXLEb013x-ryLg4fDrqiD0QqT2lLIisYseug7gFqUXYvdpQ0-JA6YqVLvjKcXJ57kjTqt_wXedWF2zZgcbiATDWkfwvUWOjBzJljYv6KOjuYxWUNsYStBHbYyXks1TVi2rVxaO0KiSZMx5k4lHqKlYsorjTw2YTsQMd-wh-fmCD4pgFoYEK4hFtYF3od7DlOL9QezB8berxER0222Tw5CFz5PfZ4zJzT0I-NM2MHLScreHFMiUdSP8ksvo7xhNzQPavxuaMlbiz9AVgCS4viHrdNp323nlCtfJ9SCLkfLOu2SU0YARx3vPk1NYXTvQ8LyHvVJgcMVXmKkCOkPRJgMn4CsVtdtqHP0GsoeKDxm9kpvFjtejOH_O2ITwbPFmHfypJC59q-eReJJ0miIbaRxHe8NqK-CpBrB_6CHKDTW4yFUYLROaNtfGmrTp7S5xpOmC-AWHaS_Q7hbx6J9Dt9vxvJYi0SyblSeMbPZlK-EV5v262vhJYVTIf7ybmW33f5JCf-1WJSdK79fORPW20d6WomrLd7u3cWjlkYlhnukX7rrQOt9i-n5VKF9VfNIRTMuRNv4bVtLVp0TKNwqjGFMELRlQhyzfMRRZ5B16dV4wsEHLijuujAowru0FTb7OIBXpSN7UQ%3D%3D)
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [ _**Support Turning Point USA**_ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05106208bbd64362a9805203ca6381f8&_e=9MYv3PIGg6-0j3MK7YuxlKIq4MEga7lzjxzkIwoISujzwtngGJFyGdhFXq-83C3qL_s09tSvpIlE9OrIXLEb013x-ryLg4fDrqiD0QqT2lLIisYseug7gFqUXYvdpQ0-JA6YqVLvjKcXJ57kjTqt_wXedWF2zZgcbiATDWkfwvUWOjBzJljYv6KOjuYxWUNsYStBHbYyXks1TVi2rVxaO0KiSZMx5k4lHqKlYsorjTw2YTsQMd-wh-fmCD4pgFoY2QO8NJhxGuTy8ElsoP24OwPt7rpsgMDLLPEVI6HABi21yTHpsKaCUP25BRtU_U2bCWYOHFWluKcI4wsCkzKHZY1_Y64b3dCX95_LNmo2SfkdVBFynB6AOjiAkT6dbYZ2x2HKERv90usex9zmjN-VkcOQFIgJLxyksfo0yPsKSoyCqoXYe2wPm-wRQFLpGEW5BaceF3ghehGwQNF7uUIhR5huV8CTJTcwbmWQOhwFQOK-64jdWrRgEL2CPOKZgO2Ll1gniREUjBAv9RetdLYhHigDRC0WAAUBSiLz-Lt0R1zYGeEBa6aPwDa4GsWqk3hnT-2YYlui9t040t1fytjyZrzOwZRWSce-ofvlA4xpbFqOx7PWu32Rt-H2MBdSJ0GR8wFDtB1ej7OicgdaY_lSPu6uqErGUqalRnChYywE42SiTZILsXO8Lz_Qv4Ko8W6vBWexGDb9E8ruHOSnNDJb1w%3D%3D)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---

Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Friend, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
---

clean_body: This is the story of Charlie I want to tell I don’t know how else to begin except with this: | | | Friend, I don't know how else to begin except with this: I miss him. Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him. My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life. You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation. But to me... He was just Charlie. He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy. The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: " How can I love you better today?" That's who Charlie really was. That 's who I fell in love with. And I want to tell you that story, Friend. We met at what I thought was a job interview. Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold: " Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't. He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future. Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think. Then Charlie looked at me and said: " I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first." He didn't skip a beat: " I have enough friends." That was Charlie. Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right. God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you." God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." We fell fast -- and we fell deep. It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights. But we understood each other... Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- to stand by his side. He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. Charlie also believed in you, Friend. He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before. He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all. Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior. But above all, Charlie was obedient... Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart. Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- we built a calling. And now... I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other: "And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " ~ Isaiah 6:8 Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. And if you're reading this -- maybe it 's yours, too. We are all being called. To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters. Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain. The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder. We will carry the torch, Friend. Together. And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined. Because God is not done. And neither are we. With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope... Erika Kirk CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA P.S. Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways... Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much. He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them. Friend, that's why this photo... One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... ...Took the breath right out of my chest: Because I know that look... I fell in love with that look. He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused. It's how I first met him -- driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. Just Charlie. In his element. I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement. We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college. He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: " Work harder. Be better." He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them. That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. That 's what I see in this photo -- Greatness. To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. Because this was his prime... Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home. He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul. And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. Forever. Friend, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop... Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. Friend, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics... It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal. And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- where it never ends. Charlie, I miss you. I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven. And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent. I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise. I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart always strived to hear: " Well done, my good and faithful servant." You lived life well. You earned it. And I promise... I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. We 'll all carry it from here. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Hi, I just got off the debate stage here at Rider University against Jack Ciattarelli. If there’s anything you take away from tonight’s debate, I hope it’s this:
_I’m in this fight for the people of New Jersey._
Tonight, I aimed to show voters that we can send a powerful message to Donald Trump and National Republicans that New Jersey has had enough with the price hikes, enough with the cuts to healthcare, and enough with the threats to democracy. _In this race, we have the chance to forge a new path forward for our state._
[_**But we can only forge this new path forward together, Peter. So please, if you’re ready to help us build a better New Jersey, I’d be honored to have your support in the final stretch of this election. subject: Re: Your local Post Office >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Trump wants to DISMANTLE USPS!?
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20250921_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21283%2E878179%2EzABqdx) **Millions of Americans rely on the USPS for bills, Social Security checks, medication, mail-in ballots, and more — _but Trump doesn’t care._**

We can’t let him PRIVATIZE and DESTROY it — but we NEED your help!

[**As a top grassroots Democrat, will you sign our petition to stand with the USPS? We need 150 signatures from your state today! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20250921_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21283%2E878179%2EzABqdx) | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH YOUR LOCAL USPS OFFICE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20250921_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21283%2E878179%2EzABqdx)
---
**FACT #1:** Donald Trump has been foaming at the mouth to PRIVATIZE and DESTROY the U.S. Postal Service as we know it!

**FACT #2:** The USPS recently confirmed that more than 10,000+ postal workers will be laid off — _**your local post office could be next!**_

**FACT #3:** This is Trump’s latest attack on YOUR right to vote — he’s going after the USPS and mail-in ballots because he wants to RIG the 2026 election!

[**THAT’S WHY WE NEED A SURGE OF 150 TOP DEMOCRATS TO STAND WITH USPS: Add your name by MIDNIGHT and defend your local Post Office from MAGA destruction! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20250921_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21283%2E878179%2EzABqdx)

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I’m in this fight for New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
|
#
---
Hello, it's Mikie Sherrill. I just got off the debate stage here at Rider University in my first debate against Jack Ciattarelli, and I wanted to send you a quick note before we get swept up in the post-debate chaos. **First of all, I want to say thank you.** My team and I would have never made it this far without your support, and I’m grateful to have such an incredible grassroots coalition standing by my side as we head into the final stretch of this race. And second, if there’s anything you take away from tonight’s debate, I hope it’s this: **I’m in this fight for the people of New Jersey.** **Tonight, I aimed to show voters that in this race, we have an incredible opportunity:** we can send a powerful message to Donald Trump and National Republicans that New Jersey has had enough with the price hikes, enough with the cuts to healthcare, and enough with the threats to democracy. **In this race, we have the chance to forge a new path forward for our state.** **[But we can only forge this new path forward together. So please, if there’s anything I said tonight that resonated with you, and if you’re ready to help us build a better New Jersey, I’d be honored to have your support in the final stretch of this election. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I’m in this fight for New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I just got off the debate stage
I just got off the debate stage here at Rider University in my first debate against Jack Ciattarelli, and I wanted to send you a quick note before we get swept up in the post-debate chaos.
**First of all, I want to say thank you, Peter.** My team and I would have never made it this far without your support, and I’m grateful to have such an incredible grassroots coalition standing by my side as we head into the final stretch of this race.
And second, if there’s anything you take away from tonight’s debate, I hope it’s this: **I’m in this fight for the people of New Jersey.**
**Tonight, I aimed to show voters that in this race, we have an incredible opportunity:** we can send a powerful message to Donald Trump and National Republicans that New Jersey has had enough with the price hikes, enough with the cuts to healthcare, and enough with the threats to democracy. **In this race, we have the chance to forge a new path forward for our state.**
**[But we can only forge this new path forward together, Peter. So please, if there’s anything I said tonight that resonated with you, and if you’re ready to help us build a better New Jersey, I’d be honored to have your support in the final stretch of this election. clean_body: I just got off the debate stage I just got off the debate stage here at Rider University in my first debate against Jack Ciattarelli, and I wanted to send you a quick note before we get swept up in the post-debate chaos. First of all, I want to say thank you, Peter. My team and I would have never made it this far without your support, and I’m grateful to have such an incredible grassroots coalition standing by my side as we head into the final stretch of this race. And second, if there’s anything you take away from tonight’s debate, I hope it’s this: I’m in this fight for the people of New Jersey. Tonight, I aimed to show voters that in this race, we have an incredible opportunity: we can send a powerful message to Donald Trump and National Republicans that New Jersey has had enough with the price hikes, enough with the cuts to healthcare, and enough with the threats to democracy. In this race, we have the chance to forge a new path forward for our state. If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Mikie Sherrill and Heartland Patriots instantly: Thank you so much, Mikie | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). name: Case Dixon
subject: Campaign Updates and Endorsed by BamaCarry
body:
**Hello everyone,**
I send today's update with a heavy heart. As you know, on September 10th, our nation lost a true advocate of liberty and a bold follower of Christ: **Charlie Kirk**. Charlie understood that the fight for freedom is ultimately a spiritual one. He was killed not because he was a political figure, but because he bore the name of **Jesus Christ**.
Let us honor his legacy not with despair, but with resolve—to live courageously, to speak boldly, and to never compromise the principles that matter most.
**Since my last update, I am proud to share that our campaign has earned the endorsement of** **[BamaCarry](https://www.bamacarry.us/ "https://www.bamacarry.us/")** —Alabama’s leading voice for the Second Amendment. This endorsement is a clear sign that liberty-minded patriots are rallying to our cause. Read more here: [ 1819 News](https://1819news.com/news/item/bamacarry-pac-endorses-andrew-sorrell-for-secretary-of-state-and-case-dixon-for-cd-6 "https://1819news.com/news/item/bamacarry-pac-endorses-andrew-sorrell-for-secretary-of-state-and-case-dixon-for-cd-6"), [ Yellowhammer](https://yellowhammernews.com/bamacarry-endorses-andrew-sorrell-and-case-dixon-in-upcoming-elections/ "https://yellowhammernews.com/bamacarry-endorses-andrew-sorrell-and-case-dixon-in-upcoming-elections/"), [ AL Politics](https://alpolitics.com/bamacarry-endorses-case-dixon-in-alabama-6th-district-race/ "https://alpolitics.com/bamacarry-endorses-case-dixon-in-alabama-6th-district-race/"), [ The Alabama Gazette](https://www.alabamagazette.com/story/2025/09/01/news/span-classbrnwsbreaking-news-spanbamacarry-endorses-case-dixon-for-us-congress-in-alabamas-6th-district/7875.html "https://www.alabamagazette.com/story/2025/09/01/news/span-classbrnwsbreaking-news-spanbamacarry-endorses-case-dixon-for-us-congress-in-alabamas-6th-district/7875.html")
**I have also continued to be hard at work sharing our message across the district, having spoken with/attended:**
* The Alabama Farmers Federation of Bibb County and Coosa County
* The Elmore County GOP
* The Republican Women of Trussville
* The Alabama Republican Assembly
* The North Jefferson Republican Patriots (**See coverage**[HERE](https://alpolitics.com/north-jefferson-republican-patriots-host-shelnutt-dixon-duncan-in-gardendale/ "https://alpolitics.com/north-jefferson-republican-patriots-host-shelnutt-dixon-duncan-in-gardendale/"))
* The Elmore County Candidate Fair in Millbrook AL

**Our Alabaster town hall was also great success!** It was well attended and filled with great conversation, thoughtful questions, and amazing support. See coverage [ HERE](https://alpolitics.com/al-6-congressional-candidate-case-dixon-holds-first-town-hall-in-alabaster/ "https://alpolitics.com/al-6-congressional-candidate-case-dixon-holds-first-town-hall-in-alabaster/")[ ](https://alpolitics.com/al-6-congressional-candidate-case-dixon-holds-first-town-hall-in-alabaster/ "https://alpolitics.com/al-6-congressional-candidate-case-dixon-holds-first-town-hall-in-alabaster/")
**In addition, I have recently:**
* Called on my opponent to sign the 'Epstein Files' discharge petition. ([AL Reporter](https://www.alreporter.com/2025/09/04/congressional-challenger-case-dixon-calls-on-gary-palmer-to-sign-epstein-files-petition/ "https://www.alreporter.com/2025/09/04/congressional-challenger-case-dixon-calls-on-gary-palmer-to-sign-epstein-files-petition/"), [ AL Politics](https://alpolitics.com/gop-challenger-case-dixon-demands-congressman-gary-palmer-back-epstein-files-transparency-act/ "https://alpolitics.com/gop-challenger-case-dixon-demands-congressman-gary-palmer-back-epstein-files-transparency-act/"))
* Signed the Moms for Liberty Parent Pledge and the U.S. Term Limits Pledge. ([AL Politics](https://alpolitics.com/case-dixon-signs-pledges-on-parental-rights-and-term-limits-vows-to-serve-only-8-years-unlike-opponent/ "https://alpolitics.com/case-dixon-signs-pledges-on-parental-rights-and-term-limits-vows-to-serve-only-8-years-unlike-opponent/"))

**I’ve also had the privilege of having two op-eds published by 1819 News:**
* _["America First must mean what it says"](https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-america-first-must-mean-what-it-says "https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-america-first-must-mean-what-it-says")_[ ](https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-america-first-must-mean-what-it-says "https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-america-first-must-mean-what-it-says")— emphasizing what our priorities must be as a nation.
* _["What will we be remembered for?"](https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-what-will-we-be-remembered-for "https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-what-will-we-be-remembered-for")_— a reflection on the legacy of Charlie Kirk.

I want to once again **thank all of you** for your generous donations of time and money thus far — it truly goes further than you realize. I could not do it without your support. Thank you.
**VERY IMPORTANT** — as we approach the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline September 30, I need your continued support to stay competitive in this race. I’m humbly asking each of you to chip in $10 today if you can, to help us reach more voters and keep this fight going strong.
[DONATE HERE](https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/donate-today-2d26b569160a252d "https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/donate-today-2d26b569160a252d")
[VOLUNTEER HERE](https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/volunteer-648069d0d32c0b62 "https://secure.winred.com/dixon-for-us-congress/volunteer-648069d0d32c0b62")
**Finally** , I encourage you to connect with me on social media and help spread our message:
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/case.dixon.98?mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=RLh8dtJQXl3TTUvv&share_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fshare%2F1ASpp8yLsG%2F%3Fmibextid%3DwwXIfr# "https://www.facebook.com/case.dixon.98?mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=RLh8dtJQXl3TTUvv&share_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fshare%2F1ASpp8yLsG%2F%3Fmibextid%3DwwXIfr#") | [ X (Twitter)](https://x.com/case_dixon?s=11 "https://x.com/case_dixon?s=11") | [ Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/case_dixon/?igsh=MWV2ZDBtanNyaGtuOA%3D%3D# "https://www.instagram.com/case_dixon/?igsh=MWV2ZDBtanNyaGtuOA%3D%3D#") | [ TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@case_dixon?_t=ZT-8vmmo8vQj9C&_r=1 "https://www.tiktok.com/@case_dixon?_t=ZT-8vmmo8vQj9C&_r=1")
I also ask that you please **forward this email** to at least two friends who you think would want to join us in the fight for liberty. Together, we are building a movement that cannot be ignored.
**Thank you for your continued prayers, support, and encouragement. With God’s help—and with your partnership—we will change the status quo in Washington.**

**In Liberty,**
**Case Dixon **
Dixon for Congress
(205) 282-9103
615 Brooklane Dr. #3218
Hueytown, AL 35023-2508
DIXONFORUSCONGRESS.COM

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Our love story
body:
I miss him

| | |
---
Patriot, I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Patriot. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Patriot. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Patriot.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zht9qlt6nv8aclncjjip8bpdth13ctj24codpnqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0slj61o76cdh2bs)
---
**P.S.** Patriot, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Patriot, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Patriot, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Patriot, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zho8ickbjifn823frikv5j5pahc6f6moe3igcht0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0slj61o76cdh2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college. He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: " Work harder. Be better." He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them. That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. That 's what I see in this photo -- Greatness. To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. Because this was his prime... Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home. He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul. And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. Forever. Patriot, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop... Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. Patriot, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics... It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal. And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- where it never ends. Charlie, I miss you. I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven. And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent. I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise. I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart always strived to hear: " Well done, my good and faithful servant." You lived life well. You earned it. And I promise... I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. We 'll all carry it from here. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# **['They want to spy on you': Military tech CEO explains why AI companies don't want you going offline](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A military technology entrepreneur warns that artificial intelligence companies are taking advantage of customers by keeping them connected to the internet.In an exclusive interview with Blaze Media, EdgeRunner CEO Tyler Saltsman said there are clear reasons why there are no popular AI programs that consumers can simply install and use offline.'They want to learn more about you.'Saltsman's AI program (EdgeRunner AI) is currently in testing with the Department of War and promises to deliver an offline, secure AI assistance tool to deliver real-time data and mission strategy to boots on the ground.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

# [Demand ABC Bring Back Jimmy Kimmel ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ba06f73-f967-4745-b83e-26a4434f38b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d115a52-06d8-4223-bf85-215c5fa141da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [**> > Add your name: "We demand ABC bring back Jimmy Kimmel!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb377df3d-9139-425c-a12a-0c7df9b73e6c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **WTF, ABC? ** _Jimmy Kimmel’s late night show, "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" will be taken off air “indefinitely” after remarks he made Monday about the killing of conservative influencer Charlie Kirk, [ABC announced](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e0556d0-2495-4300-ab26-9c20eebed315/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Wednesday evening._ _“We hit some new lows over the weekend with the MAGA gang desperately trying to characterize this kid who murdered Charlie Kirk as anything other than one of them, and doing everything they can to score political points from it,” Kimmel said in his monologue._ This wasn't making light of this horrific event (which Kimmel strongly condemned), it was telling the truth about Trump, Vance, and others trying desperately and shamefully to make this a left-wing conspiracy, regardless of the facts, and exploit it for political gain. [**> > Add your name: "We demand ABC bring back Jimmy Kimmel!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbfa71ae8-da2e-45e4-bef9-9f8999e72d32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅.!.
body:
Hurry and get it now...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21993/6374453/2399de8b4bc953f5f575ac00a64b82b48c3d3085/b47b3fdc2bebb2a1652e72cf0979a70f576c4c32)
---
| | |
---
_September 22nd, 2025 at 02:06 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21993/6374453/13b58c49c993fc3e2c15dbedda3be8fe41322c41/b47b3fdc2bebb2a1652e72cf0979a70f576c4c32). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21993/6374453/13b58c49c993fc3e2c15dbedda3be8fe41322c41/b47b3fdc2bebb2a1652e72cf0979a70f576c4c32).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21993/6374453/13b58c49c993fc3e2c15dbedda3be8fe41322c41/b47b3fdc2bebb2a1652e72cf0979a70f576c4c32)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: The Flyover
subject: Charlie Kirk's Memorial, Nuclear Renaissance, and Cozy Hobbit Dishes
body:
More than [200,000 people packed State Farm Stadium](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdI6GwRAoXGxDl223RAYPYTb-QbYhyttfcXXf4HYjzdGn851_j-lh2HF4_jWedFnjFOidHZVCaVo2kxzTi9Mre_IxsXHhWBxNCNhKGCTiZA27z6Qqq1cipKYiXd_bvm3aDtpq02h6mGnuCdcFhnlWuABYu5haNURoK9YXDQbEGqBT6tYiUmfhjqofVN2RUECWS0y3_5FD2Wh1n3hSui3RV05vpexZNH8EjgLH8NljLtdL4HiBBY4wXHctcDyyvPwEjj9u8pKT6xEoGScdnySP3ZpCWe5bLDHLNUUvSzr8Lk8TFpIl8XxcAROs9DGRwLFK2u5vdo5zdxcKnt6w--5XfjXqqfErAAD__wXAjF0) in Glendale, Arizona, on Sunday for a five-hour memorial honoring Christian conservative activist Charlie Kirk, 31, who was assassinated Sept. 10 while speaking at a Utah college.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT1vGzEMhn-Nbouho6SzPdxQwPCWrh0FWqJ9bPRxkHgJ8u8LN9ehc0aSDx7ixfvr1b8iJy6Pn5hplnv1hT56IhFqPizYEtMbt7eeKdfGmMoWEnnQ4F70-QXAR-T06e0Q5zsRkBloHo_u5IybtBuWecSzs4gmnm7m5CxOIwFaMhHDzY3RDjw_bfoMMGo9WXtwADRFfQR7OttxImU1RZbaDr8rF1nonj7rO7VDqHlI8yKydmV-KLgquHLp_FikH3rGJtg7yZNTcI3c27aKMtdNsu91a4GUuewyX5KC6XnJFHnLylz2OWBekR_li_X-jin4UItQEf9PuqNfW2Uu4813wSbb6tvNS113Qqjl_576Z3BwQ5vj-sEpcZ-OyupHRk5_A8q3Wnmf4U8AAAD__yq6pm0) | |
# Monday, September 22, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1776, Continental Army captain [Nathan Hale was executed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOpDAQheHTmMzIFDaGwMEmZL3phsiLi6amDUZ2dTPcftSjucHEn_Se9P-7TTdPkfb7X7-h4yVNO54lIjPmaV59joQPyo-y4ZYy-bg_54gTKDBSDRJgCp7iNekquAURsK3QNdb0pjWdMtXq7GAw6OBtbxbbWgv9Enyj2gDeWN0NFbn3mhoAGqU6rWsDgF1QFnQ_6KZDoRUG4pTrj0Q7r7jEK70w13PaquhW5qOI9o-AUcB4nme9UuGUr7cLGHmlIoO_JO3yRwSMBQ_G7T9mCSBgPDxnSizxE-cnY5BLyrIcF-33KrtwnBQjlc4Kre6bp_j9zb8K9nLwFQAA__90VYCA) by British troops in New York City for spying. Hale is purported to have said, _"I only regret that I have but one life to lose for my country."_ Yesterday, millions watched the memorial service for Charlie Kirk. Reactions worldwide have been stirring, and we were especially moved by his wife Erika's eulogy, including her public [forgiveness](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQxvGnwVsiODCYgaFS5S1dM1rEHPE1ZzvCJGnevnJfoes3_PTpfz4Np0hMy_UrzhhqXocFXxtjrViGcYqFCW9UbtuM81oo8vIYGQeQ0B6kPwAMKRK_B9OkkBEBdYNBubZrdWtl20zBWXT6opNxkOWYslddzhKMVv7iTfYNhV2THkBJaY05tgBok3RgOm-URWEkJqprOX6vtNQJM7_XJ5bjuM4Nh6nW-yb0h4BeQP-zrwL6gpE_92tnKiig32qsj01Ar7z1ndfKddprkLYD3ZSQ7i9ips06YeR1jsR_ev1XkmeA3wAAAP__fp9xwg) of Charlie's killer. If Charlie Kirk was important to you and you'd like to share your thoughts with us, just hit reply. Today, we're sponsored by [SmartAsset](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJysksuKGz0QRp9GvWujrr4vevGD8W7-bZaiLFXbFevSSNUe5u2DZ5yEYSCbZCm-wxEH6duLeUH2HC__Y6BF1mQivRZPIpSNvWL2TDfOtxIopMzo4249GdDQ13quAYxD9m-mq9yyEgG1FS3N2E992w-6r67LNCK6CfrJwTw3zXmYqZ-c7UY9ras-txUvD5ueARqth6479AA0OD1CN81dM5DqNDmWlA_fE0e50urf0p3ywaZQ-eUqshXV_qfgpODEsfDlKuVQAmbBUkgenILTyhGjZfQ1ujuXlOvARfBGRbWnXYIpac-WVHt8-k30CobHEsjxHlR7fJ4thg35Ej9YY1b01tgUhaKYFX95n_THoNrjaH5OxnMRI2l7MkI5fLrZ6KlpoP8c96Upk3Cm8LC_B7oa69-dm8cYKf-bPMeZrBjHJe-bfElrzqYIZtk3Iyn5P6fNANBXeXHbK3vPZRhVpy8B2b-_qfzVR7wv8CMAAP__WAP-yg), offering expert advice on choosing the right financial planner and setting up a family trust.
|
---
## 200K Gather to Honor Charlie Kirk
More than [200,000 people packed State Farm Stadium](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdI6GwRAoXGxDl223RAYPYTb-QbYhyttfcXXf4HYjzdGn851_j-lh2HF4_jWedFnjFOidHZVCaVo2kxzTi9Mre_IxsXHhWBxNCNhKGCTiZA27z6Qqq1cipKYiXd_bvm3aDtpq02h6mGnuCdcFhnlWuABYu5haNURoK9YXDQbEGqBT6tYiUmfhjqofVN2RUECWS0y3_5FD2Wh1n3hSui3RV05vpexZNH8EjgLH8NljLtdL4HiBBY4wXHctcDyyvPwEjj9u8pKT6xEoGScdnySP3ZpCWe5bLDHLNUUvSzr8Lk8TFpIl8XxcAROs9DGRwLFK2u5vdo5zdxcKnt6w--5XfjXqqfErAAD__wXAjF0) in Glendale, Arizona, on Sunday for a five-hour memorial honoring Christian conservative activist Charlie Kirk, 31, who was assassinated Sept. 10 while speaking at Utah Valley University. Kirk's widow, Erika, delivered a powerful tribute to her late husband, praising his courage in the face of opposition, devotion to his wife and children, and, most of all, his faith in Christ. _"He wanted to save young men --just like the one who took his life,"_ Erika said before looking up in silent prayer, gathering her strength, [then saying](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQxvGnwVsiODCYgaFS5S1dM1rEHPE1ZzvCJGnevnJfoes3_PTpfz4Np0hMy_UrzhhqXocFXxtjrViGcYqFCW9UbtuM81oo8vIYGQeQ0B6kPwAMKRK_B9OkkBEBdYNBubZrdWtl20zBWXT6opNxkOWYslddzhKMVv7iTfYNhV2THkBJaY05tgBok3RgOm-URWEkJqprOX6vtNQJM7_XJ5bjuM4Nh6nW-yb0h4BeQP-zrwL6gpE_92tnKiig32qsj01Ar7z1ndfKddprkLYD3ZSQ7i9ips06YeR1jsR_ev1XkmeA3wAAAP__fp9xwg) of her husband's killer, "_I forgive him."_ President Trump, Vice President JD Vance, and others spoke from behind bullet-proof glass, and security measures included drone surveillance, airport-style screenings, and a heavy presence from Secret Service, DHS, and local police. Nearly seven million people tuned in on Charlie Kirk's [YouTube channel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVuQOewzDB4qVZE6pGu7WQZfwjUGp8YJSp--oq_Q9fuk3_D_OLmT58jL5d3PZMs5uYW2NVIplN04-RyZrpyv60xzyuzjch8jOZCgD7I_ALjgOT6dqoI9EwG1FdnG6E63GqWuJju0ZEKPGlF50oOSnRzGzmgcGoOIfcV212QP0EiJStUagDBIA6rrVYMklKTAJeX6K_FSJjrHZ3pQrsc0V9FOpdxW0b4IOAo4bttWP9O93Afa_33xZZxEe3yI9vXn-gn5bXHfXaqyDbeNY-QVjVDyMnuOf2T5V4eHhd8AAAD__3VNcGU) alone, and major networks worldwide carried the event.
## Trump Names Murdochs, Ellison in TikTok Deal
Rupert Murdoch, Lachlan Murdoch, Oracle's Larry Ellison, and Dell CEO Michael Dell are among the investors President Trump says are [set to take over TikTok](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCngY7IrG1IChd_Q5e_vRIZs473WGNkTCLe_sS9wpUzI33FfD3HpyWm9fXfRjTFp3HFz85YCubRBZuZcKG87BFjymR5PRzjCAJ0Ix4NwDhb4nNU9Ww8IqCs0bS9vmupO6HrYPw0dRqlx9530DuLsoVpllJbcLLVviZzaeIB0ArRKXXTANjNogd1f6i2w0oJnKmkfPtOtJaAns_0xnxzKdZsQinbXsl_FQwVDCVgIOZrq2DYEpM7rxpdWBOn1xW0bpWGtin5iFsTjzwnF5pCS0lLMx0n5r2Coc5m3j7ETHvXV0q8oqVfty5_Oupt4CcAAP__mvN89A) in the U.S. The White House says [six of seven board seats](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGPozAUhH8NdEbmYRsoXFyTLtdeiRzziN9hbGRegvLvV2y1_XYjfaPRzPy7T3dHkdLzr9vQ8pKnhOcRkRnL5IMrkXClsh4bbrmQi-nlI04gQQs5CoBpdhQ_k6pnuyACdjXatteD7rSRug5WacTFP5R7DNIMBs0ydqrTSivvVdupmuyVJkeAVkqjVKMB0MyyBzWMqjVYKYkzcS7N_0yJAy7xk99YGp-3OtrAvB9V96eCWwW38zyb9PDXiotXcNtzJCZ__JDiwpc5EKMI-XWgYFo5r8LFZy7EYROzYydmdFFweW278IGSE8UnBx0Y6Oti5_2kGOkwfaXkc3MUvzvxr458W_gKAAD__yEqiQY) will go to Americans, Oracle will oversee data and privacy, and the U.S. will control the app's algorithm. Trump announced the deal on Friday after a call with Chinese President Xi Jinping, noting that only final signatures remain. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said she is "100% confident" the agreement is done.
## US Leads Global Nuclear Renaissance
Nuclear energy is surging back into the spotlight, with Bank of America projecting a [$10 trillion global market by 2050](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO3CAMx58m2YjAgeQYGLrc9nXtGNFgDvoROIHvorx9xfUROlmW7Z9-_v_62r5sTDE_ftoDDfmyZTxbQiKs2x5sTRG_Y_1uBx6lRpvya0-4AQfFuGYAm7MxXZscnfGIgPOIRqzqpma1cDUGI_yihVJSa-28FzPXfpU3sWqQyq18HqPpNK4BBOeLlJMCwMXxFeRNS7HgIDm6SKVOf0rMFNCnq7yxTns5xmQC0bMN848B7gPcfcw27zhdNpTSNwa495d66eq2smc5sbK9vJJjv5FZJjijGlOKJbOY3atRvRgFSyyU5BqjgMzm1q-ofLqz1D74R2qhVLIPbIxrzoVaQE6BjjRW455n57ZlHSR_HDamjzT9V9JvA38DAAD__yddk44) as demand from AI data centers and electrification soars. The U.S. leads the world in nuclear generation, producing nearly 30% of global output in 2024 despite relying on aging reactors. To meet future needs, the industry is turning to small modular reactors (SMRs), which are cheaper and faster to build and are gaining investor momentum. As energy demand climbs, nuclear is being viewed as a key player in the push for reliable, low-carbon power.
