() Flying together with our sponsor ➤ to curb appetite, regulate blood sugar, and promote sustainable fat loss, MedVi’s doctor-prescribed treatment is a science-backed way to take control of your health. | ➤While on his way to the 9/11 memorial service wearing a MAGA hat and a photo of his late father, who died in the South Tower, a man says he was refused service at a New York City café. The business later apologized, saying the employee violated company policy and was disciplined. () ➤ The family of a German-Jewish banker is trying to reclaim Van Gogh’s Sunflowers , saying he was forced to sell it under Nazi pressure in 1934. Now worth about $250 million and held by a Tokyo museum, the painting’s fate is before a U.S. appeals court, which must first decide if Illinois even has jurisdiction. () ➤ An oil rig worker in Alaska filmed a close encounter with a curious polar bear that approached the rig’s gate, calmly telling it “Hey, sweetheart” as it rested its head on the bars. () ➤ Here’s a cozy collection of mushroom dishes that channels the rustic charm of Middle-earth, offering hearty, comforting meals fit for a hobbit’s dinner table. () | Have you ever had a memorable close encounter with wildlife? 1. 2. Yesterday's Results: Do you have an active passport? 1. Yes: 68% 2. No: 32% | | Daily Quote | “It is better to face a gunman than live your life afraid to face the truth.” —, during Charlie Kirk’s memorial service | Today's Trivia What U.S. state generates the most nuclear power? | (Step One) The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 | ---|---

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- September 22
body:
|

---
Friends and neighbors, Last week, I questioned fired CDC Director Dr. Susan Monarez and former CDC career employee Dr. Debra Houry when they appeared before the Health, Education, Labor and Pensions Committee. During the hearing, when I directly questioned if Dr. Houry thought RFK Jr. was competent, she responded that she believes RFK Jr. should resign. I concluded my testimony by allowing Dr. Susan Monarez the opportunity to send a message to parents. Dr. Monarez confirmed vaccines are safe and effective. I have been building the case since May as to why RFK Jr. must resign or be fired. Wednesday's hearing couldn't have made it more clear: RFK Jr. is dangerous for our families. His north star is conspiracy theories instead of sound science. Children will continue to die as his insidious vaccine disinformation spreads. [](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15615.11756908.5652486.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1968370163297960136&redir_log=480884008178333) [WATCH SENATOR ALSOBROOKS' FULL QUESTIONING HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15615.11756908.5652486.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1968370163297960136&redir_log=480884008178333) We also saw this President work to limit free speech this week. You can watch a clip of my [MSNBC](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15615.11756908.5652486.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1968779124069011498&redir_log=806081428841333) interview where I discussed the FCC's efforts to interfere with our First Amendment rights. This is a five alarm fire, and I hope that every American understands what we are seeing. The First Amendment in our country is sacrosanct. The right to free speech is sacred. It's not partisan. We didn't have to agree with what Jimmy Kimmel said, but having the government sanction what we say, censor what we say, or control what we say, is very dangerous. We must speak out against these constitutional violations. We must remain vigilant. To lose our free speech is to lose our country.
**Fighting Through Legislation** I continue to fight to get things done here in Washington. From working to restore health care to closing tax loopholes for billionaires, here are some of the bills I've co-sponsored the last few weeks: Department of Defense's Cost of War Act (DoD COW)
* This will require the costs for the renaming of the Department of Defense to be deducted from the Secretary of Defense's travel budget.

Deceptive Practices and Voter Intimidation Act
* This will penalize those who willfully engage in misleading voters in an attempt to influence or suppress their vote.

Restoring Food Security for American Families and Farmers Act of 2025
* This bill would repeal the SNAP cuts in the One Big Beautiful Bill Act.

Restoring Essential Health Care Act
* This bill would repeal section 71113 of the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, which defunded Planned Parenthood by prohibiting Medicaid reimbursements to clinics primarily engaged in reproductive health care.

Supporting the Abused by Learning Options to Navigate Survivor (SALONS) Stories Act
* This bipartisan bill would provide federal grants to incentivize states to incorporate domestic violence awareness training into cosmetology and barber licensing requirements.

Small Business Restoring Equity for Local Importers through Economic Fairness Act
* This bill would exempt goods imported by or for the use of small businesses (as defined by the Small Business Act) from global baseline and reciprocal tariffs. Within 90 days of enactment, the Administration will be required to refund global baseline and reciprocal tariffs paid on goods imported by or for the use of small businesses.

Keep Billionaires out of Social Security Act
* This bill would address the ways in which the Trump Administration is jeopardizing social security. Specifically, it would protect and improve field offices and staffing, increase customer service funding, improve access for beneficiaries, protect Americans' data, and remove DOGE's authority over the Social Security Administration.

Billionaires Income Act
* This bill would close tax loopholes for approximately 700 billionaire taxpayers and raise over $500 billion in tax revenue annually.

Protecting our Democracy Act
* This bill is a comprehensive reform package to strengthen the guardrails of our democracy against presidents who seek to abuse their power for personal gain.

Measuring the Cost of Disasters Act
* This bill would require NOAA to reinstate the billion-dollar disaster database as they've maintained it for the past 45 years. The publicly available data has been used by federal policy makers and state and local governments in planning funding and resiliency efforts for impacted communities. The insurance industry also uses the database to estimate future disaster costs and trends.

Congressional Tribute to Constance Baker Motley Act of 2025
* This bill would award a Congressional Gold Medal to Constance Baker Motley.

VISIBLE Act of 2025
* This bill would require immigration enforcement officers--including DHS personnel (such as CBP and ICE), federal agents detailed to immigration operations, and deputized state or local officers--to display clearly visible identification during public-facing enforcement actions.

National Warrior Call Day Resolution
* This resolution marks November 16 as National Warrior Call Day. The day is intended to spread awareness and combat the high rates of suicide and other mental illnesses among veterans and service members.

No Federal Payments to Companies Controlled by Special Government Employees Act
* This bill would prevent federal agencies from awarding contracts, grants, or cooperative agreements to companies owned by Special Government Employees (SGEs).

NO BAN Act
* This bill limits Presidential authority to restrict entry into the United States based on national origin or religion.

Yes in God's Backyard Act
* This bill provides technical assistance and grants to faith-based institutions to increase the supply of affordable rental housing.

Historic Tax Credit Growth and Opportunity Act
* This bill enhances and expands the federal Historic Tax Credit (HTC) program, which is intended to encourage more investments in historic preservation, spurring economic development and revitalization in underserved communities.

District of Columbia National Guard Home Rule Act
* The District of Columbia National Guard Home Rule Act would name the Mayor of Washington, D.C. as Commander-in-Chief of the D.C. National Guard, giving the mayor the same control over the D.C. National Guard that the governors of the states and the three territories with National Guards have over their respective National Guards. Under current law, the President is Commander-in-Chief of the D.C. National Guard.

District of Columbia Police Home Rule Act
* The District of Columbia Police Home Rule Act would repeal the provision in the D.C. Home Rule Act of 1973 that gives the President the authority to federalize the Metropolitan Police Department.

Joint Resolution to Terminate Federalization of MPD
* The joint resolution would terminate President Donald Trump's unprecedented federalization of the D.C. Metropolitan Police Department in Washington, D.C. Under the District of Columbia Home Rule Act of 1973, Congress can terminate the President's emergency control of MPD with a joint resolution.

First-Time Homebuyer Tax Credit Act of 2025
* This bill creates a federal tax credit for first-time homebuyers.

Truth and Healing Commission on Indian Boarding School Policies Act
* This bipartisan bill would establish a formal commission to investigate, document, and report on the history of the U.S. Indian boarding school system and its intergenerational impacts on Native communities.

Resolution in Support of Vaccines
* This resolution reaffirms a commitment to science-based public health, pushes back against RFK Jr.'s dangerous anti-vaccine agenda, and emphasizes that vaccines remain one of the most effective tools for protecting children, seniors, and vulnerable populations.

Health Access Innovation Act
* This bill authorizes the HHS Secretary to award grants to faith-or community-based organizations with the aim of expanding access to culturally appropriate care, encouraging innovation, and addressing health inequities and chronic disease challenges.

Gun Violence Prevention Research Act
* This bill would authorize $50 million annually for the next five fiscal years for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention to conduct and support research on firearms safety and gun violence prevention.

Resolution recognizing the 35th Anniversary of the Americans with Disabilities Act
* This resolution reaffirms the ADA's promise of inclusion, independent living, and equal opportunity for individuals with disabilities, while urging continued action to break down remaining barriers.

**Stay Informed** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have been laid off at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15615.11756908.5652486.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=983830187668200). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator

## [Robert F. Kennedy Jr.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1786952/VaHR0cHM6Ly9nby51c21hZ2F6aW5laW5zaWRlci5jb20vZGU3MDAyMGEtNzcwNy00MjBkLTk0YTctYTE2ZDkzZWQzZWJm/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjI/LbmNsd0VCSU5uNA/gaNEjTw/sblc0133ae7) went on to say that he never really expected things to get this big and that politicians and sponsors were furious that he was splitting up his time. In fact, relations with some politicians grew so tense that they ended up giving him an ultimatum.

He knew he would receive scrutiny from fans and sponsors for quitting, but he felt it was time to work on something that would positively change his life.

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1786952/VaHR0cHM6Ly9nby51c21hZ2F6aW5laW5zaWRlci5jb20vZGU3MDAyMGEtNzcwNy00MjBkLTk0YTctYTE2ZDkzZWQzZWJm/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjI/LbmNsd0VCSU5uNA/gaNEjTw/sblc0133ae7)

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: You knew Charlie’s voice. I knew his heart.
body:
This is the man I loved...
I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

| | | [ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=07a24dd0ca5942c3b378909ed2a95379&_e=Tfrrgon2s5I1bUWfaKw8qQ8CZY7y-dblNiCcAT6xGJd5hCRtDKnIqjQ4-wNDUOhfvTJ1AKLpg27PS-ADoYMMq8OxOiTIWzhI_j9BGM_MITzBlRZv2F89kIGTrTTjwMDus30TK0OYlsYJnlAKi5Im62h6yUGtY1LVsF71H6H3piAbRX4vTKr-Q0TFPK6McggqKdBjduSbUI-tsr94_Wfse5DmQJdiLDU0nIbrOdcurImg-2y6yzdL7lJN6s9HVXQuX07L19YFsqMMj0zyh4dcIk20XFnPee3U2OZGU0prUIuQuc9PEhna-TZfhwft2GJNU8rHNAOjQfkd1u0Iq_QItALZ7P_Ktlco4c3EgLtrmNkGBdRnBuaN-yx-uRNAXpI1Pf35rpVyYMJUWg7xprRpanD7yF_mtJfbiAqaKlTu6O1ChijvPX74lr0pbgHHLJXmXdXr1pva2yN1CEGFwzZ1nwO-bALpBMLu2SQHODtAUXCAMzpD9J6wKdJfXnw7p4FIPsccbgtvFMK9y7_czaHZvl_Vvz1jtVrfolomifraJyojDfWnHV_48elcOcuw3xn8Jm5CyMWjHVuLndbBKIQYFh2AnzW_kzRZFYLoyuEy1QpZfpQaffXVW2qSKcF5lCpQTd2zYz-r_XtXuOLHeZEkHzuxTIzIfMBjMCp-1DROhkruZde-OimxOS11sPiZJ2C66MXN7ghkKP_uX0k_AAZuZg%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=07a24dd0ca5942c3b378909ed2a95379&_e=Tfrrgon2s5I1bUWfaKw8qQ8CZY7y-dblNiCcAT6xGJd5hCRtDKnIqjQ4-wNDUOhfvTJ1AKLpg27PS-ADoYMMq8OxOiTIWzhI_j9BGM_MITzBlRZv2F89kIGTrTTjwMDus30TK0OYlsYJnlAKi5Im62h6yUGtY1LVsF71H6H3piAbRX4vTKr-Q0TFPK6McggqKdBjduSbUI-tsr94_Wfse5DmQJdiLDU0nIbrOdcurImg-2y6yzdL7lJN6s9HVXQukmiStui28jgKC7KZ6rS6PwekNdHYkmgECER460TpBdA9w4q-ovs0mDA-tOR3C3gNtl-fi7qfMFI51ytQLvWDW-E8WnLlcFy96PAck0PdOMKMVqQrNxyL8LDctzLq6d0Zi-KRQI3b0jfRcx3WM2mCK-TAYAG6L7i2wnWcpdUlkIo1OFt2g6eMRuVw7Sf_Bppb79lZlFVpIJv9MtE7zrjTa4Y1MADOqTju4HDsjKVspBLZ-lHeFQ9m1nHRXdIoaiw67mI5T5ffLhu1dq5g5-lBE8jZXSy2_Vhrtqj_JK61XEOo7pRjZEvVB2fMuuM24nFZr-JpTWXF5ai7ezx1xdyR6BpoCGkZxydDCNCe0FyD3hN7rcDMe9jsm2NtCuHEbhCho0j1zgiFN86zkzqa5TvTFgYP8BBFcILvnc8Qs34MLFmxNhiADAP_Zy_xwytoNRScW0NqnZtjH350NVVMd2dOkQ%3D%3D)
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
---
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=07a24dd0ca5942c3b378909ed2a95379&_e=Tfrrgon2s5I1bUWfaKw8qQ8CZY7y-dblNiCcAT6xGJd5hCRtDKnIqjQ4-wNDUOhfvTJ1AKLpg27PS-ADoYMMq8OxOiTIWzhI_j9BGM_MITzBlRZv2F89kIGTrTTjwMDus30TK0OYlsYJnlAKi5Im62h6yUGtY1LVsF71H6H3piAbRX4vTKr-Q0TFPK6McggqKdBjduSbUI-tsr94_Wfse5DmQJdiLDU0nIbrOdcurImg-2y6yzdL7lJN6s9HVXQuAuaEVIWjvyCdqUyaW3twUtHAkomTVk1QRMlfgimxJXgjSGlPjeiavdu2H5L_6vWiIq60VGXexDGN5rozLHogIvbmhXEPIukeOqNS8yfF48s7dU54LISCvpYwjulIVExS6k_ZPUvtr2TBj7z33utjt-sxMD_96eAsYKnbyUaAPQbZoXMOMHlIw_1BVVODpIW0mgxHBvFtCEy4Bc3KGd96PDq10hDflkQBezZ4oBdjoUSQwZeUByO_hw-_5oP4c1CK5SU2UXrHqoJeD1RCXjEMUkFdMsIXHvym4l4y4JNZ1_MU89R1MrJAb7GMF9YGIkiHQ7cFcHe0nXJOVocmykobggt8UOL_OKOlNNUuY-WQjO1FSwFB0WgWbC6yhpM0GAO1v2tmWd5VJZ271rV2gI4Xwu8r5dVtz5TUZDXmYRu5x9dTw6nS6a-7jOFGKG9x7m8N1jViXmMO5BT7kGAe3qh4gQ%3D%3D)
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
---
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=07a24dd0ca5942c3b378909ed2a95379&_e=Tfrrgon2s5I1bUWfaKw8qQ8CZY7y-dblNiCcAT6xGJd5hCRtDKnIqjQ4-wNDUOhfvTJ1AKLpg27PS-ADoYMMq8OxOiTIWzhI_j9BGM_MITzBlRZv2F89kIGTrTTjwMDus30TK0OYlsYJnlAKi5Im62h6yUGtY1LVsF71H6H3piAbRX4vTKr-Q0TFPK6McggqKdBjduSbUI-tsr94_Wfse5DmQJdiLDU0nIbrOdcurImg-2y6yzdL7lJN6s9HVXQucCdCxqM_SRsYGs_95S0CnP9w-ctx0kqCKnRv-wl96-cE6-vFWzaWQ6tCrq5Y9GZQnxlym0N0wx3VY2C7NOSNBu_afFFieX6p2S0psbEahi1a49pxeJVKePqj5mHRyXp3bx1ByIuvCYdabG1DwPc9EvlYc6Lq8SrkT3bzKjcgy86BUPhEODFONwWxMUAtZb55xxkG1ftmAg4Da-2xoGSBtVTDHgCZuR6t07zCihVdVLQgpBuxQ8m-zFAlL1_8ar5bXuJBjaYbKL4zlEIlDIS5gXcxHM0zPTOe2cUP1eD5bPK0GfXH-jHSMVBYPCVMRTZMwwNlcewzebateG8dT24hfCYEoErHLiJW94CPKDXLW03enlVhniZPVt9AfT_2DV8dE5mR4HyuCWJGPvgHwSH-LTBaKz5xuD0kJ3TjzxxFTc_5VnRTIDVKTZdI3OGta73xQbm5yAelNuuVYLW2_cZuYQ%3D%3D)
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk** CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [ _**Support Turning Point USA**_ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=07a24dd0ca5942c3b378909ed2a95379&_e=Tfrrgon2s5I1bUWfaKw8qQ8CZY7y-dblNiCcAT6xGJd5hCRtDKnIqjQ4-wNDUOhfvTJ1AKLpg27PS-ADoYMMq8OxOiTIWzhI_j9BGM_MITzBlRZv2F89kIGTrTTjwMDus30TK0OYlsYJnlAKi5Im62h6yUGtY1LVsF71H6H3piAbRX4vTKr-Q0TFPK6McggqKdBjduSbUI-tsr94_Wfse5DmQJdiLDU0nIbrOdcurImg-2y6yzdL7lJN6s9HVXQup5q4AhEERzIvrAwv6fKHwlzoq_9vUU7Au4nIygaattrmW5ezSicy7Uv7M5UmGFxh-tjLddC5AAk3_1I28DqMnQAul5h2y6iU-rYIOD6Lcxe7CJBrKov6DBvdikgkKLPWtMxup7Jj4s-T-llAqE3o9RSqwnCx_KtCRMpOOqw2IO4-MIzjVhTDjppO8l6mkUgSOn3_NwSkL_XpHdNDzLH6vBaiiapHiTfG12vE5iWXP621tFL_AD7hxSP8hegvoWdFNpkZPwwY2li-qjOdgpLPcqPzCYLNbGrZuDOUmQDMtIF9MWThNQao4YWpgcByx5y34bYjF8zv72qFspYM2rHR-L3nHNvc2EGdp4xzrKbXwXOV_1NhZ8KlAYQUiQLAvXMrK5aXP03mnTTEEGr71nm4hTn4XP6P3Y5gwt6zmvSO7jpyxUNsZd6ooz1I_qWarAk71r0Z7tyBpTPHtfTSOsxsnQ%3D%3D)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=07a24dd0ca5942c3b378909ed2a95379&_e=Tfrrgon2s5I1bUWfaKw8qQ8CZY7y-dblNiCcAT6xGJd5hCRtDKnIqjQ4-wNDUOhfvTJ1AKLpg27PS-ADoYMMq8OxOiTIWzhI_j9BGM_MITzBlRZv2F89kIGTrTTjwMDus30TK0OYlsYJnlAKi5Im62h6yUGtY1LVsF71H6H3piAbRX4vTKr-Q0TFPK6McggqKdBjduSbUI-tsr94_Wfse5DmQJdiLDU0nIbrOdcurImg-2y6yzdL7lJN6s9HVXQuPIsuTO8OAIhMht_WFfYK-MhdOQ4QVON7N_hqZA59FUcmC_xuzQPP7RYYSJeKPxyfnghT8de4rhNlomALiYevvvRT1ymEwWboqgpWhIrJpzLuLr7K2Ooi2y3dqfW7qzrRWko5AXPwTIvNM0n5KWMWVpOYR1r6zIhrjAudtYEF-Qc7agZex2F_WTjEGX0B3TBeIAtdNhme7sRKrc2PmLW26QlJ5qg1d6tiktLE0L0oIyS2JUNpo78NnpE-q5NR_nmJdkRjGiwRRGYLZhzqskE-qfJufac3gCw1S_cFglPLdFYIDMfkj7WLaTh0LTFRO-tVC0J-TT5uh35nFqMvoEQ2ZwKrBhk2fwOe0L7RUt7cI7wQkTLlIDP9ryPQYajFNbYx03kCvdeWoyEtNkWSM-S-B3PDt5PXvI13_7BWMUFdnxzTGOr0H9TAMJqGHYzVsYzh4WQHUStnMgXOcdggFZaRnQ%3D%3D)
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Friend, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
---
[ **Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=07a24dd0ca5942c3b378909ed2a95379&_e=Tfrrgon2s5I1bUWfaKw8qQ8CZY7y-dblNiCcAT6xGJd5hCRtDKnIqjQ4-wNDUOhfvTJ1AKLpg27PS-ADoYMMq8OxOiTIWzhI_j9BGM_MITzBlRZv2F89kIGTrTTjwMDus30TK0OYlsYJnlAKi5Im62h6yUGtY1LVsF71H6H3piAbRX4vTKr-Q0TFPK6McggqKdBjduSbUI-tsr94_Wfse5DmQJdiLDU0nIbrOdcurImg-2y6yzdL7lJN6s9HVXQu6XYnc_liM84_3xhSfXCddiJei5UqM8YuCa6kzdO34yXP23lgzAf8gIZeatpMc_t6rGKYUZb9B37vv8fBuuYyiiiYzLGla9ozJNhn21FgUa84JCLhgx3srnff5dJ0iyIQh7LzHzSYkBjVW72L6FNP9xc2J7oNkCg35tYk9iqqQaOqbC0lmsaLVpw4z0UpvzNwFKPWW9oFc3D9cYfcbUm5adaT13i8q2Z5g8vIsK-kVz6QEQoz9mTwVSrSs3FHFNEh-zvOfaMlQhG7A4QhnASuk2jFVCQhbBLNa0qVPhqPTeTmwaChTDhBYmPaiGk3pY2rRh4USD6umNjy5rx3aWvda1hRfgw_ervQFE24KfHnWH5LIRW_85gqyXMfjJjhK39YH2lQyjP7TsTJvIn5BH83esPwbG9cIwY6CFa32dCH8sWTynj5NwJ1GBDBdLwu1XNj-96Vts0XOxae5KIh_CAECQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is the man I loved... I don’t know how else to begin except with this: | | | Friend, I don't know how else to begin except with this: I miss him. Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him. My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life. You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation. But to me... He was just Charlie. He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy. The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: " How can I love you better today?" That's who Charlie really was. That 's who I fell in love with. And I want to tell you that story, Friend. We met at what I thought was a job interview. Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold: " Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't. He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future. Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think. Then Charlie looked at me and said: " I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first." He didn't skip a beat: " I have enough friends." That was Charlie. Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right. God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you." God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." We fell fast -- and we fell deep. It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights. But we understood each other... Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- to stand by his side. He loved God. body:
U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz criticized FCC Chairman Brendan Carr's threat to [revoke ABC's broadcast license](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2SpSAQBeCnwYxb0OqoAcEmZrPphhZC98gOiAV9f7xPv-W-wiSddNVX55w_n8unDTHsX79tQsMvysuOzxqRGcviyv3tSuDgwhsrOcdbQcsUF1DQSzVJgMXbEM-la7xZlZ90g0YP_di346S6ZjNj36rOkR_XHtRA5JXvCUiNH9AS9dAEc2FqAtBa6U7fBmxBewuowGlNJDqFPnAuN96Q8WUrxTM_sNxcTk00G_NRRftLwCxg3s8jV75eAuZLFjCrScCsr7Pea9ixVgEzo5dXQelyOmzBKsm5KteCu7e7dLYUyVkmS8HKNdcqKRf5N6R0yu-QEkZpma37vrCmGH88Q4yhfgyiU1_Jhvg_H_9s1YeBfwEAAP__2PKM5A) over Jimmy Kimmel's comments regarding Charlie Kirk's alleged killer. Cruz called the suggestion "dangerous as hell" during the [Friday episode](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFu6jAQheGncXZEnrGT4IUX97Zi0YquKlVdRY49ISMZgpyBAE9f0Vfo9hzpW_xf-34fOPPp8BGO5OU2zv2J1iWTCJU-lssjFhaO_KBljFGmQkHG3KPGZqPdBrFPgfO9t1Xyg04OKvLQNdvGbJ221eQ1WYOuNYM1CaDTzdABUhsDxNS6xlXsn5h2iAAaLNQdGYQUkDRGgHFUVlNimUstEwndwjLm-3ylUsf5WGU_iZwXZf4p3Cncreta3-eLXAZ6_s8lSJyU2V2Vec3t-zffXv5_vsWq-HReOWde2k5ZfTgGzr-k_C3E1eNPAAAA__-rS3GQ) of his podcast.

## Cruz Criticizes Threat to Revoke ABC's License
U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz criticized FCC Chairman Brendan Carr's threat to [revoke ABC's broadcast license](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2SpSAQBeCnwYxb0OqoAcEmZrPphhZC98gOiAV9f7xPv-W-wiSddNVX55w_n8unDTHsX79tQsMvysuOzxqRGcviyv3tSuDgwhsrOcdbQcsUF1DQSzVJgMXbEM-la7xZlZ90g0YP_di346S6ZjNj36rOkR_XHtRA5JXvCUiNH9AS9dAEc2FqAtBa6U7fBmxBewuowGlNJDqFPnAuN96Q8WUrxTM_sNxcTk00G_NRRftLwCxg3s8jV75eAuZLFjCrScCsr7Pea9ixVgEzo5dXQelyOmzBKsm5KteCu7e7dLYUyVkmS8HKNdcqKRf5N6R0yu-QEkZpma37vrCmGH88Q4yhfgyiU1_Jhvg_H_9s1YeBfwEAAP__2PKM5A) over Jimmy Kimmel's comments regarding Charlie Kirk's alleged killer. Cruz called the suggestion "dangerous as hell" during the [Friday episode](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFu6jAQheGncXZEnrGT4IUX97Zi0YquKlVdRY49ISMZgpyBAE9f0Vfo9hzpW_xf-34fOPPp8BGO5OU2zv2J1iWTCJU-lssjFhaO_KBljFGmQkHG3KPGZqPdBrFPgfO9t1Xyg04OKvLQNdvGbJ221eQ1WYOuNYM1CaDTzdABUhsDxNS6xlXsn5h2iAAaLNQdGYQUkDRGgHFUVlNimUstEwndwjLm-3ylUsf5WGU_iZwXZf4p3Cncreta3-eLXAZ6_s8lSJyU2V2Vec3t-zffXv5_vsWq-HReOWde2k5ZfTgGzr-k_C3E1eNPAAAA__-rS3GQ) of his podcast. Kimmel's late-night show was [pulled off the air](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSnDAQRL8GMm1JA-yKQIGTzc6pQ0qMRseUBaKkWbi9r3fhwD_gtLuqu1__-pg-PCfePn_6lZx8xTxtdNZEIlQmLK9vLCyM_E01IspSyEtME2gYlB4VwBQ8p_fUt8HNOoymJWcegx06O-q-XZw1drijBkv9MAS0vbGI5j5YBNv5GFt2V5geAYzRpje3B3VgggfSgMbE2PSaAksuN1lI6MvXmN75oHLDvLbJLSJ7bbofDTwbeJ7nedtmvCguv4HnntOFUBt4Snmtu_Jh5Y2rFC-ct39yRFSFjvyblBxqLtkH9FVUYqStUlVXp5p9UPtrTowsb1Vw89BB141tcWE_OSWu90fT68_Vc_q7UP7v18PBnwAAAP__2UGQOQ) after the host accused Trump supporters of "desperately trying to characterize this kid who murdered Charlie Kirk as anything other than one of them." Carr condemned Kimmel's remarks as "the sickest conduct possible" and suggested "there is going to be additional work for the FCC ahead" if broadcasters don’t "take action." Later, President Trump seemed to [endorse the idea](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSnDAQRL8GMm1JA-yKQIGTzc6pQ0qMRseUBaKkWbi9r3fhwD_gtLuqu1__-pg-PCfePn_6lZx8xTxtdNZEIlQmLK9vLCyM_E01IspSyEtME2gYlB4VwBQ8p_fUt8HNOoymJWcegx06O-q-XZw1drijBkv9MAS0vbGI5j5YBNv5GFt2V5geAYzRpje3B3VgggfSgMbE2PSaAksuN1lI6MvXmN75oHLDvLbJLSJ7bbofDTwbeJ7nedtmvCguv4HnntOFUBt4Snmtu_Jh5Y2rFC-ct39yRFSFjvyblBxqLtkH9FVUYqStUlVXp5p9UPtrTowsb1Vw89BB141tcWE_OSWu90fT68_Vc_q7UP7v18PBnwAAAP__2UGQOQ) of revoking the licenses of networks that are overly critical of him. While Cruz said he agreed with ABC's decision to suspend Kimmel's show, he compared Carr's threat to [mafia tactics](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdEb2BC9QuNiGLttuiYw9DrNrQ2RPQpKvf-L9wuuudKV7dc7f63x1lGi7_XEZLb_iPm941ITMWGZfHh9fiMnTB2v0nteCjmOaQYGRapQAc3CU3nPXBLuoMOoGre7NYC7DqLpmtWoMOPRGdYuCaPQSBg3aG20G7CGMsSF7jqkRQGulO932eAEdHKACr3WMolMYiPfS8oqML1djeu9PLK3fc5Psynyv4vJbwCRgOo6j9Us9Kc5ewHRGARNjkCeQjN7LpeAW3Ca9K0X-o5zf8j_ljEne9j1ETMlVyeWR7wKmpthwPyglqr960albdpS-z_lnyp4WvgIAAP__goyCRw) and warned conservatives that Democrats would use the precedent to silence critics when they regain power. "_It might feel good right now to threaten Jimmy Kimmel, but when it is used to silence every conservative in America, we will regret it_ ," [said Cruz](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGuozAQxvHTQGdkGxygcLENXbbdEhkzhpEMRp4JJDn9ineFV4_01_y-f8_x6TDivvx1G1h-hzTucFEEZsijz6-vz8jo8QsUvOc1g-MQRy21EbIXWo-zw_gZm3K2k5x7VYJVrelM3fWyKVc71cbUykHbmU71k-m7FjpjZNe0qvfwKNHeMdlrrZRUjapaqLWanQapvVIhFI2EGTnlildgeDsK8ZNOyJVPWxntynxQUf8p9FDo4bquKqT3rbjvhR6OFG8CFXq4QeJyeSfh006QT8d4AokLYxQZlgwsgvfCw04p04qHOF60Crc43ImFm7xIvEIWG8zoRHpxBKYy2_m4G0iPtmjksjmMP-_x70Y9rf4fAAD__0JfkCM).
## DOJ Investigating Austin
The Department of Justice has [launched an investigation](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSmzAQhJ9GdPJIh2SgoEhD96dNyZyPk32JQB5xNr_99BnnFVLv7M5-36-v-Qsly3b9iSuP-p3KvPGxZ1blOlN9vKmKCsmb90Skt8qoKc_gIFo3WIB5QcmvOTTLeHHL4BsefRf72PaDC81t7JJ3vWOK0LU09C7EGNiHmChwjxQaGT9jbgDw3vngTx234BcEdkDep2SC40W01JPeWPkb95Rf5cn1RGVt8nhTve-m_WFgMjAdx3H683zwJzQwYVWhzAamD5eBKRfCbGBaym8r25N3lSuqlM3iY1fZLK_3XF4rb2rvFUmF-NOD82DPbQSPEW2KXWsDgrOXQJ31IZ4hXBaGoW3quNwPyVn2c2eCu64o-d9T_T-_zxH-BgAA___DYY3b) to determine whether Austin's employment practices violate Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, which prohibits employment discrimination based on race, color, religion, sex, or national origin. In a letter to Mayor Kirk Watson, Assistant Attorney General Harmeet K. Dhillon [expressed concern](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdCB7gdgULv6GLn97JXLsddiTgcjehCRPfyL3CNeOZubTzNd5OjtKtF7_uwUtP-M2rbiXhMyYJ5_vb5-JydMbS_Se54yOY5pAQl_LoQaYgqP0mroq2IsMg6rQKt2bvjWD7KrZxgH7PkbZauPdACZqAwa0C_1FtidlKrJHmRwAlJKqU43GFlRwgBK8UjGKTmIg3nLDMzI-XYnptT0wN35bqmRn5lsR7T8Bo4Bx3_cmbk_t7oVpPSwCxmOTgPH70DzWAW8u84Ir17Q-sDBdHdO21r-h-gOpsg23nVKictKik9fFUfog-W9HPSz8BAAA__8i2H_r) about the city's Office of Equity and Inclusion, which aims to facilitate "working from a racial equity lens." She cited guidance to "delineate clear racial equity expectations regarding hiring." "_The Department of Justice will not tolerate discriminatory race-based employment practices and DEI policies, in Austin or other cities_ ," [said Dhillon](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS2zAQQ7-G6ugh15JlFSzSqLu0KTVrcmlvQpEacs-y7-szSj7hamDwAPz6WD6QE-f7T1zJySuWJdPeEolQXXz9_PKVhT1_UYvey6MSSkwLGBi0mTTAEpDTe-m74G4mTLYjZ8fhOpyvk-m7hwM8E8LF9HDx4eavwxgJx8Fe4uinfrh17I4wMwFYa2xvTyOdwQYEMuCtjVH1hgJLqSd5kNALW0zv8qR68mXtknuIbE2dfyiYFcz7vp_-vDAfooL5WKNgTsVjUjDjZxPOCuZQfuuyUW6a85Oa8B2FS9acpWjP8tYl6v9ufbB0RU_6ho2CpnVL5b1SFr1V9MKeDkZXXdh2TonbZVS9ua_I6V9H-d6zTwd_AwAA__9JV5Fo) in a statement. Watson [defended](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE9jMo_sBh5D4GATsrfphsjY7aFXxkZ2D_Nz-hWzR3hZS19Xqar-fM_fliKl22-7oeFnyHPCR43IjGV25f52hZgcvbEG53gtaDnEGRT0Uo0SYPaW4mvuGm8W5UfdoNFDf-3b66i6ZjXB26Ftoe_1Al-dX7weFA5qVE5dh4BdQ-Y0UyOA1kp3-jJgC9pbQAVO6xBEp9AT53LhFRmftob4ygeWi8tbE83KvFfR_hIwCZjcUu29MqWTCpjOOgKmmJ2NAqa_J3MoPe628IaJJaUDK9PNMlb5XytDLnLPjInJRonbHvPr8-ypukIbJcuUkzwox89Vm2L8_qAYqX4NolO3zVL8JOSf7XoY-BcAAP__zCKSbQ) the city's employment practices, insisting they are "in full compliance with the law" and "assure highly qualified public servants, who care deeply about our entire community and bring their unique characteristics to the jobs they do."
## FAA Comments on Flight Disruptions
According to the FAA, hundreds of flights at DFW International and Love Field airports on Friday and Saturday were [canceled and delayed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL-G6miQK8kWCxVp1F3alMKaXJ4WWIsGuWed7-sD5RdSDgYYzHt_PtYPZOH98zc-aNbvXNadjiakSnWN9esnVlaO_EMtx6hbJdQsKzgYrQsWYE3I8l6HLs13l4LvaPa3cRr7Kbih22aHONE0ujEPIQ7pGkOYhpwIx-sV-jF0PJ9jLgB47_zgLzfqwScEchC9z9kMjhJrqRfdSOkbW5Z3eVG9xPLoZN5Un830vwwsBpbjOC77PaZ8nLWB5eQxsEiJKAaWlA8r5UU2M0myyPVZqtpEgu9mI-6RRFC57Ge6C1nhnZrNlRO-LT6ocsTdtvKl20FNDSx9AN_fnIGlq3N6HizC7Xozg_t8IMu_n_p_dl8z_A0AAP__sJKRDg) due to "multiple failures" of a service provided by Dallas-based Frontier Communications. The outage, traced to [two cut fiber optic cables](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGuozoQxvGngW4iezABFxS3oTu33RIN9jiMZELWnoST8_Sr7Cts_Uk_6fv_-lq-SLLcb__TzpN-p2O581kzq3JZQnn-hCIqQX64phB0K0ya8oIGezAeEJdIkt-La-O0muhty5Md-rHvRm9cu03RX01YMQxd37FBHlbjrp1nGtfk17S2Mn0w4xGtNdbZy8Ad2kjIBoO1KTXOcBQ9ykU3Vv6mmvL7eHG5hGNv87SpPmrT_dfg3OB8nuflTESfscGZikrI3OCshV6cG5y35z0WjhWOBCnLbdMKkTO9OQIpxHQCSXkcRSEfL4YknCPQLhH491MeO98VpNbnR8VxAKIBXeo76KIncK4nII49-JUjBvIYxrEtU3yckrPU69A4c9tJ8t8D-m_ZXxP-CQAA___SBpgb), affected the FAA's Dallas TRACON facility, which manages incoming and outgoing air traffic within 50 miles. The FAA said that one of its contractors, aerospace and defense company L3Harris, “failed to ensure that redundancies in the system functioned properly.” American Airlines was forced to cancel 530 flights on Friday and another 160 on Saturday. At Love Field, there were 244 delays and one cancellation on Friday. "This is a clear example of the FAA's outdated infrastructure and underscores the urgent need to modernize our air traffic control systems,” [said a statement](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdEb2YkIoXFxD9197JdrY62DJwcheQpKnP5FX-NsZfaOZ-fcz_2BMcb3_xQdZfoU8r3TURMxUZlf2jyuRo4sfqsE5XgohhzSDgl6qUQLMHmN6z6bx9qb8qBuyeuivfXcdlWkWC6NSeBmGrofRBEP9YEAHN1xNB3i5qSbaM0yNAForbXQ7UAfaI5ACp3UIwijykXNpeSGmF9aQ3vlJpXX50SS7MG9VdH8ETAKm4zhad6vnitMXMH0RAdMpCZjyzh6ZvIxrKFi57I73QjIgSo8pYZUYy5YLy3vJ--pl5bydZFOs346YUqyXQRh1f2BM3xL8u-ueFv4HAAD__07BhTA) from the agency. U.S. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy [concurred](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9uwyAQgPGnwVui48A2DAyVKm_p0qGjReCIkUgcweWP8_RV-gpdv-E3fD-H-eBzyZfTlz-T42da5ws9WiFmqnOot1eomXPIL2opBF4qeU5lRsB-B3aHOEefyzbrLrojRCs7cnLsTa-MBd0tzo7GBpk0DQCgKGGw2vZgjspGo_qhy-6NgUWUEqSW-5EUyuiRAIOUKQkNFDOvdc8LMT19S2Vb71T3YT13xS3M1ybUh8BJ4PR8V4HTN4XPW0qbwKmx51sTOEk7WD0Y1avBGiMRteqqi9dHLiW3YRQaTmefyx_M_9txd_gbAAD__xjrcMk): “This is EXACTLY why @POTUS and I are hard at work to build a brand new air traffic control system.”

Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Cruz Criticizes Threat to Revoke ABC's License U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz criticized FCC Chairman Brendan Carr's threat to over Jimmy Kimmel's comments regarding Charlie Kirk's alleged killer. Cruz called the suggestion "dangerous as hell" during the of his podcast. Kimmel's late-night show was after the host accused Trump supporters of "desperately trying to characterize this kid who murdered Charlie Kirk as anything other than one of them." Carr condemned Kimmel's remarks as "the sickest conduct possible" and suggested "there is going to be additional work for the FCC ahead" if broadcasters don’t "take action." Later, President Trump seemed to of revoking the licenses of networks that are overly critical of him. While Cruz said he agreed with ABC's decision to suspend Kimmel's show, he compared Carr's threat to and warned conservatives that Democrats would use the precedent to silence critics when they regain power. "It might feel good right now to threaten Jimmy Kimmel, but when it is used to silence every conservative in America, we will regret it ," . DOJ Investigating Austin The Department of Justice has to determine whether Austin's employment practices violate Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, which prohibits employment discrimination based on race, color, religion, sex, or national origin. In a letter to Mayor Kirk Watson, Assistant Attorney General Harmeet K. Dhillon about the city's Office of Equity and Inclusion, which aims to facilitate "working from a racial equity lens." She cited guidance to "delineate clear racial equity expectations regarding hiring." "The Department of Justice will not tolerate discriminatory race-based employment practices and DEI policies, in Austin or other cities ," in a statement. Watson the city's employment practices, insisting they are "in full compliance with the law" and "assure highly qualified public servants, who care deeply about our entire community and bring their unique characteristics to the jobs they do." FAA Comments on Flight Disruptions According to the FAA, hundreds of flights at DFW International and Love Field airports on Friday and Saturday were due to "multiple failures" of a service provided by Dallas-based Frontier Communications. The outage, traced to , affected the FAA's Dallas TRACON facility, which manages incoming and outgoing air traffic within 50 miles. The FAA said that one of its contractors, aerospace and defense company L3Harris, “failed to ensure that redundancies in the system functioned properly.” American Airlines was forced to cancel 530 flights on Friday and another 160 on Saturday. At Love Field, there were 244 delays and one cancellation on Friday. "This is a clear example of the FAA's outdated infrastructure and underscores the urgent need to modernize our air traffic control systems,” from the agency. U.S. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy : “This is EXACTLY why @POTUS and I are hard at work to build a brand new air traffic control system.” | Flying together with our sponsor A groundbreaking discovery is transforming how we understand memory and brain health. Scientists at the prestigious Weinberg College of Chicago recently built the world’s most advanced atomic microscope, powerful enough to look deep inside a living, active brain. What they saw left them stunned: the true location of memory cells and how these cells shape our daily habits, decisions, and even personality. Even more exciting, their research revealed a simple way to restore lost memory and sharpen mental clarity—without expensive treatments or risky medications. A now makes it possible to reverse even severe memory loss using just a few easy, 3-minute techniques. Because it relies on natural brain retraining—not drugs or supplements—powerful corporations are already trying to keep this discovery from the public. The opportunity to reclaim your memory may not be available for long. 👉 . | ➤ Fort Worth: More than a thousand people marched in honor of Charlie Kirk Saturday evening. "It was Charlie and his bravery that woke us up and put us where we are today ," local activist Carlos Turcios said. () ➤ Grand Prairie: A father and his two children were hospitalized after their home exploded Saturday morning. Officials suspect a gas leak caused the explosion. () ➤ San Antonio: David Monroe, the founder and chair of the San Antonio Museum of Science and Technology, was killed Friday at the Boeing Center at Tech Port when a jet engine fell on him. () ➤ San Marcos: Dr. Thomas Alter, a former Texas State University professor who was fired earlier this month after he discussed overthrowing the U.S. government, has sued the school, claiming his termination was "politically-motivated discrimination." () ➤ Austin: A glass panel fell from a high-rise under construction on Thursday, marking the fifth such mishap this year at the ATX Tower. Ryan Companies, the contractor for the project, said an investigation by third-party consultants indicated there are "no systemic issues with the building’s glass panels." () ➤ Hurst: Steve Niekamp, the city's police chief since 2018, died from a sudden health complication last Thursday at the age of 56. "Chief Niekamp's leadership, integrity, and unwavering commitment to his officers and the community will never be forgotten ," said a statement from the Fort Worth Police Officers Association. () ➤ Lubbock: The 108th annual Panhandle South Plains Fair kicked off Thursday and continues through this Saturday. ** Maine Mom Sues Video Game Companies Responsible for Roblox, Minecraft, and Fortnite: “Not A War on Fun” (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=a568b28d05&e=f093fa355c)

A Maine mother has filed a lawsuit against the makers of several popular video games, alleging that they profited off of children’s addiction to their products. “This litigation is not a war on fun,” said the complaint, filed by Somerset County mom Casey Henderson. subject: Charlie Kirk: A life of faith. A legacy that endures.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0juygmvovqrvens8yipzi6amwny4ikio3wp6kyce1t57gcy7g65i6vswi9kesol8ztv5um2hncc0fl6yrqrykue7kb9w&__stmp=t2znl5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2znl5&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Friend, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind — _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2znl5&__onlt=h)
---

---
All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._ For Charlie, \- The Turning Point USA Family

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Last stand
subject: 43 days until obscure election that will cost Dems everything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The majority of Democratic voters we speak to are happy to turnout out to the polls in November but had no idea this obscure election was occurring until we contacted them.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZK8fSpMKnFqHHlMB3T0mY9DYsiJqwdZJMREmusoI5egr8sDJaZxRj8-VdU9c89j4NcMDq9COANEMiUhi6-bzeTU2TQ6ExniBXAMYcLkaTXn4YAuj6RICTGPOsXsumpR92_1jJ2S2WGhmUeylvJyoa8Qe4pggXE_3oP1k_gWOMroF_HV4CuE0LaFG9nGOtgk-iA8v_O3MyASGshR3HONBZ9W8ZixMBPSP&c=8pysCi36nBrM3cl9H1K3rAJiKHcVRLHztDp5Mk9eTW9vmi7iPhn44g==&ch=7s00hEUgG1AW9CneSN9756JEa_RovcWIsvoyP0gj0N-8_w1ENIN9-g==)
---
| Peter,
In 43 days, Pennsylvania will hold an election that could cost Democrats everything: the obscure but critically important November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election.
A loss for Democrats here means giving up on ever holding power in Pennsylvania again. It will mean MAGA's election rigging tactics get a court sanctioned rubber stamp enabling them to cheat and win in key swing state Pennsylvania in the 2026 midterms and 2028 presidential election.
MAGA is laser focused on winning this race while Democrats, rightfully focused on the 2026 midterms, have largely ignored this race putting us on track for defeat. Defend our Courts has refused to accept this outcome, now our efforts are paying off:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZK8fSpMKnFqHHlMB3T0mY9DYsiJqwdZJMREmusoI5egr8sDJaZxRj8-VdU9c89j4NcMDq9COANEMiUhi6-bzeTU2TQ6ExniBXAMYcLkaTXn4YAuj6RICTGPOsXsumpR92_1jJ2S2WGhmUeylvJyoa8Qe4pggXE_3oP1k_gWOMroF_HV4CuE0LaFG9nGOtgk-iA8v_O3MyASGshR3HONBZ-xr-CyfnOlE&c=8pysCi36nBrM3cl9H1K3rAJiKHcVRLHztDp5Mk9eTW9vmi7iPhn44g==&ch=7s00hEUgG1AW9CneSN9756JEa_RovcWIsvoyP0gj0N-8_w1ENIN9-g==)
---
| | | | Over the course of this weekend, over 50 canvassers, some traveling from as far as New York city and Virgina, descended upon Philadelphia to knock a total of 10,000 doors.
In the four months since we launched our initiative to salvage this race we've reached a total of 1,000,000 voters with our digital ads and door knockers. The majority of Democratic voters we speak to are happy to turnout out to the polls in November but had no idea this obscure election was occurring until we contacted them.
This bodes well for Democratic prospects in this race but with only 43 days remaining until election day we are in a race against the clock to turnout as many Democratic voters as we can.
We've calculated the average cost of getting a Democrat to vote in this election to be $55 \- in campaign jargon this is our cost per vote (CPV).
[Given that the outcome here may be determined by a few hundred or even a few dozen votes every single vote will count. Can we count on you to "buy a vote" in this crucial election by making a donation of $55 or whatever you can spare?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZK8fSpMKnFqHHlMB3T0mY9DYsiJqwdZJMREmusoI5egr8sDJaZxRj8-VdU9c89j4B1xp0J9YuKXQq25f_5NmRJ7uOCJ_ogsXP5u629rUuYCinmWC4X1GqYuhXl-KLRe0jgwwx_uk2VfUiA6XqUXTiI6tydtROvuMyTbBCA8P9wO-aUJ_86Fwg0jOfOVwM0vlY94XeRAehOmK0ulOxHaTJpf3h3V_gDydUaTrj3N6LBoHYR0xttJ6VQ==&c=8pysCi36nBrM3cl9H1K3rAJiKHcVRLHztDp5Mk9eTW9vmi7iPhn44g==&ch=7s00hEUgG1AW9CneSN9756JEa_RovcWIsvoyP0gj0N-8_w1ENIN9-g==)

* * *
# [What You Can Do](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=174213693&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MjEzNjkzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTg1NDMwMDYsImV4cCI6MTc2MTEzNTAwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.PaQbn-Y07NJPS_JB3Z4TyF1xukPZTFHDSQVnuHbZNrY)

---
| Sep 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=174213693&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MjEzNjkzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1ODU0MzAwNiwiZXhwIjoxNzYxMTM1MDA2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg3MzA0Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Rr3JzgWpDC_PbNwD7H80wAjjFB8k-UhU3QppZZxVEk0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=174213693&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MjEzNjkzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTg1NDMwMDYsImV4cCI6MTc2MTEzNTAwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.PaQbn-Y07NJPS_JB3Z4TyF1xukPZTFHDSQVnuHbZNrY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=174213693&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MjEzNjkzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTg1NDMwMDYsImV4cCI6MTc2MTEzNTAwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.PaQbn-Y07NJPS_JB3Z4TyF1xukPZTFHDSQVnuHbZNrY)
---
| | [](https://substack..ytts-W-HFexJ8iYLlHBvEs9mEyPNWFDSrphialOUKc0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/what-you-can-do?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hello and hope the Fall is off to a great start for you and yours.
Here's what I hear from friends just about every day: "Hey Yang, I'm despondent about the state of things. What can I do to make things better?"
These are folks who are often saddened by the overall dysfunction, polarization and lack of optimism out there. The headlines aren't encouraging: Charlie Kirk's assassination, Jimmy Kimmel being taken off air, the economy stalling, AI eating jobs.
I appreciate that people look to me for advice. I obviously see the same headlines that you do and get affected by them as someone who wants good things and is trying to make things better.
You know what I do on a really bad day?
Tip.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5d57372a-0cc8-4929-9b37-7de27f4f2e7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When I feel myself getting bummed out by world events, I tip really well. Aggressively. Like $20 on a $25 lunch bill.
Why? What does that do?
First, it makes me feel better. Doing something direct and nice for another person makes me feel better almost instantaneously.
Second, it makes the recipient happy. Might even make their day.
Third, it reminds me that whatever is plaguing me, there are other people who have different things on their minds.
Fourth, I'm mildly famous for wanting to give people money. I have a reputation to uphold.
Fifth, it gives me a sense of agency; that is, I CAN do something real and concrete right now.
Sixth, it makes people like me more. After all, I go to the same cafes and restaurants. Now, folks there are glad to see me.
Last, it reminds me of the progress that I've made. My first job was as a busboy getting tips. It's been a long time since the Imperial Wok.
All of this value for a mere $20. $15, really, since a $5 tip would be normal.
If I have trouble shaking bad vibes, I might do this all day. Lunch, dinner, coffee, the parking attendant. No one is safe.
Does this work? It generally does. It keeps me positive.
Now, you might not have the means to take this approach. But you could substitute a smile for a tip and it would work more or less the same.
You see, one of the most proven and powerful ways to be happier is to be grateful. I'm grateful that, to the extent that I have daily challenges, they're the kind of challenges that go with having opportunities. That might be true for you too. Generosity fuels gratitude.
So does taking action. People ask me, "What can I do?" Choose something direct and personal. It could even be just calling someone you haven't been in touch with for a while. No, you can't single-handedly undo polarization or soothe our culture. But you can make one person's day better. And if you can do that, what else can you do?
TLDR; don't let the headlines get to you. Others need you, including people you see every day. Start there.
Check out what Forward is doing to make things better [here](https://substack.com/redirect/d733f806-b638-4f77-96b8-54f05b1f13dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). You remember '[Fewer Poor Kids](https://substack.com/redirect/8361dd85-beae-4ca1-8c80-a4e23253afcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?' I interview Liam deClive-Lowe, Executive Director of [Humanity Forward](https://substack.com/redirect/0fa419d1-1b49-4424-a3be-f4806e1cdca1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), about how the child tax credit was made permanent and what else might be possible in Washington on the podcast this [week](https://substack.com/redirect/28dc4dfa-b88c-4a1a-b8b2-5e276ef1d7d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Over 800 people came to the Noble Mobile launch [party](https://substack.com/redirect/9bd4f859-4519-4d20-a9b3-83a7a97cb649?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which was epic! Our launch was covered in TechCrunch, CNN, USA Today, Business Insider, the New York Post and many more. Thank you to all who have checked out [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/c4298c16-c7e9-4179-8dd3-0f698ca3cdfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and spread the word!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b5c93531-e3ac-461e-aa4b-549c6fcbc6ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

These are folks who are often saddened by the overall dysfunction, polarization and lack of optimism out there. The headlines aren't encouraging: Charlie Kirk's assassination, Jimmy Kimmel being taken off air, the economy stalling, AI eating jobs. I appreciate that people look to me for advice. I obviously see the same headlines that you do and get affected by them as someone who wants good things and is trying to make things better. You know what I do on a really bad day? Tip. | | ---|---|--- When I feel myself getting bummed out by world events, I tip really well. Aggressively. Like $20 on a $25 lunch bill. Why? What does that do? First, it makes me feel better. Doing something direct and nice for another person makes me feel better almost instantaneously. Second, it makes the recipient happy. Might even make their day. Third, it reminds me that whatever is plaguing me, there are other people who have different things on their minds. Fourth, I'm mildly famous for wanting to give people money. I have a reputation to uphold. Fifth, it gives me a sense of agency; that is, I CAN do something real and concrete right now. Sixth, it makes people like me more. After all, I go to the same cafes and restaurants. Now, folks there are glad to see me. Last, it reminds me of the progress that I've made. My first job was as a busboy getting tips. name: Marina Jenkins, AOTL
subject: Update on our fight to protect the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Here’s how we fight back
|
---

Peter —
I cannot overstate how much is at stake in _Louisiana v. Callais_ — the case involving Louisiana’s congressional map in which the Supreme Court will decide whether or not the Voting Rights Act (VRA) is constitutional.
Here’s some background:
In 2022, Louisiana passed a congressional map into law, which allowed Black voters to elect a candidate of their choice in just one of six congressional districts, although Black voters made up a third of the state’s population.
Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, initiated a legal challenge to this gerrymandered congressional map for diluting the voting power of Black Louisiana voters in violation of Section 2 of the VRA. The litigation was successful, and the court required Louisiana to enact a new map that would provide equal access to the political process by including two districts where Black voters could elect candidates of their choice, instead of just one.
**Immediately after the enactment of a new map drawn to comply with this court order, the _Callais_ case was filed, and a different federal trial court wrongfully struck down Louisiana’s VRA-compliant map.**
On October 15, the fair maps movement will once again argue that Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act is a valid, necessary federal law that not only complies with the U.S. Constitution — it helps fulfill its promise. The Supreme Court must uphold its own precedent in _Allen v. Milligan_ — which upheld Section 2 just three years ago — and protect Louisiana’s VRA-compliant map.
As John Bisognano, President of All On the Line, put it, **“ If the Court decides to now undo that precedent, it would be a head-spinning reversal of itself. It would also be abundantly clear to the American people — who are increasingly outraged by the targeted discriminatory voting practices underway in Texas and other states — that the Supreme Court’s majority is completely untethered to the reality that everyday Americans live day to day.”**
**No matter what the Court rules, many maps are in the balance, and we need to be ready to respond. All On The Line continues to mobilize supporters to fight for a truly representative democracy so every eligible voter can make their voices heard.[Please make a donation to support this critical work in Louisiana and wherever our rights come under attack.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115676018/571112252/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_LASCOTUSUpdateNOR_email_20250922-AOTL-Tier1-LASCOTUSUpdateNOR-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250922-AOTL-Tier1-LASCOTUSUpdateNOR-MJ_&utm_campaign=LASCOTUSUpdateNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwOTkxMWE3LWFiOTctZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GdR43YnlW-6d4JeUKzxA0OcrIT8TK0PGW6dojNpwrTs=)**
Thanks so much,
Marina
Marina Jenkins
Executive Director
All On The Line

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqnlqi6cvbfmghh2p4p0pelaig2ubpijjjaq49j0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0slim1or2chh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z20tr0u2986r2rp24n24eme1cs0bgn1tr6835dt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0slim1or2chh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6k0t3closmffbhncemg86u6v2qt6ipldse3pc6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0slim1or2chh2bs)
---

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Under 2 months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjerde8of6c6l750qhm4b3bvap5oq7tsdn2gja5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0slim9pb4clh2bs)This is it. We're down to the wire. My election is less than 2 months away, and the future of Virginia and our nation hangs in the balance!I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I'm running for Governor of Virginia. But I'm not just running for office--I'm running to stop the liberal establishment from destroying our country.They're pouring MILLIONS into my Democrat opponent's campaign, and we're running out of time--chip in NOW to protect our country's future.[DONATE NOW >>
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za8n1bjj9jb65r9qplbh3ka0jl9t9ubktf862hao_rp22sh2s8i6epb0slim9pb4clh2bs)I need 1,000 Patriots like you to contribute to my campaign in the next hour. If we can do that, I know we can win this. But if we fall short, the consequences will be devastating: higher taxes, more regulations, and a government completely out of touch with our values.Your donation right now can make all the difference. Let's send a loud and clear message that we won't back down.[CHIP IN $25>>
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zji8cl859h2l2brph508ci11imn2sfj1ik94h2f8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0slim9pb4clh2bs)[CHIP IN $50>>

-Winsome Earle-Sears
* * *

Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That 's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2s0gs46f5ld4u5i7tkh49t6ptjplf6jpau5i75g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0slim9pb4clh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.[LEND A HAND

name: Randy Feenstra
subject: Don’t Miss Out: Join me at Iowa’s Roast and Ride 2025 on October 11th!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I'll be there! Will you?

| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://feenstraforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8962a0f5713e141c231f4f715&id=46b8c6709c&e=115bdcb0e5)
| | Dear friend,
I’m excited to be back as a special guest at Iowa’s Roast and Ride on October 11th, at the Iowa State Fairgrounds! We’ll celebrate everything we love about our state, and I’d love for you to join us in making this year’s event the best yet.This isn’t just any event. It’s a day to **honor our veterans** , **celebrate Joni Ernst’s incredible leadership** , and **send her off with the biggest show of support Iowa has ever seen**. From motorcycles to hog roasts to patriotic pride,_it’s going to be unforgettable._
---
| [Get your ticket today and make sure you’re part of this historic Iowa tradition!](https://feenstraforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8962a0f5713e141c231f4f715&id=375db50f6b&e=115bdcb0e5)
---
| | **Where:📍Elwell Family Food Center, Des Moines
****When: October 11, 2025
****Event Schedule:****🏍 Ride for Veterans: 10:00 AM (Check-in starts at 9:00 AM)****🐷 Main Event: 12:30 PM (Doors open at 11:00 AM)**
---
| [GET YOUR FREE TICKETS TODAY!](https://feenstraforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8962a0f5713e141c231f4f715&id=9daa1e5fc5&e=115bdcb0e5)
---
| | [Lastly, if you’re a motorcycle enthusiast, you can buy a ticket for $20 and participate in Joni’s final ride _**to support the Blue Star Mothers of Iowa.**_](https://feenstraforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8962a0f5713e141c231f4f715&id=a0140ec7db&e=115bdcb0e5) Can’t wait to see you at Roast and Ride soon!
Blessings,
Randy Feenstra
---
| | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR GOVERNOR
---

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

Friend,

Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie.

His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us.

And his vision — TO BUILD THE MOST FAITHFUL AND THE MOST PATRIOTIC
GENERATION IN AMERICAN HISTORY — is why Turning Point USA exists
today.

Patriot, that’s why we have an inspiring update for you...

In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us,
Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students
who want to start or join a chapter:

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

GOD IS SO GOOD. ✝️🙏🕊️

To give you perspective, friend...

Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+
college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.

It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact...
_But now? _

These students who signed up? They weren’t asked to... They
weren’t recruited...

THEY FELT IT WAS THEIR TIME TO STAND UP FOR THIS COUNTRY AND HONOR
CHARLIE.

Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed
God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And
his vision of a better America for us all.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

He always believed this day would come.

He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would
shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning
Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in
America.

And now...

_It’s happening._

Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.

And more beautiful than we can even describe.

AGAIN, FRIEND, GOD IS SO GOOD.

Since we lost Charlie, we’ve also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers.
Emails. Messages.

Stories about how Charlie’s voice changed lives... or your
children’s or grandchildren's lives.

And so many supporters have asked, _“What can I do?”_

As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up
with every chapter request.

And we’re going to need help equipping them with our activism
kits.

EVERY NEW CHAPTER RECEIVES THESE KITS FROM TURNING POINT USA WITH
EVERYTHING THEY NEED TO GET STARTED — INCLUDING:

✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear

Patriot, I’m sure you’d believe it when we say it... _this won’t
be a small task. _

But we’re going to do it. Whatever it takes. _FOR CHARLIE._

_And here’s how YOU can help with this..._

EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT — READY TO
DEPLOY INTO A NEW TURNING POINT USA STUDENT CHAPTER...

How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of
new student chapters that are just getting started?

1 KIT = $25
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

2 KITS = $50
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

10 KITS = $250
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

100 KITS = $2,500
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

1,000 KITS = $25,000
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

SPONSOR ACTIVISM KITS
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

Patriot, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make
Charlie’s vision a reality...

THIS IS IT.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70720&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70720]

Also...

HERE’S ONE MORE POWERFUL THING YOU CAN DO:

📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or
any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who
wants to join or start a chapter...

PLEASE SEND THEM THIS LINK: TPUSASTUDENTS.COM/STARTACHAPTER
[https://www.tpusastudents.com/startachapter]

Friend, if you’ve already given... If you’ve already donated...

If you’ve already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this
painful week...

If you’ve prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...

THANK YOU.

We can never say it enough.

If you’ve read this far, we want you to know this...

YOU’RE THE REASON CHARLIE’S MISSION AND VISION WILL GROW FOR
GENERATIONS TO COME.

God is so good.

FOR CHARLIE,

-The Turning Point USA Family

P.S. Please know if you can’t afford to help right now, all we ask
for are your prayers.

Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that’s all
you can give today, _we’re grateful._

But if you’re able to help... if you’re overjoyed to hear that
students are flocking to Charlie’s message and mission...

Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and
gets new student chapters off the ground floor...

And ensures Charlie’s vision is realized faster than we all thought
possible.

EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS US STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT READY TO
DEPLOY TO A NEW STUDENT CHAPTER.

SPONSOR AN ACTIVISM KIT
MAKE YOUR GIFT HERE

Thank you for your help and for your prayers.

GOD IS SO GOOD. 🙏

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=321397&trkid=941447248&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS US STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT READY TO DEPLOY TO A NEW STUDENT CHAPTER. SPONSOR AN ACTIVISM KIT MAKE YOUR GIFT HERE Thank you for your help and for your prayers. GOD IS SO GOOD. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044
