name: Voter Action Project Petitions
subject: Add your name to protect our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Donald Trump just handed control of U.S. election infrastructure to a known 2020 conspiracy theorist — and Congress is doing nothing to stop it.
Heather Honey, a far-right operative who pushed Trump’s lies about election fraud, has been appointed to a key Department of Homeland Security role overseeing how our elections are secured. She helped push sham audits, spread false claims in court, and even worked to seize voting machines in Pennsylvania . Now she’s in charge of protecting the very elections she tried to undermine.
Election officials across the country are begging for more funding to secure our voting systems — but the opponents of voting rights who control Congress refuse to act. Instead, they’re greenlighting a takeover by people who want to sabotage the next election from inside the system.
Tell Congress: Don’t let 2020 election deniers rig the 2026 elections. Block their appointments and provide funding to protect our elections and our democracy now >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
This is all part of a coordinated plan by Trump and his allies to rig the rules ahead of 2026. And with MAGA in control of Congress, they might just get away with it.
We can’t stand by and let that happen. Congress must launch an immediate investigation into Honey’s appointment and pass emergency funding to protect our elections from partisan interference. The longer they stall, the greater the risk of chaos and manipulation in 2026.
We know what Trump and his loyalists did in 2020. We saw the lies, the lawsuits, the violent attack on the Capitol. Now they’re trying again—with more power and fewer safeguards. Congress has a choice: stand up for democracy or enable its destruction.
Add your name today to demand urgent action. The integrity of our next election depends on us stepping up to defend our democracy >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092125_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092125_1&amount=20]

Block their appointments and provide funding to protect our elections and our democracy now >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] This is all part of a coordinated plan by Trump and his allies to rig the rules ahead of 2026. And with MAGA in control of Congress, they might just get away with it. We can’t stand by and let that happen. Congress must launch an immediate investigation into Honey’s appointment and pass emergency funding to protect our elections from partisan interference. The longer they stall, the greater the risk of chaos and manipulation in 2026. We know what Trump and his loyalists did in 2020. We saw the lies, the lawsuits, the violent attack on the Capitol. Now they’re trying again—with more power and fewer safeguards. Congress has a choice: stand up for democracy or enable its destruction. Add your name today to demand urgent action. The integrity of our next election depends on us stepping up to defend our democracy >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. body:
Here’s what you need to know
#

**Cook Political Report has THREE U.S. Senate races currently rated as TOSS UPS for 2026:** _Georgia. Michigan. North Carolina._
---

**Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Jon Ossoff** — _the most vulnerable Democrat in the 2026 midterm elections._ The GOP will undoubtedly do everything they can to win this seat back for a Republican. They’ll spend millions upon millions of dollars. They’ll come up with all sorts of outlandish attacks. Anything to solidify their majority in the Senate next year. **[FIGHT BACK NOW: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95642?refcode=em20250922-9459&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9459%2E614464%2ENlp0UJ)**
---

**Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Gary Peters,** who announced earlier this year that he will retire in 2026. _The good news is that Democrats currently hold every statewide seat in Michigan._ But defending this critical Democrat-held Senate seat won't be easy. _Last year, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race was one of the closest in the country._ So now, we can absolutely expect the GOP to go all-in to win this open seat. **[FIGHT BACK NOW: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95642?refcode=em20250922-9459&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9459%2E614464%2ENlp0UJ)**
---

**North Carolina’s GOP-held U.S. Senate seat is one of Democrats’ top pick-up opportunities for 2026.** We have a strong Democratic candidate in former governor Roy Cooper, who has a record of winning + delivering for the people of North Carolina. _But outside groups are already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this Senate race_ — more than a year away from the actual election! Last time we voted for governor, the race was decided by less than 2 percent of the vote. In 2017, control of the Virginia House of Delegates came down to ONE VOTE! The whole country will be tracking the results in Virginia, Derek. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between the Democratic Party of Virginia and Mark Warner: = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: We’re Feeling SUPER🦸
body:
James Gunn’s new Superman movie shows us that there are many ways to be a hero:
| | |
---
| |
---
| "Your choices, Clark. Your actions... that's what makes you who you are. I'll tell you something, son...I couldn't be more proud of you." -Pa Kent (Superman 2025)
---
| |
---
| James Gunn's new Superman movie shows us that there are many ways to be a hero: whether you're a scrappy investigative reporter, a girl taking selfies and taking down a corrupt billionaire, or a real superhero, everyone has a part to play in making the world a better place. Here at Freedom Virginia, we're doing our part by continuing to fight for affordability legislation like a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, Paid Family & Medical Leave, Affordable Housing, and a fair tax system.
We want our hardworking heroes to be able to focus on what really matters and not have to worry about keeping a roof over their family's head or putting food on the table. clean_body: Our campaign is powered by folks in Virginia and around the country pitching in a few bucks at a time. We wouldn't have it any other way. = 👋 Peter, we know you get a lot of emails, but two minutes is all we're asking for. Here's the big news: Donald Trump is now attacking Abigail directly. The President sees our momentum. It's only a matter of time until he makes a full-throated endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears and begins pouring his billion-dollar war chest into Virginia. And at this stage of the race, with early voting already underway, we can't let them get the upper hand. The truth is, our campaign is powered by folks in Virginia and around the country pitching in a few bucks at a time. We wouldn't have it any other way. But it's going to take each of us stepping up to hit our September end-of-quarter fundraising goal. And I’m looking to keep being the representative Coloradans need as the next State Treasurer. This campaign is running on issues that are most important to Coloradans, and I am committed to protecting and growing Colorado’s resources. If elected, I will fight to address challenges posed by TABOR, ensure the Public Employees’ Retirement Association (PERA) remains robust, and find new innovative ways to utilize taxpayers’ dollars more efficiently and effectively. This isn’t my first time running a campaign based on Coloradans’ needs. As a State Representative, I was able to keep my promise of putting Coloradan families first. Here are some of my victories:
* **Community Revitalization Grant Program/Tax Credits** ➡️ Helped main streets and downtown areas stay vibrant with the arts and housing

* **Public Employee Workplace Protections** ➡️ Enhanced protections for public employees by ensuring fair and safe working conditions

* **Utilization of Unused State Property for Public Benefit** ➡️ Advocated for the repurposing of unused state properties to serve our communities’ needs

* **Artificial Intelligence Regulation** ➡️ Ensures ethical and responsible use of AI technologies.

* **Limit on Rental Application Fees** ➡️ Capped rental application fees and alleviated financial burdens on prospective tenants

This race is important – the state treasurer should always put the public’s best interests first. My track record proves that I can get the job done. [**With your help, we can work together to make Colorado a better place. Donate $10 to my campaign today so that we can make history together and work to benefit all Coloradans.**](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/gZbRuyB2VqAJ23LxQEJ3YwkD-_-PK5xTj_GQgYaAz3M8JNwYW9iaHbu_J592E1wcBRsWuG6FTM1fjCn38E_oBwBDFsNPX1Sos0XVPA99nH4ynI7oIfSH4J6T5TEYG0YO25NPcAkhlRVUASSXEvZB8hnTjZD6utcAAYS_wJ7-S84a49vc5djB0or59A6554v-G2BJgOJLx8YEtS4-cVGbCoPmuu80HU6N284ysW0N18oCal87MCTXytWDzxl7d5YjVSOA1zc7YFO5-hDyag_ra6KRfURnGcH35gf7f1r5WPL59tyN1Y3zzIJ4y5_JBpmpa04_NwXzp6dpoG5MDClzN-cRZESS5cONJ3NDFFohkjl8ItD3xwIVlyDpprWUQMoIK4POqfaUyA7rAfFB_AOxdq4Q0_vsRK4Jl3yCqyaaS6bfngfxAo9BVM407ToeXpTDdWl-zBSDe0ZrKkIasWM-HEp7m7Pz91WU_-gBRm35XGbtcIhPHTetK-SvODIjZg30SQhp8rk9gn9uT-gWAnZqy9rsBSrbvuwSESQN94Tm0RtnoLPe0S5QscztRHBC8mQnyE0dZ7EjrXRfD-_LQq4C7BR9O_H5apNmifMZhpu5appseDrw0zn7LT2mOVg5xUzCXaTpmXVdsLP5SxNFEvCIXIhir48Yr1KxZANijdVRNNSEYn11MC_K7pCKiJaHPbWhZtSxqD5NeXiDRghGKn32Xauo9MtgnqotgS9HZp9amnX6YJNbmC1mIjf_eIV0MAflcClhUTnmx4ooTWeUi6hglMbmr_JB7XxNk3ma6PAL23b5pMpsgvDa566akcsXdNeWBxxTBVJFHq1J2cHJ_hjCHka6PagjQQMEvu1QQPO2ZuQaP-01BoWD7nXW5wgUap312MELcz6B6XAFVROsKfVp9Y-r0EnC-bYC5Q8a2hTdECH5ejQwWpWdKpsXnD5LLEKrGrT_aFTiAyJFWAtuU4F9Vh5L/zFuuXHg_6cXCvJGMVdgGlNEfK_56gHbF/13) Your support means everything to me, Brianna

Hi Peter, The first days of fall always bring a moment to pause to reflect on how far we’ve come, and to take a deep breath before the work ahead. The air’s getting crisper, the days a little shorter, football season is in full swing, but what doesn’t change is my belief in what’s possible when we come together to build something better. I’ve lived through both the hard parts of our history, and the extraordinary progress we’ve made. I know we still have work to do, but I also know this: we all believe in peace, in fairness, and in caring for each other. I carry that belief with me every day in Congress. I won’t pretend this work is easy, but I do believe it’s worth doing. **And no matter how divided things may seem, I still believe in the power of hope, service, and showing up for one another. ** This new season is a reminder that change is always possible, and that progress takes all of us. **[So if you’re feeling as inspired by this season of change as I am, will you consider chipping in $10 right now? We have a big end-of-quarter deadline quickly approaching and your support would go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115704844/571191553/-896270057?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_092225_FALL_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjhhODc3Zi1jYzk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TzGtmG_s_Rw-D8YvhlVTUl9Ootkae2esM_P-QkerkcQ=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: The first days of fall always bring a moment to pause to reflect on how far we’ve come, and to take a deep breath before the work ahead. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, The first days of fall always bring a moment to pause to reflect on how far we’ve come, and to take a deep breath before the work ahead. The air’s getting crisper, the days a little shorter, football season is in full swing, but what doesn’t change is my belief in what’s possible when we come together to build something better. I’ve lived through both the hard parts of our history, and the extraordinary progress we’ve made. I know we still have work to do, but I also know this: we all believe in peace, in fairness, and in caring for each other. I carry that belief with me every day in Congress. I won’t pretend this work is easy, but I do believe it’s worth doing. And no matter how divided things may seem, I still believe in the power of hope, service, and showing up for one another. This new season is a reminder that change is always possible, and that progress takes all of us. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Valerie * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: The New York Times says this race is a TOSS-UP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Making sure you didn’t miss this
_**New York Times: Tossup Race for NJ Governor Draws Big Money and a Bright Spotlight**_
With less than two months left in this campaign and mail-in ballots being received as we speak, The New York Times officially classified my race as a **TOSS-UP** , and said that _all eyes are on New Jersey._
The country is watching us — because if we win here in the Garden State and reject our MAGA opponent, we send a powerful message to the country and to the White House. **But we can only do that with your support.**
**[This is the most competitive race in the country this year, and it’s neck-and-neck. In the final stretch of this campaign, can you split a contribution between my campaign and Deb Haaland to help power my team to victory?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250922_1_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250922-4576&refcode2=4576_400544_7YJpz4&akid=4576%2E400544%2E7YJpz4)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250922_1_split?refcode=em20250922-4576&refcode2=4576_400544_7YJpz4&akid=4576%2E400544%2E7YJpz4)**
Thank you so much,
Mikie Sherrill

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump's administration is attacking the free press — again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi team, it's DSCC Vice Chair Adam Schiff. If you don't have much time, I'll keep it brief: Donald Trump and his cronies are blatantly assaulting free speech and eviscerating the First Amendment. Jimmy Kimmel is just the latest example -- but he won't be the last.

Trump is trying to build a country where if you criticize him or MAGA, _the government will come after you_ , no matter who you are and what you do for a living.

**[That's why I've come to personally ask: Will you send $5 to the DSCC to elect Senate Democrats who will hold Trump accountable for his attacks on the First Amendment?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21879?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250922-AdamSchiff-SchiffKimmelFreedomofPressFRRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250922-AdamSchiff-SchiffKimmelFreedomofPressFRRR-Pros-sl1&akid=21278%2E9716520%2E5Qu6W8)**

| | [DONATE $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21879?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250922-AdamSchiff-SchiffKimmelFreedomofPressFRRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250922-AdamSchiff-SchiffKimmelFreedomofPressFRRR-Pros-sl1&akid=21278%2E9716520%2E5Qu6W8)
---

You saw the news:**Jimmy Kimmel was taken off the air after Donald Trump's FCC demanded he be punished for comments made during a comedic monologue.**

But make no mistake: This is an escalating and accelerating trend. Before his cronies got Jimmy pulled down, Trump sued numerous news outlets like CBS, ABC, The New York Times and The Wall Street Journal, and he aggressively _defunded_ NPR and PBS. He's even called for journalists and critics to be _prosecuted_ , just for telling the truth about him.

You might remember that **I'm one of those critics** Trump is threatening to jail -- and the list of others is long and growing.

**There is simply no limit to what Trump and his allies are willing to do to silence his critics, stop accountability and punish free speech.**

The only way we can safeguard the First Amendment is by standing strong and holding Trump accountable -- and to do that, we MUST take back the Senate from his enablers.

**[As a DSCC Vice Chair, I'm personally calling on Democrats at this critical moment: Will you donate $5 to the DSCC to help us elect Senate Democrats who will speak out against Trump's attacks on our democracy and fight to protect our rights?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21879?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250922-AdamSchiff-SchiffKimmelFreedomofPressFRRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250922-AdamSchiff-SchiffKimmelFreedomofPressFRRR-Pros-sl1&akid=21278%2E9716520%2E5Qu6W8)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | | Hi team, it's DSCC Vice Chair Adam Schiff. If you don't have much time, I'll keep it brief: Donald Trump and his cronies are blatantly assaulting free speech and eviscerating the First Amendment. Jimmy Kimmel is just the latest example -- but he won't be the last. Trump is trying to build a country where if you criticize him or MAGA, the government will come after you , no matter who you are and what you do for a living. | | You saw the news:Jimmy Kimmel was taken off the air after Donald Trump's FCC demanded he be punished for comments made during a comedic monologue. But make no mistake: This is an escalating and accelerating trend. Before his cronies got Jimmy pulled down, Trump sued numerous news outlets like CBS, ABC, The New York Times and The Wall Street Journal, and he aggressively defunded NPR and PBS. He's even called for journalists and critics to be prosecuted , just for telling the truth about him. You might remember that I'm one of those critics Trump is threatening to jail -- and the list of others is long and growing. There is simply no limit to what Trump and his allies are willing to do to silence his critics, stop accountability and punish free speech. The only way we can safeguard the First Amendment is by standing strong and holding Trump accountable -- and to do that, we MUST take back the Senate from his enablers. We need your help to fight for the Senate. subject: BREAKING: GOP is recruiting John E. Sununu

body:
This is urgent, Peter.
It’s Andy here — I founded In This Together PAC to help elect good Democratic candidates in tough races across the country. My friend Chris Pappas is running for the U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. Please read his message below and consider donating whatever you can!

Thank you for everything.

Andy
* * *
Peter, Chris Pappas here.

**National Republicans are recruiting John E. Sununu for U.S. Senate here in NH — and I need you to know what that means.**

Sununu represented New Hampshire in Congress nearly twenty years ago. And throughout his time in DC, he put special interests ahead of Granite Staters every chance he got.

**_His record speaks for itself_ — he voted against lowering drug prices, repeatedly voted to restrict abortion access, and led efforts to privatize Social Security.**

And what has he done since leaving office? Joined a lobbying firm that represented corporate special interests. Now he’s national Republicans’ handpicked candidate for this race. With name recognition like his, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment.

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie answered the call. Now I will too.
body:
I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26b59b3beb9b4249b1977931060fb27d&_e=nuhaeBA8fHx2KLKO0u4-Gsj1orkdAONWgoMkb-1L8DFEXbt8R4rjSU7-OvsmBmwCp52imfR5XmVJ7tnTWS_EikSdLt_gh6mml1BWvmKKod98uvzlg26OSGcUeJ4dHx0r6FJQfyUqpnzPwD42i6RaW3Dh-B1V4F8CHsjm0eX0Xo4DitJW6Mw33_q9MssXL2OnYXduOP_wX34dwBtRideh-1fqY2FFKlUOZnklwjEgwV2QFGS8fv-joU5_Q3QdLuSlw1W-7cmhRE0FnWsUSyaTHwQpyhSB103oaQ3botFTd5oenEi_Oy0Olj6m-S2VOB2zb9jvqgwyOfirA7HTBNwvwHNm5JvedOLWzbF6uiu80WAWzZwTySVn1b9U1DnAOkx8s07mA-GlyaH_2YnaB-TGrbKJRwy5eVdUidPNfkXS3P0To-LBqsIMVbkejcJ8bgiGCp4y6BPUiPXpL7toV9DYPSXvCdw_7cRwv-b3XqJZ-5KS9nI6ew6LOm89ZeDicUB1wF9MK7UOCg3Y4wjvH14uz7XItdcOSLJM0xgL7B8m_Bx3JkdSSV8O4Gx_vpU6_PlDJjFaodZLkn-ACFIT8r_FV2f9uu6JvGIZPphEXx5wsoUBVQpn2fQYqBRvunOiGM88P3TPRL4B2mDPoQW3CDqxMuJVEghTaQN9YNNRf_ngFlEreRIFv9RJ5PNSgQ6656MBuZ0Bla9S3AftdBANwQDtEw%3D%3D)
Peter,

I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26b59b3beb9b4249b1977931060fb27d&_e=nuhaeBA8fHx2KLKO0u4-Gsj1orkdAONWgoMkb-1L8DFEXbt8R4rjSU7-OvsmBmwCp52imfR5XmVJ7tnTWS_EikSdLt_gh6mml1BWvmKKod98uvzlg26OSGcUeJ4dHx0r6FJQfyUqpnzPwD42i6RaW3Dh-B1V4F8CHsjm0eX0Xo4DitJW6Mw33_q9MssXL2OnYXduOP_wX34dwBtRideh-1fqY2FFKlUOZnklwjEgwV2QFGS8fv-joU5_Q3QdLuSlc1AWQTlE6wVc1Qqnnlm0OJLq1YX0fxVrK4jayR6jLVml4hDwFfQbyugbFbmiJOhQrRRpk1-k3UAJ8hV3Au5basA0qrZgvWpB5TyEgpgV5VjV1OQA1NncRzhQe5H2uJsSnOKzJ7LFJ-u8n_D5Cd0Mkga7GBT23aQionUYrr5OUMJmvLgAGrWKjQlAGG1ntKZLnMsKAR0Rs-5ux03v8_eE3HJF8WaSvfq4kkONXwpJ8go9BYT-usr8JvzXMKaidJ02fm8eoB_46SFowgIzpDk6MMBRdNVM4iX-8DP4fbvstnOv3JvIES9Vhtl0RNR2onobdJwnDnbuPqftc5FeZ0Yo9w8rgfhycDiTfHZevyr2_-Xqe63Naqyb19QO0y-ommRWDePNA5cotZOAzVyoNkbPiWGjcUyfFxHtD3LnmeQcmsuH5oTwC7iSmBMm9eON02N3hXXURFnjsDmlVoTdIt1wTQ%3D%3D)
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Peter. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26b59b3beb9b4249b1977931060fb27d&_e=nuhaeBA8fHx2KLKO0u4-Gsj1orkdAONWgoMkb-1L8DFEXbt8R4rjSU7-OvsmBmwCp52imfR5XmVJ7tnTWS_EikSdLt_gh6mml1BWvmKKod98uvzlg26OSGcUeJ4dHx0r6FJQfyUqpnzPwD42i6RaW3Dh-B1V4F8CHsjm0eX0Xo4DitJW6Mw33_q9MssXL2OnYXduOP_wX34dwBtRideh-1fqY2FFKlUOZnklwjEgwV2QFGS8fv-joU5_Q3QdLuSluGDh4bdkn_XqZ-HLtZ6Ts-pf6pl5gY-HHN1fzZJ1x9LEXhf-p8WXednm5guIiI70-nQefhp30lq68Bdb_EQoS1zTzZy-aTpy8u8bcxsY1DDLOUmxuZRB-J_5wRHrZMt5bv0fPVldywYBtzGQuW0YnqwuGjD12IVvkO6mMTdbj50i7wZS5uOg4tAz0iIwn2zgjacaO02EZRhCtcDl-3QQm8eihEC43YPAN5Qg69fkBEz7yyGlgLK2Cc8siUyatpiRVaAi65cavR5MZlt5bieSWArKAp9eX9HLuwO4cEaAwfvCPnxhUsxzh-CtmP4O-qnt3CS-c5L0Lv_x-1IvLSAaXih4ht0Uzs6uH3YUaH6I26HvpHO-dqtT39hi6kaW5wMTOyHB-VGq0jPeQWLxLekxz74OgXglwW5zUV5hpo3wHaSF_GZVIJDBM6g_tO4uP06Il62FXXmHC6UvokhHEimKxA%3D%3D)
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Peter. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26b59b3beb9b4249b1977931060fb27d&_e=nuhaeBA8fHx2KLKO0u4-Gsj1orkdAONWgoMkb-1L8DFEXbt8R4rjSU7-OvsmBmwCp52imfR5XmVJ7tnTWS_EikSdLt_gh6mml1BWvmKKod98uvzlg26OSGcUeJ4dHx0r6FJQfyUqpnzPwD42i6RaW3Dh-B1V4F8CHsjm0eX0Xo4DitJW6Mw33_q9MssXL2OnYXduOP_wX34dwBtRideh-1fqY2FFKlUOZnklwjEgwV2QFGS8fv-joU5_Q3QdLuSlXlkXv5SUcjuV0WgRtQmgOtShvO4Mf21sDKEjW1iwbtvu7ooArxIHAnOG5qbmnOea_MJMdH41ZzsYGkGO9D6sBrBu7Zuh_AyD8U1Pa83evanBGUOO253zqDogEs1AvvA6I3QFuXJfvXBhouKy6iQsJmL11CIIr-XeU9B-hfTBA44LUvQCS4l9zmylHk48PvV6-LU9NaoAvyxeXeyEB4mACzw09VbfClulodwyz7YoYVVjV-ipAi5fQcJvRLwLNpHJt8PgsDJBynvJsSMf7cMJeft4X6STR8NevYameeOPkqHcuuLs8LUJoWsRjNzuyCxf6AfLmd48drcJULzCHwNg2Inl4lax-0ZepSZVoB-cZaATJfoKPlxxiP6KGCdttddVQoeFssBLdyozBsBOSyFk-ErLXFJekVWpcOH0bIVF8vSA9SpIhWn4KUIsPau7kmk86z1rgYgwW7WUXgZcEqHCBw%3D%3D)
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_

_**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Peter.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board
Turning Point USA

[ _**Support Turning Point USA**_ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26b59b3beb9b4249b1977931060fb27d&_e=nuhaeBA8fHx2KLKO0u4-Gsj1orkdAONWgoMkb-1L8DFEXbt8R4rjSU7-OvsmBmwCp52imfR5XmVJ7tnTWS_EikSdLt_gh6mml1BWvmKKod98uvzlg26OSGcUeJ4dHx0r6FJQfyUqpnzPwD42i6RaW3Dh-B1V4F8CHsjm0eX0Xo4DitJW6Mw33_q9MssXL2OnYXduOP_wX34dwBtRideh-1fqY2FFKlUOZnklwjEgwV2QFGS8fv-joU5_Q3QdLuSlnQkEqfOKGE0DPWTPkRXKgldCSZ_AuBc5p1t3T1SX5_3Hh0Qa-9Xw5PPVRovZKxBChc8NN6ckZgvVY9e3QdqyFUvQ0Qu4mrumb2_L3DZj4QCpiRfawgalBolxSkRexL-BeULaAuSrXWwFV96sd6vTD9TgOkagAAOAZULSOxgoRqm2gDPHWwXbPZ4To0OKb5fXIZL2Zbr_A-OgTEQCHDyWgpzLHccBoqNc2kUqRn9MJKuagiIdpz88UJ929mXi-E4iOG0SMSElhaKhr2ZXruG1dPfV2OtYcnCT7WXvvG7u34-UkQ2l6KrOgwCTGJee53zDKwZY2gdO7JSeeVEnR2qFzUE1PtNdgxq-rDGiPrwDBlzFUtbd5l19cZYa18UIF-4euoi48Jzpzhtx5YEirgMA8LWrm4365iHjV3MJPdSEnU1QDDwTpUBsEM8NWEVvfo43fVegxZQkCS14zTRimKNXNw%3D%3D)
**P.S.** Peter, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Peter, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26b59b3beb9b4249b1977931060fb27d&_e=nuhaeBA8fHx2KLKO0u4-Gsj1orkdAONWgoMkb-1L8DFEXbt8R4rjSU7-OvsmBmwCp52imfR5XmVJ7tnTWS_EikSdLt_gh6mml1BWvmKKod98uvzlg26OSGcUeJ4dHx0r6FJQfyUqpnzPwD42i6RaW3Dh-B1V4F8CHsjm0eX0Xo4DitJW6Mw33_q9MssXL2OnYXduOP_wX34dwBtRideh-1fqY2FFKlUOZnklwjEgwV2QFGS8fv-joU5_Q3QdLuSlDwQ2Rc_1UAqZwS48onb3r8jwb6h7uOf26PVkddeb-_LWANx6WLlUW4EP15v86onUNHw0cvaXqF_PtNHT59bokviwOW3nX5sfx1gFM0am5mDNAEQq1d5FJDFDjuUBmgQZJrCLSB8SuscO4_byQNsjdx23505Mn-wcz44Q6DHm0LofUxFWTU82yUIK1lM-96m3Mvl9tkKGpSGm49zut91mUN0QSgY80aZMCfmrSWIat5o-k71lswmbolHKEovKJwm6MD4NUoIsFDOy2yd1OcEq6rZrlXfL2J7z_d93doRp0LhebLay9nPzfskVqKpI9OF_sU5dpYYy-Lrpu945dGcYv0ZAIJhJBLsXhIk9AO_2FRnyX3oY3btU3-iQmCiYhopC0EWFm90MN535TIVSvm4j7s1RKXK82YEIZ7Kbzh9mU6DoFLYrcAVmlP7GSfYMYsNGLazQJdJ_Ep4_t3klFIyrlg%3D%3D)
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Peter, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Peter, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
[ **Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=26b59b3beb9b4249b1977931060fb27d&_e=nuhaeBA8fHx2KLKO0u4-Gsj1orkdAONWgoMkb-1L8DFEXbt8R4rjSU7-OvsmBmwCp52imfR5XmVJ7tnTWS_EikSdLt_gh6mml1BWvmKKod98uvzlg26OSGcUeJ4dHx0r6FJQfyUqpnzPwD42i6RaW3Dh-B1V4F8CHsjm0eX0Xo4DitJW6Mw33_q9MssXL2OnYXduOP_wX34dwBtRideh-1fqY2FFKlUOZnklwjEgwV2QFGS8fv-joU5_Q3QdLuSlmCKLZj5khZbwrVD-VqC9Qf9qVaVJPqSQ8DGw4u3F_OY9kmYYy1j8NWyW-KP_jdleR1wz6FRsXZ5igz6y9GwE-AWm-wHhQTnGPJZBPPLvZajg78BGJIsNCfzPZuHU4QZm8c0DMdh-fYQ7qwDzgRO_jtF0-jHKi5nybrtea08q28hq1hRLXb3ofzDGfrF1LwCUzORHOvnvYe_6RP9apa3lEOxoCKN5P-8PaDK_e9kiHsLDG1Vty5Qw6ATCm8WU2xmjCc-kO5Soo-DwQkKbZcE_EgCCLVtsVGJwqiXWz5enctJUEd3sdd9cMNaoP6zNv3Y8fhIuDt7y14iuf3I2aqzE7p53TmiuHyZlBiScOuoNJiPzNT9AMFmlbzcTypqndCyZNiqxSK6SzPmvExIdOmcW6wiZZmppvw5Bc4zI7jKThVfK7QZoaohSqz9yjKHnvRV9hpnI0Q4vwWXlahA7iiY1Ag%3D%3D)

name: Dexter HQ
subject: The GOP is forcing a government shutdown

body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hey there Peter,
We’re facing a government shutdown because Republicans won’t keep their hands off our health care.
Earlier this summer, the Republicans passed their Big, Ugly Betrayal, which risks the health care of millions of Americans, could shutter many rural hospitals, clinics, and nursing homes, and slashes funding from essential programs like SNAP, which helps feed hungry children.
Then, the Democrats in the House and Senate—like Dr. Maxine Dexter— demanded that the GOP restore Medicaid cuts and extend subsidies from the Affordable Care Act.
Now, Republicans are willing to shut down the government rather than let Americans get the care and support they deserve. They want us too sick, poor, and hungry to stand up to their cruel policies.
The only way to protect our families, communities, and future is to take back the House and the Senate. Every dollar helps. Can we count on you to rush what you can today to support leaders like Dr. Maxine Dexter, who are fighting for our families? name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Our love story
body:
| | |
---
Patriot, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Patriot.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Patriot.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Patriot.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**P.S.** Patriot, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Patriot, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Patriot, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Patriot, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work. | Email is a really important way that grassroots campaigns can actually win: we have power when we use technology to organize a large group of people. If you were forwarded this email and would like to subscribe Our email sending software likes it when we have "clicks", but we don't always ask you to click a donation link. We understand that email can be overwhelming. If you only want to receive the most important emails, click . If you're really just sick of every email, click and you'll be unsubscribed! | Democratic leaders are abandoning us. Our District deserves a fighter in Congress — someone who shows her constituents every day that she is doing everything possible to stop the authoritarian takeover of the United States. Kat has fought fascists before as a citizen, union rep, and independent journalist. Now, she's going to do the same in Congress. Let's win this together. | | Paid for by Kat for Illinois

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Calling All Golfers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Charity Golf Tournament Next Friday!

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,
Grab your clubs and join us for a great day on the course! The **Rotary Club of Greater Salem, NH** is excited to host their **11th Annual Golf Tournament** and I’d love to see you there.
📅 **Date:** Friday, October 3, 2025
📍 **Location:** Windham Country Club at 1 Country Club Dr, Windham, NH 03087
⏰ **Schedule:**
* 6:30 AM – Registration & Breakfast
* 8:00 AM – Shotgun Start

💵 **Cost:** $150 per Golfer
🏆 **Format:** Scramble | Cash Prizes
Proceeds from this tournament support Rotary’s vital work in our community, including:
* Combating food insecurity
* Supporting children’s literacy
* Providing home heating assistance
* Funding local scholarships

👉 Register today at [www.birdease.com/NHRotaryGolf](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.birdease.com%2FNHRotaryGolf/1/010001997241782a-8df944b5-cc3c-4955-9743-e02e9a8a7e00-000000/WtbHtlkexj7gx-BCT1JD2UyqVWQ=444).
Whether you’re a seasoned golfer or just love the game, this is a fun way to make an impact while enjoying a day with friends. Gather your foursome or sign up individually today!
We look forward to seeing you on the course.
Warm regards,
Rep. Joe Sweeney

It's time to protect our children, defend the family, and fight back against those who would destroy the innocence of the next generation. [PROTECT THE KIDS ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zauneuks7ohs7n3jpguuotv3tdkgpmd26mdrbt3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sljmco30c3h2bs)

🗣️ CALL this what it is -- a crisis, not a lifestyle.

clean_body: Peter, the USPS is under attack. Add your name now >> | | There are two clear possibilities here: Option 1: We do nothing and allow MAGA Republicans to gut a critical public service that is critical to democracy. Option 2: We fight back to protect USPS offices, postal workers, and the millions of Americans who rely on the USPS to mail-in vote, receive medication, and pay critical bills. House Democrats are demanding answers and pushing legislation to protect the USPS from partisan sabotage. But we need a surge of grassroots support to show the American people are watching and ready to fight! — Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Friends, Donald Trump has officially crossed the line. **This weekend, he publicly called on his Attorney General, Pam Bondi, to prosecute his political opponents.** He didn't hold back. In a Truth Social rant, he demanded prosecutions of Adam Schiff, James Comey, and Letitia James,_all of whom investigated his corruption._

This isn't how democracy works. This is how authoritarians rule. This is about raw power and the destruction of the rule of law. **We cannot let Trump normalize the prosecution of political opponents in America. And while Americans struggle, Congress is handing over its power to Trump — blocking any chance to stop his reckless trade agenda. But it doesn’t have to be this way. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: This is very personal to me – I’m only sharing it with close friends.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
That includes you, of course.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
## **MESSAGE FROM**
## **PRESIDENT TRUMP:**

Friend,
Since the day I returned to the White House, I have felt the mighty hand of God guiding this movement. His Word reminds us: **__“If God is for us, who can be against us?”__**
The enemies of freedom thought they could break us with lies, with courts, with endless persecution – but they were WRONG.
Our strength does not come from man. It comes from the LORD. Always has. Always will.
As we move toward the 250th day of my presidency, I can tell you this: the fight to restore America’s foundation of FAITH, FAMILY, and FREEDOM is just beginning.
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
The early patriots faced impossible odds, but they stood together. We must do the same. United by prayer. United by conviction.
So here’s the deal. I need you NOW.
**_[Please, if you can afford it, chip in and show the Radical Left that we will NEVER surrender. And together, with God, we’ll RESTORE the values that made America GREAT.>>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
And remember this – when you give, you are not just contributing to a political cause. You are sowing a SEED OF FAITH into the future of our Nation.
The Bible tells us faith as small as a mustard seed can move mountains. And together, our faith will move America back to GOD. Back to TRUTH. Back to GREATNESS.
[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
But if you cannot give right now, I want you to know this: your PRAYERS, your FAITH, your SUPPORT are worth more than all the gold in the world.
With God as our refuge, and with YOU by my side, we will SAVE AMERICA.
Thank you and may God bless you,
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Donald John Trump
[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Nancy Dahlstrom
subject: A quick update from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P
body:
Please take a moment to catch up!| | | _Unsubscribe_
---
---
Dear Peter, It’s an honor to serve as your Lt. Governor, and I’m thankful for the trust you’ve placed in me. Throughout my time as Lt. Governor, I have always fought for your interests, and I remain laser-focused on continuing that work. You can count on me to continue working hard every day to ensure that the many voices of our small business owners, energy workers, fishermen, tourist industry, families, veterans, service men and women, and rural community members are heard. I’d like to give you a quick update on the last few months and the coming ones. The legislative session concluded in May, and I spent the summer talking with fellow Alaskans, listening to their concerns, and addressing issues important to our great state. Here’s a quick look at what I’ve been up to: 1\. I had the pleasure of speaking at the 2025 Alaska Sustainable Energy Conference, and I was able to meet three members of President Trump’s cabinet who were in attendance. I discussed ways that Alaska can continue to lead the nation in energy production and help return our country to energy independence.
---
---
2\. (I was really excited for this one!) I was honored to be invited and to speak at the 2025 Alaska Flag Day celebration hosted by the AK Child & Family organization in July. AK Child & Family is a wonderful organization dedicated to providing quality care for children and families in need.
---
---
3. In August, I finally got my hands on delicious kourabiedes cookies at the 2025 Alaska Greek Fest and spent time on the water at the 2025 Kenai River Classic. I even kissed this salmon for good luck!
---
| |
---
|
---
| | As we move into fall, I look forward to making an exciting announcement soon! I want to make sure your information is up to date so you don’t miss any important communications or updates from me. Please take a moment to update it by clicking [_**here**_](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=12188d78d1aa489e819ec050712da910&_e=yTwoEvUZ1M5H16ZngVgZO9uio29CCc3Y2NVPSuJ-K0TYEvPSK-gfSWTXolejhZ4RrbF4vaSs3hiShYuEcm58OsR1OoTHRdK3yXWShhiEQOXcAWysFk3pfNzyee4Gpp01Y4xFU-kajbr4LXxww9XUWUolKXtar466AzzeWlH8hL2m3Dm45bkjqWPLm1bTNcZ63RsGERrX60sjGQPhNUK6aSPxkyJBd0PL-X4WOhqfBBsHGL6mjmu7Ih3DTyI63ENNeTZgmkXDgw68dUILAa93JyC4pB_4mvP48elaX7CFj-Ia2_7eL9CWm4zGc8zshIeFxXySOj3vnDYy8qV92stGow%3D%3D). Thank you for taking a moment to catch up with me. If you have any questions at all, please feel free to respond to this email. Your friend,
---
---
**Nancy Dahlstrom**
---
---
_P.S. Please take a moment to follow my social media channels so you don't miss even more from me!_
---

clean_body: Our finance team is racing against our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Our records indicate that you haven't yet contributed to our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. We've checked all active donor lists, and your name is still missing! | Fellow American, My finance team is racing against our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. | Fellow American, this deadline is critical, and I'm not just saying that to sound urgent or invoke fear. It's critical because I have a radical Leftist opponent who has gained national grassroots support from Democrats. They hate that President Donald J. Trump has endorsed my campaign repeatedly, so from Hollywood celebrities to small-dollar donors in Blue states like New York and California, Liberal donors are stepping up in a major way for my opponent. Millions of dollars have already been raised against me. Fellow American - your support could make all the difference here. Thank you, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

clean_body: | Fellow American, Your name came up today during a meeting with Chairman Tim Scott and our NRSC leadership team. We were reviewing the progress of the , and saw your name on the list of Republican patriots who haven't responded yet. That caught our attention because we know you're someone who cares deeply about the future of our party and our country. Your response will directly shape our agenda and our fight to defend our Senate majority. | | All we hear is how AI will revolutionize the world. But who will reap the benefits? The corporate elite and the Silicon Valley oligarchs aren’t concerned about you or your job. In fact, one CEO recently predicted half of entry-level white-collar jobs will be gone in the next 5 years. And to them, that’s a good thing. **[[RUSH A DONATION >>> HOLD SILICON VALLEY ACCOUNTABLE]](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/7yGXphdjT9Mg66qHITHfH2qvoa6e8Q3NTL0SyF2zNGfoilX59SbxYDhQxUXWwRgX7vqXyfeoi783kcV-7cn7FuovOBAaKSATw0vJxzcrhWhGokXuXNdBfNeMwczKeS7mMX4M7HRs7kOVGKaZwc_l1LGnBzQ-0RLNokfvPkaruqaf9v8lJQj1qTP8dvX10F-q44Sh6RymMK_vw6qBzd_vsW8RJ4u4l2gh6QgPP8eJLaO6UQZVJ5R9W0CdwEp0HfiERjV_-2MW4GO9C7_xDX930hhplRV3FCmyowgw8B75S1qUh-DwwOrBV0RS3IuY_46LlEgIGGYjL3D3Bt3UUD1Hwo42p2Sk5jtocz04BvczPfkf3n8kwB9uh9ubS5El9qoe6emJpjEVl7qQZQz1nf6S2-zIGNl7MxXHcnBQYNrKrIZ4LbXWFfGXWksdqNjIkk60vMhuu75czNJzmMyojU9536X1lVSPcXFg2CfrrTQnhfHL7VUCJC6G5CqNejL_MD5uGLA9YmCr7f51ADEijOw59cgT5IBTwOU_-ItNRosRRwO714D_GqIroKfGlQ/FeCJVrV92KXkqs3bD2ewEoVW1UQiWOIP/13)** Profit over people is the mantra of Silicon Valley. The technology coming out is not advancing society; it’s regressing it. That shiny new smartphone? It’s designed to addict our kids. Social media? Every click, pause, and purchase is tracked and sold to the highest bidder. [_**[RUSH A DONATION >>> PROTECT OUR CHILDREN]**_](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/FZQ5MqG79-NOGjLOiOS-6uSlZUYYnoSnyF1yuAIoNhIwLwdctCtFcfbQqT3eKM1L8WzBQ9jMGgNILybaq8x7MypadLUcG4CvZbtOc-y_w7ZM-vN7L0UrOzT8ieW7_DX8gpZUOo4TxRmb7MDtf3ped7mjMaLfOlxw_Cq8CkjQ2dQP5ZzVl_M3UKnexdMJcc1DwSky4vuDNAICX5NB67B2g-3pQj0lV4hlzBYa7_rqN5wFYXSe-oANE5LGeC9OxPt0VNbMkz2yBcPJlCUGw7IAF831fjnK72Gj_UFvMR42-qqj_pbASLWnd2E9NuIzfFkN-RnVkguodGdfY11mjxsdi3pezH2xHeQgQghXnpTeK9fs4DD1d8lZ_iqFa0UcaKonHKBwkYiNgnKrgzZXfHRu-0-b-bz_48hOnDk0LE18YI2FC4E67mqKR5GyO7EpXABhtjVMBC0idg7solls-gFtOCkM1qsiNXRytWxxpZUgqoymFnjqqfHB9LW5EliPabQaCvGm5uLiwvv-HzYZfKoI_pdGchgPKtVrikgaDAfZCtwteRJwFNNxTE-tzA/399U1yReufJWpFsTvL8WO_tJ07VS4ruE/13) _**The stakes couldn’t be higher:**_
* AI-powered robots threaten to automate entire industries.
* Over 3.5 million trucking jobs wiped out with self-driving vehicles.
* Delivery drivers, taxi workers, and customer service reps—eliminated in the name of “efficiency.”
* Millions of entry-level jobs—gone overnight.

This isn’t progress. It’s the destruction of the working class. And I won’t stand idly by while the backbone of our economy and the backbone of our community are hung out to dry. [_**[RUSH A DONATION >>> FIGHT FOR WORKERS]**_](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/uab7NzdUClsi8J_sYAxegMIbyqTzBYCBAIb4qM6So8JfhNLVcCXJGjZ_zIiBEJSuKoO1QV9AfkoK1ynVPUK0X927N-tmcnja2pgOGls6M0DkmQyeOM9yllSbAigNBQIocD0hdxQJdadvVJcUvROwe51rm-XVRMGOne4y4CaHpmESV7KIoz5gK5HuNTj7vFy-46YD6WI-AewM8PMDXHYx2Di_2wLpIAVm8m5t62p1PBkRRlBufEh_4fZIxksKYLJsERCc6rnGhdW-ZKP8MOh4-es7rWjgLNalgLB21MU0oyZ66dezMEkET-I3B_WmMQDN8IatZtGNqk5bJhAXq2oVj4F5-Ps8XjAGEEe8k8kQOwOqhFETmFUzBDwiwK5TVpqwtMwIcnoqosShriDednYYAtf33LCVmouj_9j_H4i7K8Z6RsQck21XsN5kSqiZfyiFgxZ2Myzu-IgHq-pMk8W61p_8n6wIN-LlJVOy4WsIM2tpworjkeSMWOKb-eO7fa5y3lPxC24rKdA1WHi2Nj7EUs7k3O3xaUj-B2bq0QsHJ3nu68Q473DUEVpU1w/zlluEpLJ3sUJGtPgjwKRTehP5GOvQlqE/13)

clean_body: | | | | | | | All we hear is how AI will revolutionize the world. But who will reap the benefits? The corporate elite and the Silicon Valley oligarchs aren’t concerned about you or your job. In fact, one CEO recently predicted half of entry-level white-collar jobs will be gone in the next 5 years. And to them, that’s a good thing. [[RUSH A DONATION >>> HOLD SILICON VALLEY ACCOUNTABLE]]() Profit over people is the mantra of Silicon Valley. The technology coming out is not advancing society; it’s regressing it. That shiny new smartphone? It’s designed to addict our kids. Social media? Every click, pause, and purchase is tracked and sold to the highest bidder. [[RUSH A DONATION >>> PROTECT OUR CHILDREN]]() The stakes couldn’t be higher: AI-powered robots threaten to automate entire industries. Over 3.5 million trucking jobs wiped out with self-driving vehicles. Delivery drivers, taxi workers, and customer service reps—eliminated in the name of “efficiency.” Millions of entry-level jobs—gone overnight. This isn’t progress. It’s the destruction of the working class. And I won’t stand idly by while the backbone of our economy and the backbone of our community are hung out to dry. [[RUSH A DONATION >>> FIGHT FOR WORKERS]]() | | In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | | | |

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Will you join us to stand up against President Trump?
body:
https://www.nokings.org/?SQF_SOURCE=lcv [https://www.nokings.org/?SQF_SOURCE=lcv]
Hi Peter,
President Donald Trump is acting like a dictator: abducting immigrants, occupying cities, weakening our environmental protections, gutting healthcare and education, silencing voters, and rewarding billionaires while working families struggle. For the past nine months, OLCV along with the Conservation Voters Movement (CVM) have resisted against this would-be-King, and now we’re asking you to join us.
On October 18, communities across the nation will rise up again at No Kings 2 [https://www.nokings.org/?SQF_SOURCE=lcv] to make clear to President Trump that in this country, we don't have kings or wannabe dictators. We will come together with one clear message: America belongs to us. No Kings. No Crowns. No Thrones. No Dictators! We need you in the fight. Will you show up? [https://www.nokings.org/?SQF_SOURCE=lcv]
Find an event near you [https://www.nokings.org/?SQF_SOURCE=lcv#map]
No Kings is a peaceful movement of millions of Americans from all walks of life rising up to make it clear: We don’t do dictators or kings in America. We never will. We’re organizing and taking action to defend each other and our communities, demand dignity, and say enough to all of the Trump administration’s power grabs. Millions of us took to the streets in June, and we’re doing it again on Saturday, October 18.
To get involved, go NoKings.org [https://www.nokings.org/?SQF_SOURCE=lcv] to find an event in your area. Make sure to also search the website for other helpful resources like virtual safety trainings and messaging toolkits to inform others in your community on social media. We can’t hold Trump accountable if we’re not united together. Thank you for supporting us on October 18 and beyond because this isn’t a moment, it’s a movement!
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=qEK2I1vU2GZWGW9%2F7T%2ByySRN%2BFwg3OThsp5%2BwYm0mjdZU4DUGdM5pIwd%2FGyjR43mbeB6XUM3woSpd9I6xN%2BaEdy%2FfS7HqPB6SrjuWYozoIGrXs2ua0qK0A9F9BYFF%2BznwdlHO4X8GAnph5thxuMeApDK0SuNCMTsR5uvZyrvj3nWr1DBvjzvnHzeR7s33NIC29BXegOMo9AUnhrfq9e9sl7pfHF94gOyzLMLCLjHQIwGtxQcvWky5Ds09OqQn27Oc4QCRFHMnQSngZ1hzCw1T3CMeij9NtIXaD6VA2qX6EfkcdSWcgly76WDJIT1zJxfVuBfZJ5YLuUK7qbb8E4wyqymss0e%2F1ZpIB%2BkoVotBgNNIm37w9eoruCK96QGAw2NZf8mAISkbJrumYTkPmSzzz%2FdDaOegnW9Pxp4Ix5xKak%3D .

---

I spent a good chunk of this weekend arguing with conservative pundits and influencers about the assassination of Melissa Hortman. And far too many of them are still denying the objective truth: she was murdered by a radicalized Republican who hated abortion. Melissa's assailant had a hit list of pro-choice Democratic legislators he planned to kill. But because he was once reappointed to a bipartisan committee by Tim Walz, the right has spun up a conspiracy theory that Walz himself ordered the hit on Hortman and others.
What it has me reflecting on this morning is just how morally bankrupt and untethered from reality the MAGA movement has become. They've fused Donald Trump and their media ecosystem into a single source--not just of information, but of morality. And I want to connect the dots here, because this is part of a much larger sickness.
**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/9b7bdc59-292f-4687-b5b5-3e5db311c77b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/9b7bdc59-292f-4687-b5b5-3e5db311c77b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's start with Tom Homan, the White House border czar. Over the weekend, we found out he accepted a $50,000 cash bribe from undercover FBI agents. Now, it's not the GOP's fault that Homan was corrupt and dumb enough to take it--but it _is_ their responsibility to investigate. Especially since it's on tape. But Trump, Pam Bondi, and Kash Patel killed the investigation. Why? Because they need Homan. He's central to their campaign of fear and cruelty toward immigrants. And what was conservative media's response? A bunch of pathetic excuses to reframe the narrative and morally justify blatant corruption.
They claimed the deep state made him take the bribe. Megyn Kelly straight-up said she didn't care because she hates immigrants. Some claimed he wasn't officially in office yet, so it somehow doesn't matter. It's absurd. The FBI did solid work here--you can bet that $50,000 wasn't the first time he got dirty--and the MAGA crowd is defending it because Trump said it's okay. So it's okay.
Same thing with the Epstein cover-up. They used to scream about releasing the Epstein files, exposing elite pedophiles. It was maybe the one thing I agreed with them on! Then, the moment Trump, Bondi, and Patel said "nah," every conservative influencer fell in line. Suddenly it's a hoax. A nothingburger. Why? Because the cult leader said so.
Same with the economy. Trump's out here telling people everything's cheaper, the job market is booming--total fiction. Anybody managing a household budget or trying to get a job knows it. And they're hiding the latest inflation report, which was supposed to drop Friday. You know why: the numbers must be brutal, and they contradict Trump's fantasy version of reality.
**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/9b7bdc59-292f-4687-b5b5-3e5db311c77b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/9b7bdc59-292f-4687-b5b5-3e5db311c77b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Back to Melissa Hortman. She was assassinated--and conservatives are bending over backwards to blame anyone but the radicalized Republican who did it. More so, they're still trying to pin Charlie Kirk's shooter on Democrats--despite having no evidence of his ties to left-wing groups. Let's be real: if you're picking up a gun to kill anyone--Charlie Kirk included--you don't share my ideology.
At the memorial last night, aside from Erica Kirk--who gave a surprisingly graceful speech and forgave the killer, which I respect--most of the speeches were unhinged. Trump's, especially, was offensive. There was no call for unity, no grace--just more of the same poison. Because again: in MAGA world, morality flows from Trump. It's okay to hate. It's okay to turn on your neighbors. Trump says so.
I come back to what I wrote Friday: Trump is a fascist. And a key trait of fascism is becoming the sole source of truth and morality for your movement. No matter what evidence you show them, they believe Tom Homan isn't corrupt, Tim Walz ordered Hortman's murder, Charlie Kirk's killer was a leftist, the economy is great, prices are down, housing is cheaper, and everything's better than it was nine months ago. All lies.
What Republicans do not realize is that their actions are actively eroding Americans' faith in government. Turning a blind eye in the face of blatant corruption, obstruction of justice, and refusing to uphold democratic principles of transparency, accountability, and justice because "Trump said so"--be it for the Epstein case, Melissa Hortman's assassination, or Homan's bribery scandal--is also political suicide. By refusing to hold their own base or colleagues accountable, Republicans are not protecting their party--they're accelerating its collapse. Every time they excuse corruption, indulge conspiracy theories, or shrug at unlawful behavior, they deepen the public's sense that the government is broken and rigged. Trust in government is already at historic lows, and this cynicism only pushes more Americans to disengage entirely--or worse, to embrace even more extreme, anti-democratic movements.
It's dangerous. It's cult behavior. And it's bleeding into everything. Just look at the Jimmy Kimmel situation--they're flat-out lying about what he said and justifying Trump using the FCC to get him suspended. It's all grievance politics now. They claim the government is persecuting them. Roseanne Barr even blamed Obama for her getting fired seven years ago. She tweeted something racist, ABC fired her--as is their right--and now she's blaming an administration that wasn't even in office at the time.
Some of them are delusional. But many of them--Trump, Miller, Vance--know exactly what they're doing. They're polluting the public mind, positioning themselves as the sole arbiters of truth, and using that authority to justify corruption, lies, and political violence. That's how they get to "it's okay for Tom Homan to take a bribe," or "it's okay for Trump to take a $400 million bribe from the Qatari government."
That's the rot. And it's why more and more people are turning against this administration, whether they admit it or not. MAGA is trying to manufacture the illusion of popularity and success--but we all know better.
Don't let them gaslight you.
And as tempting as it is, don't detach from people in your life who've gotten swept up in this. Engage with them. Have the hard conversations. That's why I keep bringing my dad on the show--we don't agree on everything, but those debates keep him tethered to some version of reality. And they sharpen me too. If you never talk to someone who disagrees with you, how do you really know what you stand for?
Trump wants to isolate people into echo chambers where he's the only voice that matters. We can't let that happen.

* * *
Friend, Missouri voters just filed a major lawsuit to block an extreme Republican gerrymander — one that would lock in GOP power and silence Democratic voices for the next decade. Their claim is simple: the map violates the state constitution’s promise of fair representation. But this is bigger than Missouri. Because what’s happening there is **part of a coordinated, nationwide assault on democracy.** 🔴 In state after state, Republican lawmakers are drawing districts that strip power from voters and cement their control, no matter what the majority wants.
🔴 And in many of these states, they’re doing it with the help of hand-picked election officials loyal to Trump’s vision, not democratic principles. That’s why this lawsuit is so important, and why we’re asking for your help. **At DASS, we’re supporting Democratic Secretaries of State who will defend fair maps, voting rights, and the rule of law.** These are the people who certify maps, challenge abuses in court, and stop illegal power grabs before they spread. But we need the resources to keep fighting -- in court, on the airwaves, and at the ballot box. These are the people who certify maps, challenge abuses in court, and stop illegal power grabs before they spread. But we need the resources to keep fighting -- in court, on the airwaves, and at the ballot box. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** This is about the future of representation and whether voters get to choose their leaders, or leaders get to choose their voters. Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

# Hello Capitalists,
### **Here is everything you should be following today:**
* Trump and RFK rock the medical establishment
* Tim Pool has big news on Mortgage searches
* Steak 'n Shake goes to war with Cracker Barrel CEO
* Trump's new man at the Fed is shaking things up
* America has a new King of Beers (and it isn't Budwiser)

### **Today 's markets:**
* **DOW: 46358.84 ( ⬆️0.09%) - ✅**
* **S &P: 6690.52 (⬆️0.39%) - ✅**
* **NASDAQ: 22766.72 ( ⬆️0.60%) - ✅**
* **CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 15.84 ( ⬆️2.52%) - ⚠️⬆️**

* * *

# Trump and RFK to make MAJOR autism announcement
The Trump administration **[plans to announce Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/48a65320-3e7e-417e-9e99-586d7c69bc2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a controversial link between acetaminophen use during early pregnancy and increased autism risk in children, urging pregnant women to avoid Tylenol except for fevers, while promoting leucovorin as a potential treatment--despite fierce pushback from experts and drug makers citing scant scientific evidence.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/48a65320-3e7e-417e-9e99-586d7c69bc2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **HHS Kennedy Spearheads Push** : Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. leads the federal effort, building on his pledge to probe autism causes.
* **Scientific Skepticism Prevails:** Despite the report, the FDA and groups like the American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists affirm acetaminophen's safety in pregnancy, citing over a decade of research showing no causal tie to autism.
* **Manufacturer's Fierce Rebuttal:** Kenvue CEO Kirk Perry urged HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. against the claim in a September meeting, warning it could endanger pregnant women by discouraging fever treatment as shares plunge ahead of the announcement.
* **Broader Policy Shifts Loom** : The announcement follows Trump's weekend tease, potentially reshaping pregnancy guidelines and spurring investigations into environmental autism triggers.The move may spur new guidelines limiting early-pregnancy Tylenol use unless for fever, potentially fueling lawsuits.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/0a5614ef-d6a3-4bbf-b72b-4087e32b6386?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
**[Together with Castor Oil](https://substack.com/redirect/270087ea-be15-452e-baff-0199133aa39a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Have you seen what castor oil does to your liver? Watch the shocking video below:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/270087ea-be15-452e-baff-0199133aa39a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're over 40 and struggle with...
**Stubborn weight gain**
**Digestive issues**
**Low energy**
...then you need to[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/270087ea-be15-452e-baff-0199133aa39a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[watch this video](https://substack.com/redirect/270087ea-be15-452e-baff-0199133aa39a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** right now.
You're likely suffering from the same thing that 98+ million other Americans are, and that's a clogged liver that is stopping your body from breaking down fat.
But when you use castor oil in[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/270087ea-be15-452e-baff-0199133aa39a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[this weird way](https://substack.com/redirect/270087ea-be15-452e-baff-0199133aa39a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** each morning (not by drinking it)... Your liver becomes up to 80% more efficient - burning your stores of stubborn fat like jet fuel.

[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/270087ea-be15-452e-baff-0199133aa39a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
