Mark Kelly has an official FEC deadline on September 30th. Once that deadline hits, Mark’s going to have to report our numbers out — the amount we’ve raised, how many donations, how many donors. And, since Mark’s a leader with an important voice, everybody’s going to be watching to see his report.
We expect MAGA Republicans to put up big numbers. To show them and the pundits that we have the strength of a powerful movement behind us, we have to put up even bigger numbers.
It’s not just a referendum on Mark. It’s a sign of strength. It’s an undeniable example of the power of this team.
You have to find a purpose, and that purpose often centers on love. Love for your family, for your friends, for your ideals, for your country. And sometimes that purpose is just to keep going, no matter what.

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: God wrote our love story.
body:
This is who Charlie really was....
| | | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e358505/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvbnpuSE03Qjk4VQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjI/LbmNsd0VQdUF5Zw/qP2hpZHM9bmNCNzZ1cThBQzNHbGJscw/gaNGYZw/s0ha4fcacd2) [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Patriot, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Patriot.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Patriot.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Patriot.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**P.S.** Patriot, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Patriot, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Patriot, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Patriot, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](test@test.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily.**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e358505/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjI/LbmNsd0VQdUF5Zw/qP2hpZHM9bmNCNzZ1cThBQzNHbGJscw/gaNGYZw/scifd2e8c81)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Bernie Sanders and I just introduced the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Coca-Cola’s CEO made 1,980 times that of their average worker who makes $14,144 a year. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW3dTix1Jo4-cedZ-OO7hgjulvVTL--AW79eJGwf976ui2dkGZNhQActY47o7g1o09GLi3d8qPl-AUbX9dB8xrBCnL191vGinTPCYgV85Wmi--bdSu-9625AZW5_N_5Y4SpS8qqj5IjSAyjvFFrlH1hcAzErOpr5i0Mv54SPGfTtm_tsAYFmPYn1ahu75-hEMdgcZkimEt9h4qoHLAHIHITC-8V_fyJSgKR4Ot2p5zOkdzDmEIZwx9LaZXqTRb-HM6/4k4/2tyc55gCT_mW8j0D3UBVbQ/h0/h001.KRDQKxSpuZorOmi4iDYud6nX4zGkUjBBQRXE67TpPX0)
---
Friend, It’s disgraceful that corporations continue to rake in record profits by exploiting the labor of their workers. Every worker deserves a living wage and human dignity on the job. Did you know that the CEO of Walmart made $274 million last year? That’s 930 times that of the average Walmart employee who made $29,469. Coca-Cola’s CEO made 1,980 times that of their average worker who makes $14,144 a year. In the 1960s and 70s, CEOs made roughly 20 to 30 times more than their workers. Today, CEOs of major corporations are making 290 times that of their average worker. **That’s why I’ve introduced the**** _Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act_****with Senator Bernie Sanders.** Our bill would tax corporations whose top executives are paid more than 50 times that of their workers. Corporations with a 50-to-1 CEO-to-worker pay ratio would pay another 0.5% in taxes while a company with a 500-to-1 ratio would pay 5% more. As Bernie Sanders said:
> _“We can no longer tolerate a rigged economy that enables the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, to become the first trillionaire while 60% of Americans live paycheck to paycheck and millions work longer hours for lower wages.”_
[**Add your now as a grassroots co-sponsor of the _Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act_ to demand Congress act!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmwH56BiZUa8B4InAnYjFsD9SOcPz4HE978ZnTfc8cO7CKIkRsvfShYGNHWycz1ZUAGWJBSzoQaJPWgKLReQrQp_3_3YU7-ApALeIQOV7DYOkeJmWeZ14CmPJctmc8OPI7J033Tb_kkA0D7ieYIAozKt2ToqNl-ssCAZxwUrV7Eo-bppLyl3OEeA0iXi3D90hvWLG_-yMNrbEktj_S2cBr8q4bLVQNV5JUTvqpQzxExQICZFPQ1ltMVMF_6UP0Uc07RL6DLhXC0vCUaQz0IIGhTSB8_LyvaA5JR3ZbND8xlJSIRgCvUTPsLQdWNO9oyhAX0UQkMkirNC0xHO75JHujabhbNx0SgcFlp2WL9-DDwTKX4WKX7Go2E4jt3leFJe2T_XUXNRFtT58uU0t8Ewh7-wPF7GEnVNZuynmD7gTolm0nzZvwASVZzHffSEwn3r7-1XCQcWg2SKD3KLLwteeKOCYvcRy5WbHokKy5XVFswDI/4k4/2tyc55gCT_mW8j0D3UBVbQ/h1/h001.Z0yxkeSMVyFTqSVwtJ_CLWXbjujNErPQLzNp1OSr8g8) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmwH56BiZUa8B4InAnYjFsD9SOcPz4HE978ZnTfc8cO7CKIkRsvfShYGNHWycz1ZUAGWJBSzoQaJPWgKLReQrQp_3_3YU7-ApALeIQOV7DYOkeJmWeZ14CmPJctmc8OPI7J033Tb_kkA0D7ieYIAozKt2ToqNl-ssCAZxwUrV7Eo-bppLyl3OEeA0iXi3D90hvWLG_-yMNrbEktj_S2cBr8q4bLVQNV5JUTvqpQzxExQICZFPQ1ltMVMF_6UP0Uc07RL6DLhXC0vCUaQz0IIGhTY-bWoXbj9jXCT_uMVhU_x0OaRjJYg6GH7eJ84nA7-A1AKwk2joAU5_FelEFBhrAH64KvjC4p0QOA203PVXnyxeIY_FbID9akcNOvA9xMSqth0gg4Vd4n4eMXMpOSA3MjbD-J_kPDBvuaEleO1Pib2yUySnluahnDEJzJIM7AMlwmEn1Vm3MO_m8Lf28bBiC8a-H9tgE8ZBztnHr6JAYmq8/4k4/2tyc55gCT_mW8j0D3UBVbQ/h2/h001.8j7sna0fSO5l9_ROgbKc3ZS3-y4kfZYitLi3aENNW-8)
---
Together, we’ll never stop demanding workers be paid a fair wage and corporations and CEOs start paying their fair share in taxes.
Thank you,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sun, Sep 21, 2025
Subject: Bernie Sanders and I just introduced the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Greedy corporations and their CEOs have never had it so good. They’re price gouging consumers while CEOs are making 290 times that of their average worker.
To put this in context, the typical Starbucks worker would need to work 6,600 years to make what their CEO made last year―$95.8 million!
At the same time, Tesla’s board of directors is considering a nearly $1 trillion pay package to Elon Musk, who is already the richest man in the world.
**That’s why Bernie Sanders and I have introduced the**** _Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act_****to tax corporations that pay their top executives more than 50 times their average worker.**
At a time when billionaire wealth in the U.S. has reached a record $7.6 trillion and when 60% of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, this bill would put a constraint on excessive CEO pay packages and encourage corporations to raise workers’ wages.

clean_body: Coca-Cola’s CEO made 1,980 times that of their average worker who makes $14,144 a year. | | | Friend, It’s disgraceful that corporations continue to rake in record profits by exploiting the labor of their workers. Every worker deserves a living wage and human dignity on the job. Did you know that the CEO of Walmart made $274 million last year? That’s 930 times that of the average Walmart employee who made $29,469. Coca-Cola’s CEO made 1,980 times that of their average worker who makes $14,144 a year. In the 1960s and 70s, CEOs made roughly 20 to 30 times more than their workers. Today, CEOs of major corporations are making 290 times that of their average worker. That’s why I’ve introduced the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Actwith Senator Bernie Sanders. Our bill would tax corporations whose top executives are paid more than 50 times that of their workers. Corporations with a 50-to-1 CEO-to-worker pay ratio would pay another 0.5% in taxes while a company with a 500-to-1 ratio would pay 5% more. As Bernie Sanders said: “We can no longer tolerate a rigged economy that enables the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, to become the first trillionaire while 60% of Americans live paycheck to paycheck and millions work longer hours for lower wages.” | Together, we’ll never stop demanding workers be paid a fair wage and corporations and CEOs start paying their fair share in taxes. Thank you, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sun, Sep 21, 2025 Subject: Bernie Sanders and I just introduced the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Greedy corporations and their CEOs have never had it so good. They’re price gouging consumers while CEOs are making 290 times that of their average worker. To put this in context, the typical Starbucks worker would need to work 6,600 years to make what their CEO made last year―$95.8 million! At the same time, Tesla’s board of directors is considering a nearly $1 trillion pay package to Elon Musk, who is already the richest man in the world. That’s why Bernie Sanders and I have introduced the** Tax Excessive CEO Pay Actto tax corporations that pay their top executives more than 50 times their average worker. At a time when billionaire wealth in the U.S. has reached a record $7.6 trillion and when 60% of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, this bill would put a constraint on excessive CEO pay packages and encourage corporations to raise workers’ wages. Sixty-two percent of Americans are in favor of putting a cap on CEO pay, relative to worker pay. Even Pope Leo has endorsed reining in CEO pay: If the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act becomes law, and Tesla’s board approves Elon Musk’s nearly $1 trillion pay package, Tesla would owe up to $100 billion more in taxes over the next decade. Together, we’re demanding an economy that works for everyday people, not just wealthy CEOs and corporations. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Hey there,
Peter — did you get a chance to
sign our petition?

RFK Jr. is pushing dangerous ideology, dismantling the Department of
Health and Human Services, and putting lives at risk.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/rfk-jr-resign?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250922_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=4993%2E35263%2E5ixiln ]Tammy is calling on him to resign. Will you join her?

Thank you, Peter.

— Team Baldwin

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tammy Baldwin
Date: Wednesday, September 10, 2025
Subject: SIGN ON: RFK Jr. needs to resign

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| |
| |
|RFK Jr.'s leadership of the Department of Health and Human Services has |
| put millions of lives in danger, |
|Peter. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/rfk-jr-resign?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250922_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=4993%2E35263%2E5ixiln ]Join me in the call|
| for his resignation. |
| |
| [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/rfk-jr-resign?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250922_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=4993%2E35263%2E5ixiln ]SIGN ON |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Last week, RFK Jr. went before the Senate Finance Committee to answer for
his Department’s decisions to indiscriminately fire the leaders at the CDC
and freeze grants that put medical research in jeopardy.

He’s putting this country on a dangerous path and putting people’s lives
at risk. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/rfk-jr-resign?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250922_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=4993%2E35263%2E5ixiln ]That’s why I’m calling for his resignation. Will you add your
name right now and join me?

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/rfk-jr-resign?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250922_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=4993%2E35263%2E5ixiln ]SIGN ON

These actions will have real repercussions on Americans’ health — defunded
research projects mean slowing down our fight to stop cancers, and could
weaken our defense against future pandemics.

Thanks in advance for your support today.

— Tammy

**A year from now, we'll be knocking on doors.

A year from now, yard signs will be lining every lawn.

A year from now, we'll be just weeks away from Democrats taking back the House.**

clean_body: Peter, Yesterday was the first day of fall. And here's what we keep thinking about: A year from now, we'll be knocking on doors. A year from now, yard signs will be lining every lawn. A year from now, we'll be just weeks away from Democrats taking back the House. But here's the thing—those wins aren't going to come from waiting until next year to start building this campaign up. The resources to put up those yard signs, run ads, send out mailers, and talk with voters in every corner of our district aren't made overnight, they're built steadily, month after month, by grassroots supporters like you who believe in the work Kim is doing in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We can't fight climate change without free speech.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
When they try to silence us, we get louder.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115716863/571230737/1328794144?refcode=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNmM4NjI2LWU0OTctZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a1kv2AjuZC8TUC-Gn2412BCk5EYOeDnQn9wNjK1CojU=&emci=915ef7df-c997-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
Let me be clear: what happened to Jimmy Kimmel last week is just the beginning. Trump is systematically trying to silence anyone who challenges his agenda — from comedians to scientists, activists, and beyond. And when free speech dies, so does our ability to fight the climate crisis. Think about it. Climate scientists need the freedom to publish their research. Journalists need to investigate corporate polluters without fear. Citizens need the right to protest and organize. When authoritarians start censoring critics, they're dismantling the very tools we need to hold Big Oil accountable. We can't wait for Washington to protect our freedoms or our planet. We have to build power from the ground up by electing climate champions who will defend both our democracy and our environment at the state and local level. **Since launching JanePAC, we've helped elect over 160 climate candidates who refuse to be bought by fossil fuel money. But sustaining this fight — especially when Donald Trump and corporate interests are working overtime to silence opposition — requires steady, monthly support from people like you.** **[That's where my Grassroots Cabinet comes in. With just a $10 monthly contribution, you can join and help power the movement to save our planet.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115716864/571230749/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNmM4NjI2LWU0OTctZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a1kv2AjuZC8TUC-Gn2412BCk5EYOeDnQn9wNjK1CojU=)** | [**Join Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115716865/571230755/1824087006?recurring=true&refcode=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNmM4NjI2LWU0OTctZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a1kv2AjuZC8TUC-Gn2412BCk5EYOeDnQn9wNjK1CojU=)
---
As a Grassroots Cabinet member, you'll not only be powering real change in our climate fight, but you'll also get some cool perks along the way:
✅ Exclusive updates directly from me about the progress your investment is making possible
✅ Early and discounted access to JanePAC events and merchandise
✅ Invitations to our virtual quarterly strategy calls, where we connect and talk about JanePAC's work
✅ And because I truly value your support, I personally call a few Cabinet members to say thank you (you could be one of them!)
Right now, dozens of our endorsed climate champions are in tight races across Virginia, Pennsylvania, Georgia, and beyond. These down-ballot races are often decided by just a handful of votes, and Big Oil is pouring millions into defeating the very leaders who would protect our right to organize and our right to a livable planet.
**[Will you join my Grassroots Cabinet with $10 a month and help us fight back against those who want to silence us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115716866/571230757/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNmM4NjI2LWU0OTctZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a1kv2AjuZC8TUC-Gn2412BCk5EYOeDnQn9wNjK1CojU=)**
[**Join Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115716867/571230758/1824087006?recurring=true&refcode=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.936c8626-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNmM4NjI2LWU0OTctZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a1kv2AjuZC8TUC-Gn2412BCk5EYOeDnQn9wNjK1CojU=)

Let Us Worship has deep roots in Louisiana. In the grip of Covid, we held a _MASSIVE_ revival in New Orleans, where the mayor threatened to arrest us (but fined us instead)! We kicked off the Awake America Tour in Cajun country and worshiped at the Louisiana State Capitol during the Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. **And we’re coming back!!** God is doing something special in Louisiana, and we are bringing revival with us! The date is set – October 31st – Halloween night! We will have a location soon, so stay tuned. In the meantime, watch this Louisiana _HYPE_ video and mark your calendars!

In the grip of Covid, we held a MASSIVE revival in New Orleans, where the mayor threatened to arrest us (but fined us instead)! We kicked off the Awake America Tour in Cajun country and worshiped at the Louisiana State Capitol during the Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. And we’re coming back!! God is doing something special in Louisiana, and we are bringing revival with us! The date is set – October 31st – Halloween night! We will have a location soon, so stay tuned. | Peter, it’s time to hand out Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s report card. Spoiler alert: he’s failing to "Make America Healthy Again." Instead of improving public health, as Secretary of Health and Human Services,he's stood lockstep with Trump's extremist agenda: – RFK Jr. has pushed anti-science conspiracy theories over proven medical research.
– He's slashed critical funding for medical and cancer research.
– He supported Medicaid cuts that will leave millions of Americans without lifesaving care.
– And he's being criticized by BOTH parties for creating chaos in his agency! RFK Jr. and every MAGA extremist are threatening the health of MILLIONS of Americans with their dangerous policies! Meanwhile, Democrats are fighting every day to expand care, lower costs, and protect our health. And we need to support more of them! We’re asking Top Democrats in 22122 to grade Robert F. Kennedy Jr's leadership. [**_So tell us, Peter:_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25235c10-02e5-45d7-9c31-d85ab39c7127/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) What grade would YOU give Robert F. Kennedy Jr?

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4f3518e-973f-424e-9e06-89323f9a0af3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
I wanted to take a minute to reset and tell you a little story about who I am and how I got here.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1842%2E791427%2Eh8wt7y)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250922-1-90&t=2&akid=1842%2E791427%2Eh8wt7y)
Hi friends,
In case you missed it... **my name has been in the headlines quite a bit this past week.**
I’m facing incredibly racist and fascist attacks from all sides, from Nancy Mace, to Donald Trump, to the folks at Fox News.
So given all the noise, I wanted to take a minute to reset and tell you a little story about who I am and how I got here.
**My name is Ilhan Omar, and I am the proud representative of Minnesota’s 5th district in Congress.**
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250922-1-90&t=3&akid=1842%2E791427%2Eh8wt7y)
My family came to America as refugees without a penny to our name. It wasn’t easy to get by.
After my father landed his first job it became clear that one minimum wage job wasn’t going to be enough, and that we all needed to chip in.
I started cleaning office buildings and throughout high school and college worked as a cashier, security guard, educator, and policy analyst to make ends meet.
When I first ran for office to challenge a 44-year incumbent, I was told that I wouldn’t raise money or be competitive without a network of wealthy friends and donors.
**But they were wrong,** it was friends and neighbors like you who made donations of $5, $10, or $20 to help us mobilize and win.
And that’s still the case — I don’t take corporate PAC money or lobbyist money. I rely on small donations from supporters like you to fuel our campaign and make sure we defeat the billionaires who are trying to buy our elections and have power over policymakers in Washington.
Trump’s attacks on free speech, his weaponization of the justice system, and his increasingly fascist declarations from the Oval Office represent an existential threat to our nation. Today more than ever, we need working class leaders who will fight Trump and the oligarchs who fund him and push for the transformational change we need.
So, friends, I am humbly asking for your support today as we continue to take on the repeated attacks from the far-right and fight for a more progressive vision of the future.
**[Chip in $5, $10, $20, or really anything you can afford today. We are about a week away from a huge FEC fundraising deadline. This is the perfect time to flex the grassroots power of this movement and prove to Trump, Nancy Mace, and the entire far-right that their attacks only make us stronger and more determined to win.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250922-1-90&t=4&akid=1842%2E791427%2Eh8wt7y)

Thank you for always having my back when the GOP puts a target on it. We can and must rise above their hate, racism, and authoritarian agenda.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115717762/571234289/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzYxMzI3Ni1lNjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1h0r4RQNxKS-NjuQzKqwIT2Xw2SGZTJM2M3W_Hf_mU=)
Peter,

The first day of fall always carries a sense of change. The air shifts, the light feels different, and the year suddenly feels like it’s gathering speed.

A year from now, that same crisp fall air will carry with it the sound of neighbors opening their doors to our volunteers. A year from now, our campaign signs will be planted in yards among changing leaves. And a year from now, we’ll be just months away from Christina becoming IA-01's newest representative.

_Those moments we’re dreaming of don’t just appear on their own._ They are built slowly and intentionally, with the steady work of a campaign and the consistent generosity of a team that believes in something bigger.

That’s why we’re asking for your help today. Not a year from now, when the finish line is in sight, but now — **when each contribution helps us gather the resources we’ll need to meet the moment next fall.**

**[Will you make a donation today to help us take this first step toward the victories we’ll be celebrating one year from now?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115717763/571234294/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250921_FRFall_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250921_FRFall_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=17613276-e697-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzYxMzI3Ni1lNjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1h0r4RQNxKS-NjuQzKqwIT2Xw2SGZTJM2M3W_Hf_mU=)**

Bohannan HQ

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1b58d0a1e38f47b5b561f93fedcf05be&_e=7GSPfkYwjQH9MWrYJxzC4mnLCHE6TWPr6pcOzQXob5zFHjz76MUD-TwclN5G96Na9IezfJUwxO65gGbabnt1dV8UQxaGmWoo56QMOekrcSWmCim2AdjqMLwXloPhcCGE4NUdydA0b_stI9sdRKuOTQ72USceQ9Cz4hzfBGdhOdZm_0-29NZmliP_ETNJFNDvW95mO8Bq9T93YHypRpiCknovoTmHkyqVxCuiMpapFb2qhsN5aOdSirRUHWhON1P6ULQTvPAHOJOKc55CY-Cp3Kn2iHlEwA7VGlHZCK5fCXT_fWkQPCxbqL-tUxtc3SB69pChqD8_FsafrU05uc9_Py_u4xD9bodjfLNtl5ifx__ddWvdGdszq2Uwh4ORvSz0jn0R2zwyYZ6JfvOzLYeWU1pu4Z6CiWSGnH6sChCMsShGnvBJFVshFMhajm5j7HnQoMn7sEiFrexhAUic8Hi3PJH5OrFaS8JYuSsPg7e5xrwhTyQYDVZDbsB54BkrfNKcjHwzUjZc5QWNc_pWZ7aGLh2XoHp9FED5I3nCCccj7jVv_XkIJsV3u3SDyHQ0XujXr3CiH58JrLpHLUsWY6GEIoCDZsRxhnFj7GVvQ0xTgVllLrso1JF2OmZFuE0sCRY0)

Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1b58d0a1e38f47b5b561f93fedcf05be&_e=7GSPfkYwjQH9MWrYJxzC4mnLCHE6TWPr6pcOzQXob5zFHjz76MUD-TwclN5G96Na9IezfJUwxO65gGbabnt1dV8UQxaGmWoo56QMOekrcSWmCim2AdjqMLwXloPhcCGE4NUdydA0b_stI9sdRKuOTQ72USceQ9Cz4hzfBGdhOdZEbhHw-draxz97SrICysSreM1D_kJnPqEiFW97ztniPNMVzDNiHHeN0FAVIE-e7Wx_I1sRkFAgwcDwbRgJoRkzFEALCrdnRsWxhhMKxi8sC7tLShPK2iFObq_RiPv4c0g3fcxl2n_CkCcPP1rSkKVsgrceqOjRiIGPQimq2NZcOwAARsGVeF2HN5PnUJ-IJk-momvSouVKazlAms4zRHFrexOeHgeWSbK-XxTBgLbM_veLpVc0V3ee300f5RuTp-t_QB3zPBrKJV1Jek1nDE8W3FqoUQTLGr_kI6nHmrEk1qqeh-KHQE5GVj74M7V6cdmyuddaZzOpVd_jMXVml6dtbyMwlbP8SzHzeuOq_6JOI9MUiR4m3xyCcXJ6qoUOaX3UUHSQber6PimDWZCwR2E3J9mIr8qQWFsWmSBPJx29D-6FyxFnAq9eubMau5msdXDmVttyieSdum22pikzCJOW)

clean_body: Friend, I recently came across a striking statistic. 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for harsher penalties. Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service? I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream because of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice. And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice. The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured. That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties finding a job Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in. Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need. There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance. Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten. This isn't about politics. It's about justice. These are real Americans -- veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens -- who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs. If we don 't fight for our fellow patriots now, who will? When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you're not just defending individuals. You are defending the soul of our country. As long as there 's breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I'll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you'll join me by taking action right now.** For faith, freedom, and country, John Rich Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599. P.O. Box 470100 Tulsa, OK 74147

Peter,
At the direction of Donald Trump’s government, Disney and ABC have decided to halt their airing of their late night show. Let’s be clear: when a government dictates what can or cannot be shown on TV, that’s censorship. And it’s not only chilling — it’s a direct assault on the First Amendment.
We’ve seen this pattern before. Donald Trump and his allies believe they can silence anyone they don’t agree with. And if we don’t call it out, it will continue to get worse.
As the People’s Lawyer, I’ve stood up to Donald Trump's lawlessness again and again. **My job is to defend the people of Minnesota and make sure their fundamental rights aren’t infringed upon — and I’m not going to stop now.**
[**Peter, will you pitch in $10, $25, $50, or any amount you can afford to support me as I continue the fight against Donald Trump?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115718422/571236917/1310879921?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGVkNjY4Yy1lNzk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WI3GFdRITx09yNBId59GNWD2zwpOrK6Khdx6VdRzwww=)

My job is to defend the people of Minnesota and make sure their fundamental rights aren’t infringed upon — and I’m not going to stop now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Keith Ellison Attorney General Keith Ellison is the People’s Lawyer, fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect. = | Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General PO Box 17224 Minneapolis, MN 55417 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ************** ************ **

Peter, I'm Jo Mendoza. I'm a single mother, Marine veteran, and Democrat running to turn AZ-06 blue. EMILYs List said I could reach out because the stakes are so high.

I know being asked for money via email isn't super fun. In fact, I hate asking for money.

_But the truth is, when you're running in a congressional race as competitive as mine, you have no choice but to ask. And I'm proud to be asking you — never the shady special interests or corporations that bankroll my opponent._ ****[**So I'm going to be blunt with you: I'm asking you to split $25 between my campaign and EMILYs List before our next reporting deadline to help me flip this seat, and unlike a lot of campaigns out there, I'm going to tell you _exactly_ what your donation funds!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115718368/571236749/1549570223?refcode=WUEFH945_20250922_MendozaSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057031&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWYyZDZkZC1lNjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aIU4vgzVKTNcuLVmUPHcT1UWAtyWpWZUSFlMP2TT7hY=)**** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115718369/571236750/1549570223?refcode=WUEFH945_20250922_MendozaSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057031&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWYyZDZkZC1lNjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aIU4vgzVKTNcuLVmUPHcT1UWAtyWpWZUSFlMP2TT7hY=)

clean_body: | = Peter, I'm Jo Mendoza. I'm a single mother, Marine veteran, and Democrat running to turn AZ-06 blue. EMILYs List said I could reach out because the stakes are so high. I know being asked for money via email isn't super fun. In fact, I hate asking for money. But the truth is, when you're running in a congressional race as competitive as mine, you have no choice but to ask. And I'm proud to be asking you — never the shady special interests or corporations that bankroll my opponent. **= | = $25 will enable me to run digital ads early in the cycle, and help me boost my name recognition across AZ-06. $25 will allow me to hire campaign staff, put boots on the ground in the district, and expand my small (but mighty!) team. And $25 will fund my travel throughout the district, to make sure I hear from voters in every corner of AZ-06. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Endlessly grateful! – Jo Mendoza = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Trump Speaks At Kirk Memorial
body:
Charlie Kirk’s memorial at State Farm Stadium was not just a service for the slain activist — it was a political and spiritual flashpoint for a movement grappling with grief, anger, and determination. Tens of thousands filled the Glendale venue, joined by thousands more in overflow sites, to honor the 31-year-old Turning Point USA founder [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/WQoArrvsHccpv5cw-qOmvg)

[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MjQ4ODYifQ/N-y5-QiW8oxu3FWBqtqqhw)
---
# **[Trump Speaks At Kirk Memorial](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Charlie Kirk’s memorial at State Farm Stadium was not just a service for the slain activist — it was a political and spiritual flashpoint for a movement grappling with grief, anger, and determination. Tens of thousands filled the Glendale venue, joined by thousands more in overflow sites, to honor the 31-year-old Turning Point USA founder [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._zzNO6B-OYaVWZiyBYTg)
# **[Trump Comments On Investigations](http://trk.libertyledger._zzNO6B-OYaVWZiyBYTg)**
---
President Donald Trump didn’t hold back this weekend when he turned his attention to Attorney General Pam Bondi and the Department of Justice, demanding to know why investigations into some of the Democratic Party’s most notorious figures still appear stalled. In a fiery Saturday evening post, Trump vented the frustration felt by many of his [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._zzNO6B-OYaVWZiyBYTg)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MjQ4ODYifQ/D7ejT8Y4rrzQ4_19wnoAgQ)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._DYe_oKfFrqFAA)
# **[Jonathan Karl Comments On Kirk Murder](http://trk.libertyledger._DYe_oKfFrqFAA)**
---
ABC’s Jonathan Karl could have taken the easy road. He could have said what was plain for everyone to see — Charlie Kirk was assassinated for his political views. Instead, he tried to thread the needle, and in the process, tied himself in knots.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._DYe_oKfFrqFAA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._FikHZ584OHWVirQA)
# **[Witness Describes Incident In New Hampshire](http://trk.libertyledger._FikHZ584OHWVirQA)**
---
It was supposed to be the happiest day of their lives — a wedding celebration, family and friends gathered, music playing, the dance floor filling with joy. But at the Sky Meadow Country Club in Nashua, New Hampshire, what should have been a lifelong memory of love was shattered in an instant by political violence. [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._FikHZ584OHWVirQA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Surgeon Clarifies Report After Kirk Murder](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
In the aftermath of Charlie Kirk’s assassination — a moment that has already shaken the conservative movement to its core — a new and astonishing detail has emerged, casting an almost mythic light on the final seconds of his life.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/MFaiaH8H2l-k3KSZJLJTYw)
# **[Host Comments On Networks TV Host Decision](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/MFaiaH8H2l-k3KSZJLJTYw)**
---
CNN’s Boris Sanchez tried some verbal gymnastics this week — but the tape doesn’t lie. On Thursday’s broadcast of CNN News Central, Sanchez insisted that Jimmy Kimmel hadn’t really implied Charlie Kirk’s assassin was a Trump supporter. Instead, he claimed, Kimmel was just “making a point” about right-wing finger-pointing after Kirk’s murder. But Kimmel’s actual [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/MFaiaH8H2l-k3KSZJLJTYw)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MjQ4ODYifQ/VnZSU3fnJW2scVx9fos8VQ)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MjQ4ODYifQ/6A6w_OozzV1T_iK8S9azVw)
---

P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: This is the story of Charlie I want to tell
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?” _

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, friend. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.” _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.” **_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.” _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side. _
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, patriot. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory. **
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn. **

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bdnh/?__vbtrk=MzIxNTM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIxNTM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Patriot, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.” **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves. _

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired. **
** **
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too. **

Patriot, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.” **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here. _**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bdnh/?__vbtrk=MzIxNTM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIxNTM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

---

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: Taxpayers deserve a county that shows up to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
This isn't right and it needs to change. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=ee3a06cde8&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/80e40fe171d9/taxpayers-deserve-a-county-that-shows-up-to-work?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=3173657d6c&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

King County families work hard every day to provide for their loved ones, pay their taxes, and build a better future. It's only fair that their local government works just as hard for them.

But today, too many of our county employees are still working almost entirely from home -- even as the County continues to grow its workforce and ask taxpayers for more of their hard-earned money. That's not right.

I believe government should be accountable, accessible, and responsive. That's why [I am introducing legislation](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=57e99fa7ee&e=77eef70c61) requiring a majority of King County employees to show up to their office, in-person, for the majority of the workweek. Because when employees are in the office, the public can better access the services they pay for -- and taxpayers get the accountability they deserve. [Read the full article here.](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=3d924781e9&e=77eef70c61)
[](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=106ad51cad&e=77eef70c61) This isn't about politics. It's about fairness and common sense. The County has asked for five new taxes from residents this year alone, but even with higher taxes, the County continues to provide less efficient services to taxpayers. This needs to change.

But I can't do this alone. My fight for accountability in County government depends on your support. **Will you stand with me today by[making a contribution](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=e8ab9dcd79&e=77eef70c61) of $25, $50, $100, or even $250 to my campaign?** Every dollar helps us spread the word that taxpayers deserve better from their government. [Donate here.](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=8315b01692&e=77eef70c61)

Together, we can ensure King County delivers results for the people it serves -- not excuses.

Thank you for your support,

Reagan Dunn
King County Councilmember \---------------
[DONATE NOW](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=93e32ef3e1&e=77eef70c61)
\---------------
---
| | [Follow on Twitter](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=c79397d5ca&e=77eef70c61) | [ on Facebook](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=6c40d3e984&e=77eef70c61) |
---

subject: It's Marialana's birthday!

body:
Help us celebrate!

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|

## **Happy Birthday Marialana!**
---
[|
---](https://kinterforcongress.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f6a723b5c3bc1add1f7a8ca4d&id=c128d4d47e&e=d995135712)
| | Today we’re celebrating **Marialana Kinter’s birthday** , and she has just one wish: to keep building the grassroots movement that will **beat Cory Mills** , and send a Navy veteran and fearless advocate for Florida’s 7th District to Congress.
---
| | Instead of gifts or cake, Marialana is asking friends and supporters like you to **help power the campaign forward**. Every contribution, big or small, fuels community organizing, voter outreach, and the fight for real representation.
---
| |

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Confidential Memo: Here’s where we stand
body:
| | | | Friend – Every quarter, our campaign is required to report our fundraising numbers to the FEC — and once that deadline hits, **the entire political establishment gets to see exactly where we stand.**
The media will look. The Democrats will look. **And yes, they will try to use it against us.**
They want to paint a picture that **this movement is fading.** That the conservative base is **backing down.** That we don’t have the grassroots strength to **keep fighting.**
**_[We need to prove them wrong](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
This is about more than numbers. This is about showing the media and the Democrat operatives that this movement still has teeth, and that their attacks are pointless.
**_[But we are running out of time](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
The deadline is almost here, and if we come up short, the Left will waste no time turning that into a headline, into attacks, and into attempts at undermining the work I’m doing in Congress.
We cannot afford to fall behind — not when the Democrats are more aggressive, more coordinated, and more willing to cross the line than ever before.
---
[HELP ME FIGHT BACK](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
If we don’t show strength in moments like this, they’ll attack me harder than ever.
_In service,_
| | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: I miss him. Every day.
body:
| | | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e30561061/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvbnE2N2tjU2U4Uw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjI/LbmNscTYxaHhZYg/qP2hpZHM9bmNqa0JTN2xOdHdQcHpscw/gaNGh5g/sfkfc4de8c4) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Patriot.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Patriot.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Patriot.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**P.S.** Patriot, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Patriot, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Patriot, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Patriot, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](test@test.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room.**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e30561061/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjI/LbmNscTYxaHhZYg/qP2hpZHM9bmNqa0JTN2xOdHdQcHpscw/gaNGh5g/s3t1bdd4830)

subject: Trump is turning ICE into his own anti-immigrant policing squad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Stoke chaos and fear to distract: It’s their M.O.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115718924/571238614/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFhYTI0MC1lYTk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc4lMTvjmRbowAf8rrhlBk4xAMhZbr834ghSXu2m0mM=)
The Supreme Court just co-signed Trump's extreme immigration policies.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115718925/571238615/789508428?refcode=250922_RG_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFhYTI0MC1lYTk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc4lMTvjmRbowAf8rrhlBk4xAMhZbr834ghSXu2m0mM=)**
[FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115718926/571238616/-309737922?refcode=250922_RG_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFhYTI0MC1lYTk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc4lMTvjmRbowAf8rrhlBk4xAMhZbr834ghSXu2m0mM=)
Last week, the Court overturned a federal judge’s order that had prevented federal agents in L.A. from stopping and questioning people about their immigration status based solely on their race.
**That means SCOTUS has essentially given Trump the green light to use ICE as his own anti-immigrant policing squad.**
ICE has been terrorizing California’s communities all summer, detaining people with no criminal record at car washes, grocery stores, and small businesses.
**It's not about safety. It’s about stoking chaos and fear to distract us from Trump’s blatant disregard for the law, like the Epstein cover-up.**
**[That’s why I’m fighting back in the courts, in Congress, and on the ground to stop this administration from terrorizing working families. But I need your help to reject this cruelty and protect our communities from Trump’s anti-immigrant policing squad. If you can, pitch in $25 or more to help me fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115718927/571238617/789508428?refcode=250922_RG_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFhYTI0MC1lYTk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc4lMTvjmRbowAf8rrhlBk4xAMhZbr834ghSXu2m0mM=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115718928/571238618/-309737922?refcode=250922_RG_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFhYTI0MC1lYTk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc4lMTvjmRbowAf8rrhlBk4xAMhZbr834ghSXu2m0mM=)
Right now, people with no records are being targeted because Donald Trump wants this country to believe that being Latino is a criminal offense.
Look, I won’t stand by as my friends, neighbors, and loved ones live in fear because of Trump’s extreme policies.
**I’m fighting like hell _every single day_ in Congress to stop him and his despicable agenda. **
Thanks for having my back,
Robert Garcia

clean_body: Stoke chaos and fear to distract: It’s their M.O. = The Supreme Court just co-signed Trump's extreme immigration policies. = = Last week, the Court overturned a federal judge’s order that had prevented federal agents in L.A. from stopping and questioning people about their immigration status based solely on their race. That means SCOTUS has essentially given Trump the green light to use ICE as his own anti-immigrant policing squad. ICE has been terrorizing California’s communities all summer, detaining people with no criminal record at car washes, grocery stores, and small businesses. It's not about safety. It’s about stoking chaos and fear to distract us from Trump’s blatant disregard for the law, like the Epstein cover-up. = = Right now, people with no records are being targeted because Donald Trump wants this country to believe that being Latino is a criminal offense. Look, I won’t stand by as my friends, neighbors, and loved ones live in fear because of Trump’s extreme policies. I’m fighting like hell every single day in Congress to stop him and his despicable agenda. Thanks for having my back, Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . clean_body: | | | Peter,This is Lauren Daniel’s husband, Zak. Let me get straight to the point...The Democrats HATE my wife because she stands for EVERYTHING they want to abolish: Christianity, the sanctity of life, and pro-family policies. Lauren’s campaign in battleground Georgia is under relentless attack for this very reason – the amount of money being raised against her is SHOCKING. You may hear the liberal media talk about Lauren... It’s nothing but lies, smears, and gross mischaracterizations. That’s why I’m sending you this email, Peter; so you can get to know the REAL Lauren. You see, as a proud Christian, Lauren has lived her faith through action —authored Addy’s Law to protect schoolchildren, increased the Child Tax Deduction to make parenthood more affordable, and introduced a Maternal & Infant Health Commission to combat Georgia’s high maternal and infant mortality rates.These aren’t just policies.These are LIFELINES for families, faith‐filled citizens, unborn children, and future generations. The saddest part is that Radical Democrats DESPISE her for it – dumping BILLIONS of dollars into propaganda to combat EVERYTHING she’s fighting for. They want to GLORIFY abortion,SILENCE prayer in public life,FORCE gender ideology into schools, and HIT middle‐class families with crushing taxes.And that means they will do anything to DEMONIZE and DEFEAT Lauren. If there was any moment to step up for your FAITH, for your FAMILY, for your RIGHTS—it is NOW. Lauren’s campaign is built on FAITH. Her will to fight comes from Scripture, prayer, and a firm conviction that God is calling her to serve. We cannot allow the Left to continue to SILENCE voices like Lauren’s... voices like YOURS.They will try to BLACKMAIL YOU the same way they have tried to BLACKMAIL Lauren – using your faith in God to convince you to be more “tolerant” of their radical agenda. We CANNOT let Christianity fall. We CANNOT let moral clarity be confused and obfuscated. We CANNOT let our God-given freedoms be stripped away by those who wish harm on our country and harm on our people. It’s time to put your faith, family, and freedom first. Rise up. Stand firm. Fight alongside Lauren. In Christ, Zak Daniel | | Paid for by Daniel for Georgia. PO Box 5, Forsyth, GA, 31029

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Are you kidding me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Folks — a DOGE whistle-blower has reported that team members at the so-called Department of Government Efficiency uploaded hundreds of millions of Americans’ personal, private data to a non-secure server.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
So while Trump hands out tax breaks to billionaires, he’ll take away your health care and food assistance — oh, and he’ll make it easier for your identity to be stolen.
Are you kidding me?
Being careless with Social Security data and risking identity theft for hundreds of millions of people is unacceptable.
Earlier this year, I introduced the Delete DOGE Act to stop DOGE from slashing and burning critical government agencies and services. Turns out, we also need to delete DOGE to stop them from slashing and burning our own data privacy and security measures.
I know it’s unlikely my Republican colleagues in the House will let my legislation get anywhere close to a floor vote — not to mention the hundreds of other bills Democrats have introduced this year to make our country stronger and more secure, lower our costs, and protect our rights.
That’s why we need to keep doing what we can to combat bad GOP legislation, and we need to put every ounce of energy we can into getting ready to flip the House next year.
Will you help? Donate any amount today to boost our resources ahead of 2026 so we can elect strong Dems and take back the majority! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks so much for being a part of this work. I’m with you every step of the way.
-Sara

body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=r1ORBwuNH5ZnHWKo6Nf4ff3DVdkWAIBJHQAOF3e6Vrvsi2u9Fl4jvVjs8q2RSseCHqkleU2vi3j1k3TqN6MDf%2FusAE1TyBOD1LhPl11idSVbSmMFdiyn0FdvZwTVfk3jbgJeHUG9NYS1HqOozRRMje13qZqlLBI94gS7eskAv%2FiOjTvT2qET6%2Fx6lVftNZu4jegB4FwSrYwjlwv%2FtHnymgyGYs0pl88SNy1UKTPxipHp%2BAsewvWP0d4WaAzJQFjZT4p0Q8z%2F0UL6j8LjN6N5Bnj4zxRclmWbja5CTM%2FeBHNJrkZ%2BMxBkyeFechQ%2BolUjZUAt7lfG%2B56hH3g8omvZiDE9mNtHJGVZZi9HBNt0rePePuKMS5ckh0GxthbKktTzkK3GCC%2B6A4GJOMvhoy5GnDC%2BTwuisr%2BKHc1N2pH5%2FpObjAC75pcf0%2B36acZg0pv5)
