Hi, it’s Raul, The upcoming special election in California will determine if we are redistricted. **From now until November 4, there is great uncertainty about the future of my race.** While Trump and MAGA strategists scramble to redistrict red states to steal the majority and continue to pass their extremist agenda, California is fighting back by redistricting to counter the red gains made in Texas and Missouri. Until November, my California colleagues and I are in limbo. Redistricting will change the trajectory of my race. I will need to increase our communications and outreach budgets so that I can introduce myself to new voters and earn their vote. If the proposition does not pass, Republicans will put a target on our backs. They would believe that Democratic voters are less engaged and more likely to defect in the Midterms. **Here's what that means for us:** whether the proposition passes or fails, we have a long road ahead and need urgent funds to fight the challenges ahead. We cannot sit by while we wait for the results of the special election and the future of California’s 25th district. We need to act now. In this uncertain time, we need to stay focused and prepared for whatever happens. We need to show the strength of our campaign when our FEC Q3 numbers go public in a few weeks. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi, it’s Raul, The upcoming special election in California will determine if we are redistricted. From now until November 4, there is great uncertainty about the future of my race. While Trump and MAGA strategists scramble to redistrict red states to steal the majority and continue to pass their extremist agenda, California is fighting back by redistricting to counter the red gains made in Texas and Missouri. Until November, my California colleagues and I are in limbo. Redistricting will change the trajectory of my race. I will need to increase our communications and outreach budgets so that I can introduce myself to new voters and earn their vote. If the proposition does not pass, Republicans will put a target on our backs. They would believe that Democratic voters are less engaged and more likely to defect in the Midterms. Here's what that means for us: whether the proposition passes or fails, we have a long road ahead and need urgent funds to fight the challenges ahead. We cannot sit by while we wait for the results of the special election and the future of California’s 25th district. We need to act now. In this uncertain time, we need to stay focused and prepared for whatever happens. We need to show the strength of our campaign when our FEC Q3 numbers go public in a few weeks. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

Fellow patriot,

I know firsthand what makes America exceptional — because I’ve lived it.

I was born in Bogota, Colombia. When I was just five years old, my parents brought our family to the United States in search of a better life. We didn’t come here with money, power, or connections. What we had was hope — and the chance to chase the American Dream.

At eighteen, I proudly raised my right hand and became an American citizen. That moment changed everything. From there, I worked hard, built one of the largest dealership groups in America, and later poured my energy into cutting-edge technology that’s helping transform industries today.

But success alone was never the finish line. The American Dream had given me everything — and I knew I had a responsibility to protect it for the next generation.

**That’s why I ran for Senate. That’s why I stand shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump and JD Vance. And that’s why I’ll never stop fighting for working families, securing our border, and putting America First.**

Because this country isn’t just my home. It’s my story. It’s my life. It’s my duty to defend it.

**Will you help me protect that story for millions of others?[Chip in $5, $10, or even $25 today to grow our America First movement.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c1d9c1497f2c47148bead90c840d70a7&_e=u7UgCAgIa447tcMZ7bHFetVLEubH0YVO1HOIuZT2iqbbq5KJnDgGk-eZ2S1-bHalpq_3eUYc-zB84odCIyaK339nSGlEpwN67NDAaDk12cubGZU42tRu6eZMVQ06mH99AfP9QKdX_JrtakGVnOBZiRjPre4qwqgBfjmHb0sGBprd27U4LMfll86dc7pqLNVGjzt0vI6auilQYBeNJinchFzdHIW-ptyGxgEoB7ozVQvXUDUPCU-Fak_lONybHySv9fmTuSXlCnIkeObAgzGz90KO8EbCE6e7GNvnsbo09H6WIjJsn5PWmghYcrf2vXP9iLHkZOflUV9eflltEQSNpsy-DjozQE8w0D5LN_RvzWU8JaBZcqRprnzJe6IDNB4p5JE00vu8xM0tXWc0oeSnQJi5J2F72tQPC6gOR1faCnmWpnJ9BgSAlc4mpB29VUma8M4Zd8T7jbBU8exjoDFKuPIuUjAWYfyoo9m2tmUWWqPaYPYl-oQm9XuzjMR688EStHzP3YNgXEiwoIiRBNqQrEOnjg8KzhpMJ3utPlbpafb4OqIRDdGyMqPkAce1csHe806CR2GV--IHHLzrKaZUaDXQF60WsKXZvzUQB6oivP-IGnYdsOvAyedLoxNxietZG91OS8ugor-Chsbrs1WGwQE0Viou1jeek0Kp-12avYY1V1TZb99yYU8an8_NGeJZ9AXiSZ1hxtYjWB5CJRJK7A%3D%3D)**

clean_body: The American Dream had given me everything — and I knew I had a responsibility to protect it for the next generation. | Fellow patriot, I know firsthand what makes America exceptional — because I’ve lived it. I was born in Bogota, Colombia. When I was just five years old, my parents brought our family to the United States in search of a better life. We didn’t come here with money, power, or connections. What we had was hope — and the chance to chase the American Dream. At eighteen, I proudly raised my right hand and became an American citizen. That moment changed everything. From there, I worked hard, built one of the largest dealership groups in America, and later poured my energy into cutting-edge technology that’s helping transform industries today. But success alone was never the finish line. The American Dream had given me everything — and I knew I had a responsibility to protect it for the next generation. That’s why I ran for Senate. That’s why I stand shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump and JD Vance. And that’s why I’ll never stop fighting for working families, securing our border, and putting America First. Because this country isn’t just my home. It’s my story. It’s my life. It’s my duty to defend it. Will you help me protect that story for millions of others? God bless America, Senator Bernie Moreno FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Adam Gray
subject: Two must-win races
body:
Nellie’s race and mine are both must-wins if we’re going to take back the House to get Congress back to work for the American people.

| |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115719605/571241378/-104113483?refcode=250922_ag_np_split_img&ms=250922_ag_np_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZmOGMxMDctZWQ5Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0xyvP6HQ-aI7Bb4sLl2OVCNrSgrXdpHVUmtCg8515pw=) Hey there, it’s Adam Gray, and I’m proud to represent California’s 13th Congressional District in Congress. In 2024, we flipped this seat by just 187 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. That margin tells you everything you need to know about how competitive this district is. We can’t take anything for granted heading into 2026. National Republicans have already made CA-13 a top target and they’re pouring resources into flipping it back. **[That’s why I’m reaching out today: Can you split a donation between our campaign and Nellie Pou’s? These are two of the most competitive races in the country, and both are critical to taking back the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115719609/571241383/-556270955?refcode=250922_ag_np_split_l1&ms=250922_ag_np_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZmOGMxMDctZWQ5Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0xyvP6HQ-aI7Bb4sLl2OVCNrSgrXdpHVUmtCg8515pw=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115719612/571241386/-556270955?amp;refcode=250922_ag_np_split&ms=250922_ag_np_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZmOGMxMDctZWQ5Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0xyvP6HQ-aI7Bb4sLl2OVCNrSgrXdpHVUmtCg8515pw=)

I'm respectfully asking: [Will you ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7de91db3-2d4f-477d-88a5-e71e42301aba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[split a $10 contribution right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c16df86-9325-457a-8890-8437e79effd6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[, before our midnight deadline?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43256f43-9274-4886-8a1a-f3919eb9ca6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation. That's why we've knocked on over 300,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history. _This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds._ Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win. Well, together, we pulled off the impossible. Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term. National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line. It may sound small, but your $10 contribution would help us make sure we can counter all the right-wing disinformation and continue sharing our agenda with voters. [So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute $10 (or even more!) right now to my campaign and Blue Amp Action so we raise the resources we need by our midnight deadline? Every dollar adds up and allows us to fund ads, organizers, yard signs, and other critical investments.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3a6b21f-51f3-444a-8753-7ec0c5d2d782/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7618b1db-7719-43db-870a-a7db4d6b5464/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: I'm a lifelong Ohioan
body:
Friend, I grew up right here, in the same house I still live in today. When I go to work every day in Congress, I'm fighting for my home too.

| |
---
Friend, I'm a lifelong Ohioan, through and through. I grew up right here in our district, in the same house I still live in today. And where I come from, a house still means a lot. My grandparents were Polish immigrants who chose to put down roots and raise their families in Toledo. My mom worked at Champion Spark Plug, where she helped organize the first union there, and my dad retired from Jeep to run a small family grocery store. **Owning this house meant more than just the security of a roof over our heads. It meant that we were part of a community where people looked out for us, and we looked out for them.** I have lived in this district, in the same house, for most of my life. My constituents are my friends and my neighbors. I'm honored to serve them and to fight for them in Washington. Governing is not always glamorous, friend. Crafting, amending, and passing legislation is a grueling process that requires dedication and patience. Often, we're up against long odds and big-money special interests. **[But I go to work every day with the same fire I had when I was first elected because I'm fighting for my home, too. Can I count on you to support our work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115719653/571241491/-1968428927?=250922_mk_lifelong_l1&ms=250922_mk_lifelong&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2RlNTkyOS1lZDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hr2fdFIKsv6wQstc-X5MxpHbugoazCbgCBTSnlFHavQ=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115719660/571241498/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250922_mk_lifelong&ms=250922_mk_lifelong&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2RlNTkyOS1lZDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hr2fdFIKsv6wQstc-X5MxpHbugoazCbgCBTSnlFHavQ=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115719661/571241499/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250922_mk_lifelong&ms=250922_mk_lifelong&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2RlNTkyOS1lZDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hr2fdFIKsv6wQstc-X5MxpHbugoazCbgCBTSnlFHavQ=)

### About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. name: Katie from Team Abdul
subject: A quick explainer as to why many campaigns (including ours) are fundraising right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250922-970&t=1001&akid=973%2E251025%2EYqZZSA ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250922-970&t=1002&akid=973%2E251025%2EYqZZSA ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi Peter, I’m Katie, Abdul’s Finance Director.

I’m reaching out because later this month, we’re facing our second
quarterly Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline.

Let me tell you, these deadlines are a big deal. Part of my job is making
sure we highlight the strength of this grassroots campaign when we file
our financial report to the FEC.

Leading up to this deadline, a lot of campaigns try to hype people up with
fake donation matches or those ALL CAPS subject lines. We don’t do that.
It’s just not who we are.

So instead, let me break it down simply:

1. Why we need grassroots support.

FEC reports are public. That means everyone will see exactly what we’ve
raised.

2. We do not take corporate PAC money, and are the only campaign that
never has!

This is our opportunity to send a clear message: A campaign that refuses
corporate PAC money and won’t pander to AIPAC has what it takes to win.

3. What we’re doing with your donations.

A huge chunk of our fundraising goes toward reaching more Michiganders.
Right now, that means more events on campuses, more town halls across the
state, and more chances for voters to meet Abdul face-to-face.

The earlier we build those connections, the stronger our campaign will be
when it counts most.

That’s why earning your support today matters so much. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250922-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250922-970&refcode2=973_251025_YqZZSA&akid=973%2E251025%2EYqZZSA ]If you’re able,
will you chip in $10 to help us submit a report that shows
the real power of this grassroots team?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250922-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250922-970&refcode2=973_251025_YqZZSA&akid=973%2E251025%2EYqZZSA ]Donate $10 ››

Thanks so much for being part of this,

Katie
Finance Director

[ Katie ]Katie and Abdul smiling for a photo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=973%2E251025%2EYqZZSA
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1005&akid=973%2E251025%2EYqZZSA

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

Peter,

A Republican has officially filed to run against me, which makes this race more urgent than ever. I only won by 2 points last year, and Republicans are determined to flip this seat back red. They’re already mobilizing resources, planning attack ads, and raising millions to try to take it.

On top of that, Trump and national Republicans have built a record-shattering war chest, and for the first time in years, Democrats are being outraised. With our FEC deadline at the end of the month, our numbers will be public, and we don’t want to look weak heading into the next phase of this campaign.

[_**That’s why we’re aiming for a big fundraising surge to show we have the resources to compete and defend this district. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If we lose this seat, we lose the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
New Hampshire is a make-or-break Senate race for Democrats.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250922_1_warren?refcode=em20250922-2490&amount=5&refcode2=2490_582294_GtqmGJ&akid=2490%2E582294%2EGtqmGJ)
Right now Republicans in the Senate are doing the bidding of giant corporations, Big Oil, and Trump’s extremist MAGA base.
If we’re going to take back the majority and put our government on the side of working people, _we can’t lose a single Democratic-held seat._
**That’s why Chris Pappas’s race is so critical.**
Political analysts have already ranked it as _one of the most likely seats to flip red_ next year. And his Republican opponent, Scott Brown, is lining up to take it.
**Simply put: The path to a Democratic Senate majority runs straight through New Hampshire.**
Chris is a lifelong Granite Stater who’s delivered for New Hampshire families year after year: taking on Big Pharma so seniors can afford their prescriptions, defending reproductive freedom, protecting voting rights, and standing up for our veterans. He’s taken on powerful special interests before — and won.
**Special interests will spend whatever it takes to buy this seat for Republicans. The only way we beat them is with people-powered organizing — door by door, donation by donation. With the end-of-quarter deadline approaching quickly, we can’t afford to slow down now. We need to show the GOP and the pundits that we’re in this race to win it.**
[**Can you make a $5 donation today to help Chris Pappas defend New Hampshire’s Senate seat and keep the path to a Democratic majority alive?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250922_1_warren?refcode=em20250922-2490&amount=5&refcode2=2490_582294_GtqmGJ&akid=2490%2E582294%2EGtqmGJ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250922_1_warren?amount=5&refcode=em20250922-2490&refcode2=2490_582294_GtqmGJ&akid=2490%2E582294%2EGtqmGJ)**
I’m in this fight because I believe in what’s possible when Washington works for working families, not for the rich and powerful. Let’s fight together — and win.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250922-1?t=1&refcode2=2490_582294_GtqmGJ&akid=2490%2E582294%2EGtqmGJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2490%2E582294%2EGtqmGJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2490%2E582294%2EGtqmGJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2490%2E582294%2EGtqmGJ)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won — and I’ve lost — tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you: **Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support — right here, right now.** **[Please chip in every dollar you can spare to Sherrod and Martin Heinrich’s campaign. He just got back in the fight, and they need folks like you by his side ASAP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115720377/571244420/-1442464265?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250922_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk4MzhkNy1lZTk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lhVIKadF98WVTivT-SvuOYIrmyBG5-tWSiYUaIBdexI=)** We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt — the list goes on. We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd! _We have to get our country back on track — and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio._ Sherrod has spent his life fighting for workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people. **But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) — and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win.** **[Folks, if anyone can flip Ohio’s Senate seat, it’s Sherrod Brown. clean_body: Believe me when I tell you = Friend, it’s James Carville. I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won — and I’ve lost — tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you: Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support — right here, right now. = We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt — the list goes on. We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd! We have to get our country back on track — and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio. Sherrod has spent his life fighting for workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people. But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) — and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Martin Heinrich will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, James Carville | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Local Democracy Project
subject: This country is f'd up. Here's what we can do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
No sugar-coating it: our country is f'd up. Businesses and universities have caved to fascism. People are being disappeared from the streets. Social Security and healthcare are on the chopping block. Fascists are being canonized in stadiums by crowds of cheering fanatics who say that they hate us.
It does not feel good, safe, or hopeful to live in America. We are depressed. We feel hopeless. We are wondering what we can do.
**That's where we come in. Local Democracy Project is dedicated to building networks of resistance to the regime.**
How? By building networks of organized folks who feel like you and I around candidates running at the local level.
**[Our comeback begins in city councils, school boards, and local races first, and the number of anti-MAGA candidates we can support depends entirely on a HUGE response to emails like this. Please, restore our nation: donate to Local Democracy Project today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPvsmRm1e8vITch-2eqsS4-3M57TxDtAaY93XWI3XyaVskNIsqc8aaT4GNq5nuJLW_NGHKtwQBEgg6sIqAHjqsRREcO2MbpK0gIpNgbREAaAZZo3_53vnU0tZrYfZUP9nLnu4DeuNX3c9QCEetBX4A-1eA5pAZvt9jubtFcaBO78GHpBqbh9H9dOcoDwYmSdLOyaJbExUjSduOM7-P631L2Xr7VvntmOgGdJWNY7wZe0PgwjPYiQu86dUdCHxE75IV3h9dBFM32lpE9vtKqcVk98/4k4/J8aaf0fxSnmy-Y6MZ9J1mw/h0/h001.zQLo4eK_89dXZVdnWm8IwwWKrARSuwzXxdTk8dFPfdM)**

Not only are we grabbing power from MAGA in small red-town America — something MAGA has been doing for a long time — but we are wielding that power to stand up in every possible way we can to the regime.
**Your support now is more important than ever. We have found that 80% of the 500,000+ local seats go uncontested. We have found that most of these races cost less than $1k per race.**

name: Forward Party
subject: Defend Free Speech. Uphold the Constitution.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When politicians exploit the powers of government...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=late_september_fundraiser&n=1)
---
| Peter, When politicians exploit the powers of government to lean on private companies to silence voices they don’t like, it isn’t just political theater: it’s an assault on the First Amendment. Moves like this chill free expression and threaten the very freedoms our democracy depends on. That’s why the Constitution matters, and it’s why the Forward Party holds every candidate to the same standard: **they must pledge to uphold it, without compromise**. Just this year, over 50 Forward candidates have already made that pledge. They are campaigning to reject the extremes, focus on solutions, and put people over party politics. **But they can’t do it without you.** If you believe in protecting free speech, holding power accountable, and electing leaders who put principle over partisanship, now is the time to step up. We are asking you to chip in today – whatever amount feels right to you – to help power our growing slate of Forward leaders across the country. Even just $5, $15 or $25 makes a difference to ensure that these candidates – and the values they have pledged to uphold – can reach every voter to grow our movement. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=late_september_fundraiser&n=2 "Donate today to defend the Constitution and

Stefanik and the New York GOP are targeting Republican voters who turned out in the 2024 presidential election, but have not cast ballots in mayoral elections.” However, I’ll be perfectly honest with you, Fellow Patriot... If we don’t reach this critical goal, we’ll lack the funds we need to keep our operation running all the way through Election Day (and beyond as ballots are counted). That is why I’m officially launching our end-of-quarter fundraising push earlier than ever before with an ambitious target of 1,000,000 NEW grassroots contributions before September 30th. And given the scale of the threat we face, we need contributions from not just New York, but from all over the country. That is why I’ve also set an ambitious goal of securing a contribution from every single zip code in the United States of America to SAVE the largest city in America. You see, while it may be easy to dismiss this as a problem for New York alone, that couldn’t be further from the truth. The consequences of a Mamdani victory will not be limited to New York. The rise of Zohran Mamdani bears a lot of similarity to the rise of a radical young community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama. In fact, many are already calling Zohran Mamdani “the next Obama,” and Obama has even called Mamdani to offer his advice and support! Knowing what you know now, if you had the chance to destroy Obama’s political career before he rose to national prominence, wouldn’t you do everything in your power to do so? Well, this is our chance to STOP the next Obama! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

body:
Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c1ccce4dd2654afaad43fcbc18f4974d&_e=klozPyecH3_89ronR0Oq9TulY-NA62IQfQH7LxNXs_bnqal4CZvIcQTU7s3YoemPim0SsXsSxk0umgLHng4jzTwDva3Np7qS4zS_odXb5945E_a1AElTFhWulEXQd7Rwopk72VDaky3Gg7P316aO-rXF_cpRLZBPskZqHxVb49LEFEc-MFW6nQ3ukBMRkGIBql1kKXHIuymCEreAyUpGYhfExnXtB47BBWk3fdZQoG995A8a3M27Zx2mGWnPyuRprRh1HfAYZQoNIqSqOP4oR9e7P8uXMWHluMfGv7zqIqxCYyJ2qvcHgGgge70RNv1YKwrqlzk6iPanJOGG27uBfd0k9LZYQKW-Gbys9XyT_3p7U4r3-BZrakguPcb_nH3q4YzcNNYYxL9MdDGmW7ozIzJt07hBbVpiKqHHwCDJ0v6uAXkVMvH-n9xooOoD8jQi-2sH7yJTtKGlgc1sNMi5N8LVk29VgJo_-9K63_I-_0a-0NInzQ6iISnDw5KhGB4zyZdYOi7Q1_P34539fZvfmnLpZsxduiVXdRNvimUHxy3js0PMlZJZlyyTIZYrtY6tYaqzhnmRu176XxP1Bd2G_L46BPWokxkh_7fRL42zJUgNUelIszsJbYyEcN-uJcjbYJnkanXS_9E8I-nhr8NIR4Aj5RB_3W93N4qke3olMPY%3D)
---
Peter,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c1ccce4dd2654afaad43fcbc18f4974d&_e=klozPyecH3_89ronR0Oq9TulY-NA62IQfQH7LxNXs_bnqal4CZvIcQTU7s3YoemPim0SsXsSxk0umgLHng4jzTwDva3Np7qS4zS_odXb5945E_a1AElTFhWulEXQd7Rwopk72VDaky3Gg7P316aO-rXF_cpRLZBPskZqHxVb49LEFEc-MFW6nQ3ukBMRkGIBql1kKXHIuymCEreAyUpGYhfExnXtB47BBWk3fdZQoG-EE22fmsVCOsJwJiN4U3lNgVKd5U5dXQKdBg2JvgtYRM1vV5spvmJ-AxCmxPdw9zA1RbLePUs9BT6T_JPFM4GmGcYinse52VhqCusDurDp8CVoNa6OWACFE01Mu4qBYGa6K0uXA0pc-WIAJ-tmjU30-gCfSA8waM9Geg9J5FQqVwU1JGj6iA4uinDFMUbtErRXbOda1M_yt4fF0TENU4SHRySh-6rk69bOyyvosCT-1ZyMV_VM0jqzDdYWH-hM3Y1Bm758l6wkH2BphTEgE3Yy2Fo7vCru0AdDOPG9gJdHclX8_3vekJuk_grgqWANx7ujUVSPHoJAga71zZZTkiDCyHr22PF11vx0VA-hhdGbL86XDrh3p2zp4160bgkFTJiGPSZEQ5aeqUJhp4lEs_URNw30ol1sJt-4raNzCHGHnVjbCEW-71E5AuqklsLiOZI%3D)
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.

clean_body: Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Peter, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more... And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Fall into Autumn with Me!
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Hi Friend,
I hope you had a fun and relaxing summer! I’m excited to invite you to my Fall Reception on Wednesday, October 29, 2025, from 5:30–7:30 PM at the Largo Homewood Suites [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazz251029?refcode=email_250922_largo_blast1] in their Piscataway Room.
This will be a wonderful opportunity to connect, share updates on my priorities, discuss what our community needs to thrive, and explore how we can work together to create real, meaningful change. It has been a true blessing to serve District 24, and I would be honored to have you join me for an evening celebrating our progress.
If you can join me, or would like to make a contribution , you can get tickets and learn more at bit.ly/JazzOct29 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazz251029?refcode=email_250922_largo_blast1] . However, if you prefer to pay by check , they can be made payable to:
Friends of Jazz Lewis c/o Rice Consulting,
17 W. Courtland St. Suite 210,
Bel Air, MD 21014
If you have any questions, contact Rice Consulting at 410-838-6355 or email jazzlewis@riceconsultingllc.com [jazzlewis@riceconsultingllc.com] .
As always, I appreciate your support more than you know.
See you there,
Jazz
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazz251029?refcode=email_250922_largo_blast1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazz251029?refcode=email_250922_largo_blast1]
By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Since Michael's running a people-powered campaign, he wants to make sure he's on the same page with folks like you.
| | |
---
**Team, Michael needs you to see this:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115721131/571246731/-177970873?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk924-su-nd&refcode=jtk924-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzcxMWY2OC1lZjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDWgmi2tHipuVNoo022E2_BaRPuOcE5XNPWInP7K9SQ=&emci=c7841b07-8a95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=63711f68-ef97-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1295540)
Last week, the former CDC director testified under oath that**Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. pressured her to pre-approve changes to the childhood vaccine schedule from a handpicked advisory panel of anti-vax skeptics** – _just as kids started heading back to school._
But when she upheld her responsibility to protect America's kids and families, and refused to rubber-stamp his dangerous agenda,
**she was fired**.
To Michael Bennet, her testimony exposes RFK Jr.'s "leadership" for what it really is: **incompetent, politically motivated and potentially deadly.**
That's why he _grilled_ him under oath this month. He will never let someone like RFK stand in the way of public health.
**And now we want to know where you stand. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Don’t let more families be torn apart — stand with us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend,

Stories like Miguel Lopez's are becoming all too common. I flew down to Mexico City to meet with Miguel after he was deported despite being in the process of getting citizenship in the United States.

Miguel was detained for 10 days before being ripped from his family and sent back to Mexico. I promised his family that I would do everything in my power to reunite them.

Trump and Republicans claimed they were going after “the worst of the worst.” Instead, they are targeting people like Miguel and tearing them from their homes, their jobs, their community, and their families.

I encourage you to listen to my meeting with Miguel in Mexico City [https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/6u7bkrpc3ziuufbxb47zs/Rep.-Swalwell-meets-with-Miguel-Lopez-in-Mexico.mov?rlkey=2pjnljmf5z5rlpfb3vowqmepr&e=1&st=p79q9x7i&dl=0] and learn about how people like Miguel are staples in their community.

We can’t let this continue. Stand with me as I fight to reunite people like Miguel with their families and stop the mass deportation of innocent people going through the lawful process of obtaining residency in the United States.

In solidarity,
Eric
DONATE TO ERIC » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-aug2025-fr-august?refcode=E15329-20250921-MiguelLopez-footer-Immigration&amount=25]
http://go.txting.io/e8bRZP [http://go.txting.io/e8bRZP]
Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. Miguel was detained for 10 days before being ripped from his family and sent back to Mexico. I promised his family that I would do everything in my power to reunite them. Trump and Republicans claimed they were going after “the worst of the worst.” Instead, they are targeting people like Miguel and tearing them from their homes, their jobs, their community, and their families. I encourage you to listen to my meeting with Miguel in Mexico City [] and learn about how people like Miguel are staples in their community. We can’t let this continue. Stand with me as I fight to reunite people like Miguel with their families and stop the mass deportation of innocent people going through the lawful process of obtaining residency in the United States. In solidarity, Eric DONATE TO ERIC » [] [] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. Join Swalwell's Circle, Eric's inner circle of supporters, by committing to a $50 or more monthly contribution today! [] Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd like to receive only the most critical updates, sign up for his Break Glass in Case of Urgency list to receive less email. [] If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can unsubscribe: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress Swalwell For Congress P.O. Box 2847 Dublin, CA 94568 United States

The power of forgiveness is one of the greatest forces in the world, and our nation's strength is built on the foundation of the Gospel. Watching Erika forgive the man who killed her husband was nothing short of extraordinary, a living example of Christ's love and mercy in action.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4ec80456-b7ac-421d-b10d-f10075c99010?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Her courage reminds us that forgiveness is not weakness, but true power, and it's the Gospel that equips us to rise above even the deepest pain. [#Forgiveness](https://substack.com/redirect/2acfe3cc-9d22-41c3-90e0-d53710f9cf02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#PowerOfTheGospel](https://substack.com/redirect/69076e43-437b-4b5f-9249-f8a6f45c6552?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#Faith](https://substack.com/redirect/ab9cea25-dab2-4115-b8b1-37e6393f2c50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#ChristlikeLove](https://substack.com/redirect/37049766-7469-4908-8ed1-90805abeb15d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#Mercy](https://substack.com/redirect/0bdfda73-cec2-4976-bcbf-1a7378d8dd17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#Inspiration](https://substack.com/redirect/1540330b-8c37-4a52-8d2a-160bb519a93b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#Hope](https://substack.com/redirect/a232bbad-6e76-470a-8e9c-fd97688a3c5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#StrengthInChrist](https://substack.com/redirect/2b5a52c4-7765-40cf-bf45-69e95993e008?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

No ifs, ands, or buts, I’m showing up to vote Republican and defeat the Radical Left.

Sadly, the data reveals that far too many Republican voters have been sitting on the sidelines while the Left’s base keeps showing up in special elections.
In fact, the Left is taking yet another victory lap as I write you this email:
**“Democrats add 1 more vote in Congress after Virginia special election” _-Politico_**
We truly do not have any more room for error. We’re ONLY 1 SEAT over the _bare_ _minimum_ _threshold_ to declare a Majority in the House.
**And so, President Trump and I need to know who we can count on to show up to vote. I trust you’re one of them, Peter. But now let’s make it _official_.**

| | Reader,For far too long the New York Times has dominated American journalism. It calls itself the "paper of record" and claims it publishes "all the news that's fit to print." But Americans know that the Times doesn't have their best interests at heart. The good news is that the Times' historic rival is back in business and quickly reclaiming market share.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Brendan Carr and Tom Homan – and what we can do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I know things seem tough right now.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2349%2E135344%2EK5VWHg)

Friends -
President Trump has been flooding the zone with new actions and information since January 20th. It’s hard to keep up. So today I want to flag two things from last week that deserve your attention.
The first is about President Trump’s FCC Director, Brendan Carr, carrying out a coordinated attack on our free speech right out of the pages of Project 2025.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3861?t=2&akid=2349%2E135344%2EK5VWHg)
The next day President Trump's Department of Justice is shutting down an investigation into Tom Homan, the “Border Czar” in the White House, who allegedly accepted a $50,000 cash bribe in a paper bag from undercover FBI agents.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3862?t=3&akid=2349%2E135344%2EK5VWHg)
We cannot become numb to this. And we can fight back.
The lessons on how to fight back can be found in what we did during Trump's first administration – particularly on health care. Back then, Trump and House Republicans repealed the Affordable Care Act. It ended up dying in the Senate.
How did we do that? We educated people – normal people who don't have time to doom-scroll or watch cable news. We mobilized Americans across the country, in both parties.
We can do it again – especially after President Trump made big health care cuts in his "Big Beautiful Bill." It is what I am trying to do with rallies, speeches and town halls across Michigan and stops in a few other states.
But I need your help to continue that work, because there are costs associated with those efforts, and obviously, we spent down our fundraising in order to win the election.
**[Can you please contribute $5, $50, or whatever you can afford to my campaign? I will put your donation to continue cutting through the noise and organizing to stop President Trump's efforts to take away our health care.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep25.bZDurS&refcode=em250922-1&t=4&akid=2349%2E135344%2EK5VWHg)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep25.WUs7Df&amount=3&refcode=em250922-1&t=23&akid=2349%2E135344%2EK5VWHg)**
---
****

| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-sep25.FYVfZR&refcode=em250922-1&t=27&akid=2349%2E135344%2EK5VWHg)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep25.WUs7Df&refcode=em250922-1&t=28&akid=2349%2E135344%2EK5VWHg)**

****
Thank you,
Elissa

East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Troy Downing
subject: These Warriors Fought for America. Now They Need YOU.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My fellow veterans need your support.

| | |

This is Congressman Troy Downing, Combat Veteran and proud conservative patriot. I’m reaching out with an urgent request – because the fight for America doesn’t end on the battlefield. It continues in the halls of Congress, and that’s where we need YOU.

Right now, six of my fellow warriors, also Freshman GOP Congressmen, are on the front lines of a different kind of battle: defending our Constitution, securing our borders, and standing up for American values against the radical Left.

These leaders don’t just talk the talk – they’ve served, sacrificed, and stood in the gap for this nation. But they can’t do it alone.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
**[Will you chip in today and SPLIT a donation between these America First Veteran Congressmen to help them start their first term strong?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-ynYj2xEA_9k24Vw)**
---
[ SPLIT A DONATION ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
The Left has deep pockets filled with special interest money. But we have something stronger: patriots like you who believe in faith, freedom, and the future of our country.

Your contribution isn't just a donation – it's an investment in leadership forged by service and tested under fire.

**[Let’s send a message that America’s warriors don’t back down – on the battlefield OR in Congress.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ SPLIT A DONATION ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
For America,

Congressman Troy Downing
Combat Veteran | America First Conservative
---
---

body:

| Peter,

Early voting is officially underway in Virginia, and every vote counts.

This year, the stakes are higher than ever. Abigail Spanberger, the Democratic nominee for Governor, and a full third of the candidates in the House of Delegates are Emerge alums. As the last Southern state protecting reproductive rights, these Virginia alums are on the frontlines, ready to fight for reproductive freedom, progressive policies, and democracy itself.

Virginia's elections are a bellwether for the nation. What happens here will set the tone for the 2026 midterms and beyond.

[_**Can you chip in $25 today to ensure the next generation of women leaders are ready to step up, run for office, and win? clean_body: Early voting is officially underway in Virginia, and every vote counts. This year, the stakes are higher than ever. | = | Peter, Early voting is officially underway in Virginia, and every vote counts. This year, the stakes are higher than ever. Abigail Spanberger, the Democratic nominee for Governor, and a full third of the candidates in the House of Delegates are Emerge alums. As the last Southern state protecting reproductive rights, these Virginia alums are on the frontlines, ready to fight for reproductive freedom, progressive policies, and democracy itself. Virginia's elections are a bellwether for the nation. What happens here will set the tone for the 2026 midterms and beyond. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with us, Team Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

| | | | I’ll be straight with you, Peter: _Washington’s a mess._ Folks up there are more interested in protecting their own power than serving the people who sent them. That’s why I’m running. I’m ready to clean house. **And as of today, we're 15 days away from election day.** **[**DONATE $15**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UBNey2V7JU4IAqikk1RCig~~/AAUS1hA~/kirg3Sv6gAn8BdUfVvcJWjA8hXlUjz3G-vqTHgzEmo2NpxoAv3938TcsfKhrnPshMchFXJWrD7ToJ180bhxfKykrMnQYTzETIfFMlLesMRvWyow0eInjxYISRKmGcTZPWdB88sxRVJ0CWEaCqYEe-va536JfFikYbZ2t1YDBwqQmNKZ0ujYN73HXvlYai6fK7MnExDLzeOoOdK6p8Z1O_5LREb-0VApKddfSfrDEhpxhSXH3vLiesbfyhKxlBPMZvirK0p7fkJyAcLlCEnA4-bkwkPB5HWLhJ8vUYxtBFvM~)** I can’t do it alone, Peter. This movement only works if we’ve got real power behind it like neighbors willing to knock doors, pick up the phone, and talk to folks across TN-07. And it takes resources to keep that fight going. **Here’s what we’re organizing this week:**
* Volunteer Training Sessions
* Community canvassing
* Phone Banks
* Digital outreach teams

The political establishment isn’t going to fix itself. If we want change, we’ve got to roll up our sleeves and make it happen. **[And, right now we’re just 15 days away from election day and 8 days away from our end-of-quarter deadline. Can I count on you today to chip in anything you can afford today?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/fe94zVGvAZnhfSCDnJIIRg~~/AAUS1hA~/Hw8H62Q4NCiGBNfBMt5VBFg-gyz17jvAe42l7gtzyHQWxCNeo7bz9NPczlfgCWxmEUHnCKQBCzO-jYcqBbR4YVl6sihBcCKt3M0DScFiVzUanp-2ZQuiK3c_ipWAIHGBjiSlsZZhMo011CRCom38S2036_qP7aPVNR6gq9iIBN-kNUGWyg9O_xYNqv54cD1iy5XHPuQcRf2vRvEVt0zSsGmKTdME8QPyUq8ndJVyep4zVlE0i-5Eq_XjAgsiGjZS7WV2C8JwUBfoVJkWzgHmOQ~~)** **[**VOLUNTEER**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ArA79rKmCf1zY7JgXkQVLQ~~/AAUS1hA~/c37IGuz4lBNtDbnd3zuzpMhJy0wGr0DGUcJhh6Ud2QsuBBkU9aSHLXQmFA2NFwfZzZC-7kH89Y-w3bxPVr-D7PCFmzJGPhPwfwBhzrcse6AydUqMLFIJ-G3OdlOsIgQiibfhP1_WHJ1_UWTYxVA7LPvuwDMU0KcebUQoFfkloBA~)** **[**DONATE TODAY**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/fe94zVGvAZnhfSCDnJIIRg~~/AAUS1hA~/Hw8H62Q4NCiGBNfBMt5VBFg-gyz17jvAe42l7gtzyHQWxCNeo7bz9NPczlfgCWxmEUHnCKQBCzO-jYcqBbR4YVl6sihBcCKt3M0DScFiVzUanp-2ZQuiK3c_ipWAIHGBjiSlsZZhMo011CRCom38S2036_qP7aPVNR6gq9iIBN-kNUGWyg9O_xYNqv54cD1iy5XHPuQcRf2vRvEVt0zSsGmKTdME8QPyUq8ndJVyep4zVlE0i-5Eq_XjAgsiGjZS7WV2C8JwUBfoVJkWzgHmOQ~~)** **[**EARLY VOTE LOCATIONS**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/_U5_HBod1B0Ummqih0EkWg~~/AAUS1hA~/NA6Xgf66rJqubFbRK0lnmV9rsdfep2hnuA0sjrwGXcqGSJ0_G-pr2T0tJng8XTV4GfWcuwr0fW4yxW29TLuFlVgdPFayOEcjbyUnzcI_uJS0yNianXnrUxRJH7GLAbb5rPFYrI8LJqkWae9E8xBaBg~~)** Let’s get to work. _Vincent Dixie_ [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/GkLYZc1Fmx68Myf8vATGNg~~/AAUS1hA~/kirg3Sv6gAn8BdUfVvcJWjA8hXlUjz3G-vqTHgzEmo2NpxoAv3938TcsfKhrnPshMchFXJWrD7ToJ180bhxfKykrMnQYTzETIfFMlLesMRvWyow0eInjxYISRKmGcTZPWdB88sxRVJ0CWEaCqYEe-va536JfFikYbZ2t1YDBwqQmNKZ0ujYN73HXvlYai6fK7MnExDLzeOoOdK6p8Z1O_x3Q3hxb0sGFt_zXZ7ooPvp1SInwXKEVYEDNZ7mio7OD2w5d3ksDapb1kDPSSWW-vCzGz4PYTrZz9OY8ziaMG64~)

Vincent Dixie ~ Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. name: Governor Joe Lombardo
subject: I’m Running for Re-Election
body:
Help me finish the job
| | | | | [](https://xfumircbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dckEAWzLQSk86OQfAvhBX_isZ3OjjgWjHKMWsFe_0hfcvFM4E61kZqAN13RzQXw6-U6n5JTb8Lpxq1xTCQ7NymHbC5DZeooEuyuG6dy1HConQZUuD_K_ziJ4iK8BxVIUU9MyOzZPEQYf-igQCyVlTfJm2HJad8UHo1ttHjINWNU=&c=bl0DUQgcYDrNsK_OczQgSxW6h4IpIW91vEsdj7TLZs0NhddIknWfVQ==&ch=zIQz2H5-r--UAQ6CeHsBtzhQuYbdi3i8aJrlps5i4kmpM20sWrTLhg==)
---
| Peter,
---
| When I was elected in 2022, I made a promise to Nevadans that I would lead with integrity, keep our neighborhoods safe, and protect the Nevada way of life.
When I took office, Nevada was facing real challenges. Families were struggling, crime was rising, and too many of our students were falling behind. Our state was suffering under the radical policies of the Democrat agenda. When election day came in 2022, Nevadans had the choice to help Nevada move forward or be stuck in the past with failed policies and weak liberal leadership.
Nevadans chose, and my calling came.
Voters across the state put their faith in me to get Nevada back to work. It was time to deliver real results. It was time to get sh!t done.
---
| | [](https://xfumircbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dckEAWzLQSk86OQfAvhBX_isZ3OjjgWjHKMWsFe_0hfcvFM4E61kZlHeZRIHZwLgNAPUdVFAfElKkOkM3jRFicz5gDEBdOrB6C6pIkjQEOp9EUmHq1osmSKVEy6wqxsa83Sl7YA0x7Ok9jSPhIiqA0JarztWg3du7-WHJnmqRHwtn15cyA5IMfEfuzDiMFur&c=bl0DUQgcYDrNsK_OczQgSxW6h4IpIW91vEsdj7TLZs0NhddIknWfVQ==&ch=zIQz2H5-r--UAQ6CeHsBtzhQuYbdi3i8aJrlps5i4kmpM20sWrTLhg==)
---
| Now, our economy is thriving, students and teachers have more support in the classroom, and Carson City is back to working for the people.
We've accomplished so much in just three years, and the Radical Left has put a target on my back. As of this email, the Democrats are making plans to halt the progress we've made, take back the Governor's mansion, and have unchecked single-party rule in 2026. The bottom line...they want to flip our state blue.
Just like in 2022, the Left is going to be pouring millions into our race to place another puppet for their agenda in the Governor's mansion. You and I both know that Nevadans deserve better.
With your support, I know that I can win again and keep delivering results--because that's the Nevada way.
It's time to finish the job.
---
| For Victory, Governor Joe Lombardo

P.S. For campaign updates and more information, please visit [www.joelombardofornv.com](https://xfumircbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dckEAWzLQSk86OQfAvhBX_isZ3OjjgWjHKMWsFe_0hfcvFM4E61kZqAN13RzQXw6-U6n5JTb8Lpxq1xTCQ7NymHbC5DZeooEuyuG6dy1HConQZUuD_K_ziJ4iK8BxVIUU9MyOzZPEQYf-igQCyVlTfBDur7HYVp8D-Z1dOF8O1E=&c=bl0DUQgcYDrNsK_OczQgSxW6h4IpIW91vEsdj7TLZs0NhddIknWfVQ==&ch=zIQz2H5-r--UAQ6CeHsBtzhQuYbdi3i8aJrlps5i4kmpM20sWrTLhg==) to learn more about how you can get involved.
---

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: You knew Charlie’s voice. I knew his heart.
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207mwrdg2wmcowcchf0q4fb1hlr43y2yhnrzl0hdl7nho2xehm82eo8vn0y8oxliejst5r0o57vw1nn2n1d&__stmp=t30c09&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
| | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30c09&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Friend, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30c09&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: David Hogg
subject: A redline has been crossed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Some thoughts on Jimmy Kimmel’s suspension:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250922-1&t=1&akid=2680%2E587540%2E8UvcO7)
Peter,
A family member recently warned me not to post critically about Trump or J.D. Vance — not because I’d be sued or canceled or anything like that.
But because they were worried for my safety.
They compared it to the Panopticon — a prison where a single guard watches from a central tower, and prisoners fall in line because they think they’re being watched. Even when they’re not.
That's how authoritarianism creeps in. It's a chilling effect. You stop speaking out. You self-censor. You start to wonder: _"What will they do to me if I say something?”_
And last week, something deeply disturbing happened.
Jimmy Kimmel’s show was suspended after he made comments about Charlie Kirk. Let’s be clear: a late-night host losing his platform for criticizing a right-wing extremist is a massive redline — not just for democracy, but for free speech.
**If we don’t push back now, this becomes the new normal.**
This isn’t just about Jimmy Kimmel or me or anyone else with a platform. It’s about what happens when speaking up becomes dangerous — and silence becomes survival.
But I didn’t survive a school shooting to live in fear.
And we didn’t start Leaders We Deserve to tiptoe around extremists.
We launched this movement to fight for a future that isn’t ruled by fear — where free speech, democracy, and truth still matter. That means electing a new generation of Democrats who aren’t afraid to speak out and stand up.
**[If you agree that we can’t stay silent, will you rush a $5 donation right now to help us elect bold, young leaders who will fight back?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250922_1_kimmel?refcode=em20250922-2680&amount=5&refcode2=2680_587540_8UvcO7&akid=2680%2E587540%2E8UvcO7)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250922_1_kimmel?amount=5&refcode=em20250922-2680&refcode2=2680_587540_8UvcO7&akid=2680%2E587540%2E8UvcO7)**
Thank you,
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250922-1&t=2&refcode2=2680_587540_8UvcO7&akid=2680%2E587540%2E8UvcO7)**

clean_body: Some thoughts on Jimmy Kimmel’s suspension: Peter, A family member recently warned me not to post critically about Trump or J.D. Vance — not because I’d be sued or canceled or anything like that. But because they were worried for my safety. They compared it to the Panopticon — a prison where a single guard watches from a central tower, and prisoners fall in line because they think they’re being watched. Even when they’re not. That's how authoritarianism creeps in. It's a chilling effect. You stop speaking out. You self-censor. You start to wonder: "What will they do to me if I say something?” And last week, something deeply disturbing happened. Jimmy Kimmel’s show was suspended after he made comments about Charlie Kirk. Let’s be clear: a late-night host losing his platform for criticizing a right-wing extremist is a massive redline — not just for democracy, but for free speech. If we don’t push back now, this becomes the new normal. This isn’t just about Jimmy Kimmel or me or anyone else with a platform. It’s about what happens when speaking up becomes dangerous — and silence becomes survival. But I didn’t survive a school shooting to live in fear. And we didn’t start Leaders We Deserve to tiptoe around extremists. We launched this movement to fight for a future that isn’t ruled by fear — where free speech, democracy, and truth still matter. That means electing a new generation of Democrats who aren’t afraid to speak out and stand up. Thank you, David

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: We can’t leave anything to chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250922-609&t=1&akid=609%2E294397%2E5O8zAz)
Folks,
The next Wisconsin Supreme Court justice will serve for *ten* years.
That’s longer than most elected officials’ terms — and in that decade, one Supreme Court justice could shape the rules we all live by.
We need that person to be Judge Chris Taylor.
Chris has spent her career standing up for Wisconsinites, and she’s devoted to protecting our rights and ensuring everyone is treated equally under the law.
Our court will rule on cases determining the future of reproductive healthcare, workers’ rights, and our democracy. **We can’t leave anything to chance, especially not when right-wing special interests are trying to buy this seat.**
[**If you’re with us, chip in $10 for 10 years to power the people-first campaign Wisconsin deserves.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250922_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250922-609&refcode2=609_294397_5O8zAz&akid=609%2E294397%2E5O8zAz)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: some bad news, some good news:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
It’s going to take all of us working together to keep this seat blue and help Democrats take back the Senate in 2026.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115722516/571251389/1435897075?refcode=email_092225_badnews-rs2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUwMGM5Ni1mNDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=65AkUx3t4z6A3sdQ9q4UxEDO53T4mXNw5yymOHqvyKA=&emci=b2d2fd1d-7c95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=24e00c96-f497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715) I have to share some bad news with you: **the Senate map this cycle is brutal, and Democrats have no path to retaking the Senate majority in 2026 without defending seats like Colorado’s.** Just let that sink in for a moment, folks. **If we lose this seat, there goes our best chance of rebuilding our Democratic Senate majority to halt Trump and Republicans’ extreme agenda and continue making progress for working people** — like expanding access to health care, keeping jobs here in America, tackling the sky-high cost of living, _and more._ Now here’s the good news. **I’ve got one heck of a card up my sleeve: this incredible grassroots team.** Look, National Republicans have been eyeing this seat ever since we won in 2020 and flipped Colorado blue. But this seat has a history of flipping back and forth, so we can’t afford to get complacent and let the GOP tighten its grip on Congress. **Folks, that means it’s going to take all of us working together to keep this seat blue and help Democrats take back the Senate in 2026.[If you’re up for that fight, please, take a moment to chip in a couple bucks to my campaign and help us prepare for the long road ahead. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115722517/571251391/-984874665?refcode=email_092225_badnews-rs2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUwMGM5Ni1mNDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=65AkUx3t4z6A3sdQ9q4UxEDO53T4mXNw5yymOHqvyKA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115722518/571251398/-984874665?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_092225_badnews-rs2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUwMGM5Ni1mNDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=65AkUx3t4z6A3sdQ9q4UxEDO53T4mXNw5yymOHqvyKA=)

subject: These aren’t the actions of a political party who believes their ideas are popular
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS

There’s a pretty simple reason why extreme Kansas Republicans are pushing the most aggressive gerrymander in the history of our state.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115722537/571251499/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2UwMGM5Ni1mNDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtjb-cba7otqVE0qw_lESUzVIEvf7SCCKz4CRB78sJw=) There’s a pretty simple reason why extreme Kansas Republicans are pushing the most aggressive gerrymander in the history of our state. **It’s because they’re losing — and they know it.** [_**Kansas Republicans know they can’t win here in KS-03 unless they cheat, so they’re trying to stack the deck and pray that we won’t notice. That’s why we need your help. Can you chip in right away to help Sharice spread the word against this partisan power grab while we still have the chance to stop it?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115722538/571251500/-2097022923?refcode=email_092225_aggressive&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2UwMGM5Ni1mNDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtjb-cba7otqVE0qw_lESUzVIEvf7SCCKz4CRB78sJw=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115722539/571251501/-2097022923?refcode=email_092225_aggressive&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2UwMGM5Ni1mNDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtjb-cba7otqVE0qw_lESUzVIEvf7SCCKz4CRB78sJw=)

These extreme politicians are waking up to the fact that Kansans are seeing right through their lies and empty promises. So they’re panicking.
They’re pushing a plan to separate Johnson County — the most populous county in Kansas — into multiple Congressional districts and dilute the power of Democratic voters. **They saw exactly what Missouri did to Kansas City, cracking the metro area into _three_ separate districts — and they’re ready to take that same blueprint here.**
That’s not democracy. That’s the very definition of powerful politicians choosing their own voters behind closed doors and rigging an election before it even happens.
These aren’t the actions of a political party who believes their ideas are popular. Republicans _know_ they’d lose in a fair fight next year — so they’re doing everything they can to end competitive elections here in Kansas as we know it.
[_**We can’t allow Donald Trump to install his hand-picked candidate here in KS-03 without giving voters a say. Please, chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can to help Sharice keep fighting back against this naked political power grab while we still have time.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115722540/571251502/-2097022923?refcode=email_092225_aggressive&amounts=10,20,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2UwMGM5Ni1mNDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtjb-cba7otqVE0qw_lESUzVIEvf7SCCKz4CRB78sJw=)

clean_body: I’ve been in some tough situations before, but this could be the hardest mountain I’ll have to climb... | | This is it. We're down to the wire. My election is less than 2 months away, and the future of Virginia and our nation hangs in the balance! I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I'm running for Governor of Virginia. But I'm not just running for office--I'm running to stop the liberal establishment from destroying our country. They're pouring MILLIONS into my Democrat opponent's campaign, and we're running out of time--chip in NOW to protect our country's future. I need 1,000 Patriots like you to contribute to my campaign in the next hour. If we can do that, I know we can win this. But if we fall short, the consequences will be devastating: higher taxes, more regulations, and a government completely out of touch with our values. Your donation right now can make all the difference. Let's send a loud and clear message that we won't back down. Thank you for standing with me when it matters most. Together, we can protect our values and continue leading America in the right direction. -Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.
