name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: Virginia is NOT for Sale
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
I want to level with you. Our opponent is one of the largest landlords in Danville. He thinks he can buy this seat.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2dfca9123148/virginia-is-not-for-sale?e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=f4c33c108d&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | | | | | | | | | | | Friends,
I want to level with you. **Our opponent is one of the largest landlords in Danville. He has made a fortune off renting to our community.** When the chance came to give people an option besides breaking the bank on overpriced rent,**he was the only member of the council to vote against an affordable housing project.**
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=8c80ff5013&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | That tells you everything you need to know about who he fights for.
Here is the kicker: **Danville is one of the few localities in Virginia with its own municipal power grid, a legacy of the New Deal. Dominion Power has wanted it for years.** Our opponent just took $10,000 from Dominion, more than half of his entire cash on hand. He is sitting on only $18,000, and Dominion is counting on him to be their man inside Richmond.
**I do not take a dime from Dominion.** I do not vote for my best interest; I vote for the best interest of the people. I always have, and I always will. Our city, and all of Southside, is not for sale.
This is our chance. He is vulnerable right now, but only if we have the funds to get our message out. **Dominion and the landlord lobby are not going to sit this out**. If we go dollar for dollar with them in these final weeks, we win. If we do not, we risk letting one of the most self-interested politicians in Virginia slip into office.
I need you to step up today. Not next week. Not tomorrow. **Today.**
Your [contribution of $50, $100, or $250](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=d31aeb4402&e=606d7e9aa2) **will go straight into keeping ads on the air, signs in the ground, and organizers in the field**. Every dollar matters.
**We cannot afford to let Dominion and a self-funded landlord buy this seat. Let us prove once again that the people’s voices are louder than corporate checks.**

---
| [DONATE](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=f6f8c2fd73&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | With determination,

Dr. Gary Miller
Democratic Nominee
House of Delegates
49th District
---
| | | | | [](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=041c7ad2e9&e=606d7e9aa2)
---

---

clean_body: I want to level with you. Our opponent is one of the largest landlords in Danville. He thinks he can buy this seat. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, I want to level with you. Our opponent is one of the largest landlords in Danville. He has made a fortune off renting to our community. When the chance came to give people an option besides breaking the bank on overpriced rent,he was the only member of the council to vote against an affordable housing project. | | That tells you everything you need to know about who he fights for. Here is the kicker: Danville is one of the few localities in Virginia with its own municipal power grid, a legacy of the New Deal. Dominion Power has wanted it for years. Our opponent just took $10,000 from Dominion, more than half of his entire cash on hand. He is sitting on only $18,000, and Dominion is counting on him to be their man inside Richmond. I do not take a dime from Dominion. I do not vote for my best interest; I vote for the best interest of the people. I always have, and I always will. Our city, and all of Southside, is not for sale. This is our chance. He is vulnerable right now, but only if we have the funds to get our message out. Dominion and the landlord lobby are not going to sit this out. If we go dollar for dollar with them in these final weeks, we win. If we do not, we risk letting one of the most self-interested politicians in Virginia slip into office. I need you to step up today. Not next week. Not tomorrow. Today. Your will go straight into keeping ads on the air, signs in the ground, and organizers in the field. Every dollar matters. We cannot afford to let Dominion and a self-funded landlord buy this seat. Let us prove once again that the people’s voices are louder than corporate checks. | | | With determination, Dr. Gary Miller Democratic Nominee House of Delegates 49th District | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE 121 Bell Ct.Danville, VA 24541 | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Gary Miller for House of Delegates 121 Bell Ct Danville, VA 24541-4907 * USA

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: I miss him. Every day.
body:
I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1c4a6b2a7f3e47e9bcc143482b3e2a9f&_e=BorN73zx0sOP9eMlWYXKXIUe30u-jHG1EAFnVGxYrzQxYCIm4oyMrQzkzDwbN3CJmILKWkkvPuqcxI6CVMfwQ0dD-pddbRCCa4vidjLnKIW4b2G8N3aahb7B12H-8zN6Ng5eh3vbQeiHZy15VQCVb3x2eDIOcXYAsKDSK_BmC1PRoZDC_GwY8BOKEjVzKRTlxnEOsm1oYipCCKj3aEmYR_acQVzvVbjuwN7eh_IBsqxhVd9AOe5W6XfGlNOhmxSAy36ychOB-KRpZozn1L6-g6bj_9_MaK5FCoNRc2_jZnICdr5grF-6MFFyQnaJOKuQ8McUXlMyO6wPMBcKxeCClFk6ZaIWuUJqd5KWZc_t6Alfcp_wEp-FRv_JHqINl6_aEDHuy_5_PsvRsxXzTVkuUqrDg3_VjaTntPtmCMimM8DOZ6HxaYI-yBL4Q6KWy_ee4ScGXTp0sh1EQZ-4CKUyhs5vmOm_qjcy-auFWyKcJ0odJSz0kgGqFKR0dx2kU5I0Z8dDh4cYMWvjnzIQotBoeYYEcM97k25Xn-zremAfAqJZiApUq5kcX88pa25g3iV82D0rwKZA4OgP-cJN8yRa7TcVXHIQBIFWsKYwLGrX1K-sFODLFzZ5qo14Mlp4AAz6vQ5aKU7ZOQEcBIUoDhy-gZ8d9C-YgWmx09wkA9Tf5oNB3WpxGXgGd9rKyys9ZWYm5FTAlFqIXUtvnQC9DTgruA%3D%3D)
Peter,

I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1c4a6b2a7f3e47e9bcc143482b3e2a9f&_e=BorN73zx0sOP9eMlWYXKXIUe30u-jHG1EAFnVGxYrzQxYCIm4oyMrQzkzDwbN3CJmILKWkkvPuqcxI6CVMfwQ0dD-pddbRCCa4vidjLnKIW4b2G8N3aahb7B12H-8zN6Ng5eh3vbQeiHZy15VQCVb3x2eDIOcXYAsKDSK_BmC1PRoZDC_GwY8BOKEjVzKRTlxnEOsm1oYipCCKj3aEmYR_acQVzvVbjuwN7eh_IBsqxhVd9AOe5W6XfGlNOhmxSA8w-7oBRzHhvO5RTdOd5KvQmub8OqUdeWPm97jfgZTQmYKujFKxPvMCxEYKuUhI77_3sDiqe1WRb0EuXZIQLvqcur1v5yGbn2B2b_BG7zpLr12C-1b9rcq-Ifn1K-N1DdLEatgpqMekdUGCZEw3JEpMgN7cM-G0mgUK-Ux-eHCRBBz0yTzhksj--tXXBZe7WMhcseIksDfZiqgCqftxUPPoVi2fBHsufUMoGGXpLkVAupGPkNbrsDF8RAEuGOq0pfJAVz5OBBeqxCEZI0T1i83VlOrAzVfTW9wQPRrZNudcqq9fPRG_Jrz12Rp5wt3VObDz8nzOcUJhi8tKVab1CUflir2hkzzufEiRKWMNTU_6n0BVIJUzUcUSzO7xqkEVhc43PU9cgE0zrThRgxBmhwY1E4PonYGbhqT1BK57qxTen-BNK_QS2-ZLQinSvCC-IPxubJrhbBEvKn-QdR8aav1Q%3D%3D)
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Peter. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1c4a6b2a7f3e47e9bcc143482b3e2a9f&_e=BorN73zx0sOP9eMlWYXKXIUe30u-jHG1EAFnVGxYrzQxYCIm4oyMrQzkzDwbN3CJmILKWkkvPuqcxI6CVMfwQ0dD-pddbRCCa4vidjLnKIW4b2G8N3aahb7B12H-8zN6Ng5eh3vbQeiHZy15VQCVb3x2eDIOcXYAsKDSK_BmC1PRoZDC_GwY8BOKEjVzKRTlxnEOsm1oYipCCKj3aEmYR_acQVzvVbjuwN7eh_IBsqxhVd9AOe5W6XfGlNOhmxSAigyLIEujAmaZ7ynV-RraTGeVOsxGP-E4qvPVMUwNL_lAPEAVbA6agU-rWjx__HgSuuf7ur2Y4p84iJQ3tVLo6tqKqZjUp9pEuARW5ADrqlswXwT2l3c2xTaMaA-6lyYqqqYkf3Ae_pVGABLCUySk1IlDMnLWOJAEO_Mnb4P3T7UXClcAa0hIhenoGHLu-rZd6ju_i9-zsYCeLMVu2n3d4S1HaIrZ9NBo0Nb_rTIaqLHGNQEMeO1VpQeZo0BlLmJ7vso9LaLsMpqzMnY6u3sWE5bnSVc5u9dA8LYpJ9paJTf04dea-mqO3Gcv5qSiWqRnxjIT3GTkQFQTlrjDhov9tUxHnjalfo4Gi5XiwHeHjIOrl6JBEzyPvHM_NSjSfdfuDykhyZZ6GWBJ6nBCFr7815oNvxWq7WVhJzZ3PnPTowIZg8JQlWkwdCMRav2-mgG2odp4RCtuZSbL4KcOC5CJuw%3D%3D)
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Peter. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1c4a6b2a7f3e47e9bcc143482b3e2a9f&_e=BorN73zx0sOP9eMlWYXKXIUe30u-jHG1EAFnVGxYrzQxYCIm4oyMrQzkzDwbN3CJmILKWkkvPuqcxI6CVMfwQ0dD-pddbRCCa4vidjLnKIW4b2G8N3aahb7B12H-8zN6Ng5eh3vbQeiHZy15VQCVb3x2eDIOcXYAsKDSK_BmC1PRoZDC_GwY8BOKEjVzKRTlxnEOsm1oYipCCKj3aEmYR_acQVzvVbjuwN7eh_IBsqxhVd9AOe5W6XfGlNOhmxSAqazfN18pJHLfC1npSKq36DnWY_YapFb98zkke4ny2TmmBA0Ja_XDaFpa4NrHRq4T-QniPqe_UZsxpIR4_dLsUG2kL_q8FPeTXWYqV79vh5tlxNI32oSXmP-oCHtPUwz5U1XMPb3uDrMu4f55zr5wOsXe8g3WurKc44etfffYPSZtQaFU6-5gdNDi_zYyrZWXnLkSX7eujS5RI7Xkxi9p6GorcH7MVFKEcfeHJDNPSES8K3CSwO6BLt-JJFkl0IHuNf5XYJEl9pE4uFg5WyJu0pE95iyzWtEHH_G3TZvvunM4KQe_V5lHpcyaik-NPk3flvGvB3U007AYSCSX4d38fjMurK81UR9pUr0oaToR8t9lL4Swnqrk2cq0TtJqnuTc0lTO8VyTzggd2TDj8kcbE7kt3IXdcMmyMq7P_tlYnjWrMJAzhKBd_Fejbog3T1eklB0siF-CCaWhTdiGdaFoqA%3D%3D)
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_

_**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Peter.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board
Turning Point USA

[ _**Support Turning Point USA**_ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1c4a6b2a7f3e47e9bcc143482b3e2a9f&_e=BorN73zx0sOP9eMlWYXKXIUe30u-jHG1EAFnVGxYrzQxYCIm4oyMrQzkzDwbN3CJmILKWkkvPuqcxI6CVMfwQ0dD-pddbRCCa4vidjLnKIW4b2G8N3aahb7B12H-8zN6Ng5eh3vbQeiHZy15VQCVb3x2eDIOcXYAsKDSK_BmC1PRoZDC_GwY8BOKEjVzKRTlxnEOsm1oYipCCKj3aEmYR_acQVzvVbjuwN7eh_IBsqxhVd9AOe5W6XfGlNOhmxSAxAqm1VPr0XonL8c3loTkLDzWEarE3X1OnmTuTd5pL2MXbkp1qYcpQHGG8iiORIbzPmhYJhXSZduNOags8EO6wsd87CTcSB-NCNSs7rrmBotu3L3zfvXvHz59-t5xI32lq3DpAFnEbKNVOoqvSuBcxL7hy6AkbRh5Cimf2bMgyZ1Nlhv3RuMhYXDLQy3coCl9HeHagaOGY1vDpxOY559QIV59WkJQuPEj8y6PjcVqrdm--XF0CGzEflIdcP-uZlmLj0JP8HUramqgKRgiGQyTS6nsF1hlQbvdbdm-s2EUU8NpHPSingbsoG4qZvygN8svlK_Bm1_5etDiTjWNBcIMtC8WKbyWFTkJD2AfFXSCLnwrPmJF_40-gJKmzP888swDcXFU5Dbv9awId2XtiKSFNgJVYCVq5CMoCgrkKcQtVUE_60yYq4HPa1gKaf4zvPwELi_n_BumriBfsw8RBqxdIw%3D%3D)
**P.S.** Peter, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Peter, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1c4a6b2a7f3e47e9bcc143482b3e2a9f&_e=BorN73zx0sOP9eMlWYXKXIUe30u-jHG1EAFnVGxYrzQxYCIm4oyMrQzkzDwbN3CJmILKWkkvPuqcxI6CVMfwQ0dD-pddbRCCa4vidjLnKIW4b2G8N3aahb7B12H-8zN6Ng5eh3vbQeiHZy15VQCVb3x2eDIOcXYAsKDSK_BmC1PRoZDC_GwY8BOKEjVzKRTlxnEOsm1oYipCCKj3aEmYR_acQVzvVbjuwN7eh_IBsqxhVd9AOe5W6XfGlNOhmxSAWW5nApZezTG5taQ7UBSz9h4HsA-2HP7jBxPkJVKh6SY7xVg1_erxZzjgcCDSn_ff4kHc66RkKXbNb4AEc3rwHVlMOFIgZWaVT2XeJOZczMszJVEg-B4VqCyiI5OVyZQ0CZRIqQj29R1KTXfUD3yeYpOh6o0FzxYQGFwOfoAypg7cynsxABw6a8Y4vhVgKEqibG8-iBp2rVQh6B_aVlc-uriHHqs8U8bVJtuyvhEmGBpL-s3x6no5LKJBfVngXwzAxWn75eAOn3H2v6nbfAoQ_PkggqU0GOEtPdx3OLSdX7IT3mMIGBwA11YJXF7Nbhjr-xyBMC_1_JqmUzaQeoCJTDrDlPagZrPeXRoPk4tbIuc3SD2ZPVD3xMxkxhNkec9by1QpYdy3RcejHihnOe2EPFIuGZ7rwiAodKsXA43A5F5Le2e7HyGg6i625-LT_ns-OYGz_CWJSVGJzuEP8qbtbA%3D%3D)
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Peter, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Peter, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
[ **Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1c4a6b2a7f3e47e9bcc143482b3e2a9f&_e=BorN73zx0sOP9eMlWYXKXIUe30u-jHG1EAFnVGxYrzQxYCIm4oyMrQzkzDwbN3CJmILKWkkvPuqcxI6CVMfwQ0dD-pddbRCCa4vidjLnKIW4b2G8N3aahb7B12H-8zN6Ng5eh3vbQeiHZy15VQCVb3x2eDIOcXYAsKDSK_BmC1PRoZDC_GwY8BOKEjVzKRTlxnEOsm1oYipCCKj3aEmYR_acQVzvVbjuwN7eh_IBsqxhVd9AOe5W6XfGlNOhmxSADdihEuo4xHLu56lG6iIHM3aWDhjt2IzvC9_4dWrNzHE3J8p_owL_D01hqMCi_RjmxsX3_-BLrlzVbsOcBxg59LpNmHbMK_SCi43Hd7Nez4QEMdGmHiMufj9mun3CpxpgB2XIfVC-F6r-t9uulFte2lOzqd55XUkRqU9slBCRYXa-br_tAnyMaUCqY3AX3KaFJTCKEWRAlzzgkl8DE_Dbl1UDWKXgedTS5gdIVZsyZ-7cgPabmL94zjI3uhxHpTal3Bhfe2DkapX7rpofaAQOdMM-sTvqUz4xehxVt6HwfczH4_8zbdv_kKmaYYiDSIxiEFStMcQqTZjixq2l7Dc4e-CaqC63y4J4hVkg7hfmfF9bhlAD288wpaGRVIDu-jm5E_oAlOo0QUgP7Uy6VdocGnCkLUgC_rFpNdF5yt9JBiiJswljE9j-m4OrAKSlRcyPFR2wo0ZU-2xtGnFfVBF9qA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I don’t know how else to begin except with this: Peter, I don't know how else to begin except with this: I miss him. Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him. My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life. You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation. But to me... He was just Charlie. He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy. The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: " How can I love you better today?" That's who Charlie really was. That 's who I fell in love with. And I want to tell you that story, Peter. We met at what I thought was a job interview. Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold: " Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't. He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future. Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think. Then Charlie looked at me and said: " I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first." He didn't skip a beat: " I have enough friends." That was Charlie. Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right. God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you." God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." We fell fast -- and we fell deep. It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights. But we understood each other... Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- to stand by his side. He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. Charlie also believed in you, Peter. He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before. He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all. Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior. But above all, Charlie was obedient... Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart. Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- we built a calling. And now... I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other: "And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " ~ Isaiah 6:8 Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. And if you're reading this -- maybe it 's yours, too. We are all being called. To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters. Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain. The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder. We will carry the torch, Peter. Together. And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined. Because God is not done. And neither are we. With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope... Erika Kirk CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA P.S. Peter, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways... Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much. He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them. Peter, that's why this photo... One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... ...Took the breath right out of my chest: Because I know that look... I fell in love with that look. He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused. It's how I first met him -- driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. Just Charlie. In his element. I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement. We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college. He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: " Work harder. Be better." He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them. That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. That 's what I see in this photo -- Greatness. To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. Because this was his prime... Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home. He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul. And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. Forever. Peter, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop... Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. Peter, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics... It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal. And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- where it never ends. Charlie, I miss you. I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven. And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent. I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise. I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart always strived to hear: " Well done, my good and faithful servant." You lived life well. You earned it. And I promise... I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. We 'll all carry it from here. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:
The freedom of speech and expression has been the cornerstone of our democracy since its founding. But right now, it’s under attack in America.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115723876/571256070/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTI5NGE2Ny1mNzk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBwCTiv-jCh8fdRfPnDYUfndgNP44eS1vM0v3oxg5tg=)
---
| The freedom of speech and expression has been the cornerstone of our democracy since its founding. But right now, it’s under attack in America.

Last week, I did two things to protect this sacred right—I voted to condemn the brutal murder of Charlie Kirk and all forms of political violence. As much as I may have disagreed with some of the things Mr. Kirk might have said, he had a right to express his views in a free country. I also protested the canceling of Jimmy Kimmel for his own free expression around the lionizing of Mr. Kirk in his death. Agree or disagree with Kimmel’s comments, he has a right to express them.

Now, there’s one other thing we all can do—help elect a majority that will protect and further bolster our freedom of speech.

The 2026 midterms are a critical safeguard to stop the full-speed takeover of our government that we are seeing from Trump and Congressional Republicans. Winning a majority is the only option.

[_**This year, I’m focused on fundraising not only for myself, but competitive races across the country. To help make a pro free speech majority, I’m asking you to chip in $15 dollars today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115723878/571256072/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-22_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTI5NGE2Ny1mNzk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBwCTiv-jCh8fdRfPnDYUfndgNP44eS1vM0v3oxg5tg=)

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Ready to fall in love with a Bulgarian?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Herrera for Congress
body:
Patriot,
Ever wanted to own a piece of Cold War pocket firepower? Keep reading for the chance to own and fall in love with a compact little Bulgarian Makarov.
Let us be honest. The Makarov is the gun that would win a shrug contest and still do the job. The original Makarov PM was designed in the Soviet Union by Nikolay Makarov in 1948 and adopted in 1951 as the standard sidearm for Soviet forces and police. It is compact, reliable, and chambered for the 9×18mm Makarov cartridge, which is the Soviet approach to "we do not want NATO ammo so here is our own round." The pistol became the defining handgun of the Eastern Bloc because it was simple and it worked.

Bulgaria, ever the cooperative ally in the Warsaw Pact, started licensed production at the Arsenal factory in Kazanlak in the 1970s. Bulgaria did not just stamp out cheap knockoffs. The Bulgarian Makarovs earned a reputation for solid machining and good finish. Collectors will tell you that Bulgarian examples often stand shoulder to shoulder with Soviet production and sometimes look better on the shelf.
For Bulgaria, the decision to manufacture the PM was practical and symbolic. It lowered dependence on Soviet imports and showed that Bulgaria could contribute to the Bloc's standardized arsenal. The pistol was also an export commodity. Bulgaria shipped lots of Makarovs to allied nations in Africa and elsewhere as part of military support and arms trade, effectively making the pistol a small ambassador of Bulgarian industry.
Functionally, the Makarov is unglamorous and excellent at being unglamorous. It has a low parts count, straightforward mechanics, and enough reliability that a conscript can trust it. The 9x18mm is not a ballistic superstar but it is adequate and it keeps logistics tidy within Warsaw Pact circles. The pistol will put holes where you point it and it will not make excuses.
After 1989, surplus Bulgarian Makarovs flooded international markets. They became affordable collector pieces and practical range guns. Their historical aura, combined with toughness and affordability, made them popular.
Today the Bulgarian Makarov is a Cold War relic that still functions as a dependable compact pistol. It represents Bulgaria's role in Warsaw Pact standardization, a neat example of midcentury firearms design, and a reminder that sometimes the most historically significant guns are the ones that quietly did their job day after day.
And I'm giving you the chance to win my silencer-ready Bulgarian Makarov in 9x18. Just donate to my congressional campaign for the chance to win your very own extremely reliable and understated piece of history. Every $5 donated earns you an entry, $25 contribution earns you 5 entries, and so on.
Make your donation today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/POihnT89HkEzRUuW0C00gQ/gDQxEMBsrHr7637xX78JzTqw).
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by Brandon Herrera for Congress
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/gDQxEMBsrHr7637xX78JzTqw)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Voting should not be a "limited privilege"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Slate: The Supreme Court Is Determined to Turn Voting Into a Limited Privilege [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092125_2&amount=25]
At Voter Action Project, Team, we believe that voting is a fundamental right , not a privilege or some test of everyone's endurance and ability to wait in a long line. We believe that our right to vote is the core bedrock that makes up our democracy and needs to be defended, expanded, and celebrated.
However, as the Voting Rights Act -- a historic piece of legislation that stood for voting as a fundamental right for every American -- recently turned 60 years old, it is being eviscerated to stop voters and their lawyers from defending that freedom to vote in court.
Conservatives on the United States Supreme Court have spent the last two decades slowly tearing the VRA to pieces. In the hands of opponents of voting rights, the Voting Rights Act has faced death by a thousand cuts. Some of those cuts have been small, such as limiting how courts consider challenges brought under the law. And some have been large, as in the 2013 decision in Shelby County v. Holder that ended the requirement for certain states with histories of discrimination to submit election changes and district maps to the Department of Justice for approval.
As the Supreme Court holds over another case, hell-bent on dismantling the Voting Rights Act piece by piece, we have to fight to protect our fundamental rights.
Pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to stand up for the VRA and help us protect voting rights nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092125_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092125_2&amount=35]
Doubt us? The U.S. Supreme Court is now set to hear oral argument in Callais v. Landry — the high-stakes Louisiana redistricting case that could upend the Voting Rights Act — on October 15.
This will be the second time the nation’s highest court hears oral argument in the pivotal voting rights case. This fall, the argument will focus on whether Louisiana’s creation of a second majority-minorty district under the VRA violates the U.S. Constitution.
This is a key opportunity for Chief Justice John Roberts, who has taken every opportunity since being appointed to the court by President George W. Bush to destroy the VRA. This case could take out one of the last legs holding the law up in favor of equality and our fundamental right to have our voice heard in an election.
Over the last two decades, as the Supreme Court dismantled the VRA case by case, voter suppression has evolved. It’s been built on paperwork, confusion, inconvenience, and ever-changing rules. That’s not how it should be. We need to put justice back in reach for those who need it most.
Please, fuel our work to stop them with $25 or whatever you can today and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092125_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092125_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092125_2&amount=20]

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Yes, the Swamp is real. I’ve seen it.
body:
|
#
Friend,

Want to make sure you’re among the first to see: I just released an anti-corruption platform in the Detroit Free Press.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115724389/571257393/1257577277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2NmMWM3ZC1mODk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mx-VEtfVgJLMG9uREQ7nScB_DflJrRcw7LuO-3CN3kA=&emci=ec7ce553-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b3cf1c7d-f897-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27257697) | [Read the op-ed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115724390/571257394/1257577277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2NmMWM3ZC1mODk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mx-VEtfVgJLMG9uREQ7nScB_DflJrRcw7LuO-3CN3kA=&emci=ec7ce553-e497-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b3cf1c7d-f897-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27257697)
---

8 months into my term, I have seen it firsthand. Washington is broken – with a culture of self-interest and enrichment. It works well for the wealthy and well-connected, but not for working people across the country.

I’ve watched the well-connected get windfalls while working people's costs go up. I've witnessed members of Congress trading stocks, billionaires shaping policy from the White House, and justices accepting lavish gifts while ruling on high-stakes cases.

And guess who pays the price? It’s not the wealthy. It’s working people in mid-Michigan and across the country.

We need to fix how things work, before even more people get left behind. Here are four commonsense steps we should take RIGHT NOW:
* Ban members of Congress from trading stocks
* End conflicts of interest in the White House
* Pass real ethics reform for the Supreme Court
* Shine a light on dark money in politics

clean_body: | Friend, Want to make sure you’re among the first to see: I just released an anti-corruption platform in the Detroit Free Press. | 8 months into my term, I have seen it firsthand. Washington is broken – with a culture of self-interest and enrichment. It works well for the wealthy and well-connected, but not for working people across the country. I’ve watched the well-connected get windfalls while working people's costs go up. I've witnessed members of Congress trading stocks, billionaires shaping policy from the White House, and justices accepting lavish gifts while ruling on high-stakes cases. And guess who pays the price? It’s not the wealthy. It’s working people in mid-Michigan and across the country. We need to fix how things work, before even more people get left behind. Here are four commonsense steps we should take RIGHT NOW: Ban members of Congress from trading stocks End conflicts of interest in the White House Pass real ethics reform for the Supreme Court Shine a light on dark money in politics Thank you, Kristen Before you go: This is a quick reminder that we are in our final week before our FEC filing deadline. After September 30th hits, our fundraising numbers will go public for all to see -- including the national Republicans attacking me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Breaking News Oregon
subject: President Trump is coming after Oregon
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250922EM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250922EM]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250922EM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250922EM]
SUPPORT TOBIAS READ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250922EM]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice just filed a lawsuit against the state of Oregon and Secretary of State Tobias Read.
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Tobias has made it clear: He will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. He will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
But let’s be clear: Tobias has gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against him — and against every voter who values free and fair elections, and privacy.
Grassroots support is Tobias’s firewall. That means us. That means you.
We aim to raise $25,000 within the next 72 hours to demonstrate our support for Tobias in the face of this abuse of power.
Can you rush a donation right now to defend Oregon, protect our elections, and have Tobias’s back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250922EM]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250922EM]
This is not normal. This is not safe. And we cannot let Trump and his cronies get away with it.
— Breaking News OR
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: wishing you a healthy New Year!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Hi friends – This evening marks the beginning of the Jewish New Year, when we take a moment to reflect on the past year and look forward to the year ahead.

This has been an incredibly trying year, but to me Rosh Hashanah is the start of a new season and a clean slate. This period of introspection helps me remember key principles like the importance of tikkun olam — to repair the world or to perfect our union.

This is a principle that guides me every day in Congress, and one I think we need now more than ever. I hope this coming year can bring us towards a true path of progress.

I want to wish all a Shanah Tovah , and I hope that everyone has a sweet and healthy New Year!

Yours,
Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-26-footer?amount=25] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie. None of us will ever forget him.
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qsj3n4l9csguam4mf3gnj8z5in38hsge73wyp7pmmcylgcbqiet1e7yef72vx0e5cl7g1kxb4&__stmp=t30dxx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30dxx&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Friend, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind — _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30dxx&__onlt=h)
---
[**Watch Our Tribute to Charlie Here**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30dxx&__onlt=h)
---
All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._ For Charlie, \- The Turning Point USA Family

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: AOC
subject: In these dark times, we can see the sun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Thank you, Ivania.
#
I pulled this note out of my jeans yesterday morning and sat with it for a long time. A woman had passed it to me while I was leaving a restaurant a while ago.
Here's the translation:
_Hello,
_Perhaps you receive hundreds of notes of gratitude or maybe of opposition as well.
But I want to give you my thanks for speaking up for those of us who do not have a voice in this moment. Thank you for having the courage to not leave us behind, and to have us heard. We love you.
In these dark times, we can see the sun. And in our sadness and uncertainty, God blesses us. We are not all criminals. We are human beings with dreams and goals to achieve in a nation that belongs to no one, if not everyone. Thank you, and a thousand thank yous.
\- Ivania _

_Oftentimes, people will ask me what keeps me going, or where to find the confidence to speak up. The answer is you all. It’s all of us, as a community.
**So I would like to take a moment today to thank each and every one of you**. For the notes slipped to me from flight attendants, and restaurant workers, and young parents passing by. For the whispers of encouragement, for the hands holding me in prayer, and the stories you share with me in person.
This is a very hard time. And one thing I have learned is that voices of hate and pain can sometimes be much louder than those of support and solidarity — **but that doesn’t mean they outnumber us**. Far from it, actually.
So it is exactly small moments like these — the whispers, the notes, the small winks — that I draw upon in the hard times of doubt, fear, sadness, and my own imperfections as a human being — imperfections we all have and share.
On Friday before I got on the plane back to New York, a father holding his infant son approached me to discuss his heartbreak over Gaza, saying, “My baby is no different than theirs.” When I landed, a teenage girl stopped me to say that seeing me made her believe she could stand up, too.
Last week, an older man stopped me to ask for a photograph. He said “I do not support you. But my daughter looks up to you and I would like to share this moment with her.” I gladly obliged, shook his hand, and thanked him.
Right now, as social media platforms and mass media companies are taken over by billionaires with selfish agendas and our algorithms are tweaked to reward division and cynicism more than ever before, us connecting to reality unwarped by our phones and screens matters more than ever before. We will figure out the balance. But in the meantime, turning to one another in person, gathering in care and support, and connecting together in gratitude and community small and large is the way.
As Ivania wrote: **times are dark, but we can see (and be) the sun**.
Thank you all.
\- Alexandria

[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250922.pRyQ6r&refcode=em20250922-9798-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250922.pRyQ6r&refcode=em20250922-9798-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250922?refcode=em20250922-9798-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9798_2526796_dNOcNs&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250922-9798-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=26&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [¿Hablas español?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/espanol-2025/?source=em20250922-9798-P_FND_EGR_GRM)
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=9798%2E2526796%2EdNOcNs)

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Here I am, Lord — I will carry Charlie’s torch.
body:
I miss him. Every day.
I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

|
---
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=481a8182c4b64aa49fcb269c1f007e4d&_e=PK9eVaeQafHLKt6Ghgva7lxfiTJjrqQpd-mDap5poulaq3U7C9r5KHl5EYArDZ1ArWXGgWhdzBDtPE1QE78tP9RbcH2QCvzEe9b2TBhPAET1fkkN0a39Kl6eBCl8tD87lr2z_Ac59cu-k0vymHtiXrZP4oJ7RCAJLLPD9JpwGGVie97vvy2zj7eFGLUUuu-lulGNE1LIDeMkYyymreoPV4736xYnQZZtEu9HlG0iJSGwN7wP9WCi8ocVRlftZX9DyVqkZfl6f4i8EMNWU_xoUmsv5nDDEoScEO6pVEwYIto4m3MbQenD_j2tcaSyaugzvNVLK4noF1bCYgJ1gbyH_s1_1T3Y_C14F9KEtxqPbs13YD4ya4nHDPD69uuCxm1HhUtz2jevAuh4_2WZ-udirRABClECRWzmFNwepAhqNEai8RVemChySdDmr3EQiOQCyo2kChxrO7lnbp0Qjev7SGTMhKyw2ePhkb8ZnLtvfFBK7aOfWBc-D-6grH9w5p1WESlPiC87K216BhsYXcqsXLl4a92AoV5TpphngIKaxo9f8MdHwMHAZDbLWh8Z45Yztn6BvJMokUALz5yhjNN1vnKpgCY_1oBEgWT4446dnN-LViPds97VABNzTA3b5TOAvq0hS9U7UowIqXOlMDvVCASg3M5gkcRgC1pugn1lE8KBx773lfIQe6XJ58XMbXz3ILxDARvbGPD7F3_jjBUXgA%3D%3D)
Peter, I don't know how else to begin except with this:

**_I miss him. _**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=481a8182c4b64aa49fcb269c1f007e4d&_e=PK9eVaeQafHLKt6Ghgva7lxfiTJjrqQpd-mDap5poulaq3U7C9r5KHl5EYArDZ1ArWXGgWhdzBDtPE1QE78tP9RbcH2QCvzEe9b2TBhPAET1fkkN0a39Kl6eBCl8tD87lr2z_Ac59cu-k0vymHtiXrZP4oJ7RCAJLLPD9JpwGGVie97vvy2zj7eFGLUUuu-lulGNE1LIDeMkYyymreoPV4736xYnQZZtEu9HlG0iJSGwN7wP9WCi8ocVRlftZX9DGThnMD-Pj_AUbKdKGDfs4FLtN_rDXGYRpyxQUWvDZRdQbbkcyYRV_A4IEDaNlwm638J1kagLOlqXPew6oxpAXuNQJzL_dTEYQMALK2sDgcYyWHkQlLOw5keOI2B5JyOYOT6wGbwxmpT8H3wbIh0XsCwNTcEAMFZgZyPBwWfM8gVyDTg1oueb_Mat0U0ip1VmrOLGD0MTQDKHHhYYox5ZaQ3YD5XXpsrIxH-vFGd7KVaRwk2yBr3RfAW3aMxpUDHTs8aHW-APgNjR69sr0zCx9VK82JTwqSBpSjfnf5rO2h3IMVwKbXEN5wWFbyG8bXh69lN5TwUBYsJIss-vn9NJqIBxlbwuuADxGrAy6sMUPzHI8PL9ClWUEOefa957v9AFDKV7XE9ijgbNeqNZO4QEDXXhRmlnb4e9Gp0lyZ1Lleo_2wK9ZFOCSA8YETlQjQNHcnr-3GxQf9UpeSCMBqZBJQ%3D%3D)
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _" How can I love you better today?" _

That's who Charlie really was. _That 's who I fell in love with. _

**And I want to tell you that story, Peter. **

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold:

_" Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." _

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't.

He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said: **

_**" I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." **_

I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first."

He didn't skip a beat: _" I have enough friends." _

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you."

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." **

We fell fast -- and we fell deep.

It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other... _

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- _to stand by his side. _
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=481a8182c4b64aa49fcb269c1f007e4d&_e=PK9eVaeQafHLKt6Ghgva7lxfiTJjrqQpd-mDap5poulaq3U7C9r5KHl5EYArDZ1ArWXGgWhdzBDtPE1QE78tP9RbcH2QCvzEe9b2TBhPAET1fkkN0a39Kl6eBCl8tD87lr2z_Ac59cu-k0vymHtiXrZP4oJ7RCAJLLPD9JpwGGVie97vvy2zj7eFGLUUuu-lulGNE1LIDeMkYyymreoPV4736xYnQZZtEu9HlG0iJSGwN7wP9WCi8ocVRlftZX9DubsKRIzWec4yuYsXyn5yXAJdK3d7a7lQfTlEr51v943FWclgrtni4jqRvgnzSE4hd1uet-UZ6tyLZ15-D8fmD3_4nidM-OO-TIBWwUoiOKvJEmkQJjKCsbrm515OM8V-QMAWtq1k1GNjnFkxJ-bHojK60xOCetSI09D12UKXZRH6FAqhu0nmkEdbM-Tqvyyhs1ZxLFsECL6BjnSkDMolAGvjXMcEO4x0A-Wrn8XRevKRsIEHi4iUm1WRHaI2UAtLUbM99M1GH7uDxWRvGk2yR0dteJ_kos2X0_5P0ntqRHMbulfxcPFPONfm6LN2r_WexM8qx7sHtHmHtLrE6iiZL3zdHnzb5HBlCTe07DRbF9s63Vil1z3Fq95WGrdvs3MAiXLtejQtG-Qrr2k2KJCrFWC9bBPaV0sQ-f7tkg7p9QT8mDUrfk1WILMPzRVx0tNidtNiUxQRMDTM1sA2CCDzNA%3D%3D)
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. **

**Charlie also believed in you, Peter. **

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- _we built a calling. _**

And now...

**I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. **

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. **
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=481a8182c4b64aa49fcb269c1f007e4d&_e=PK9eVaeQafHLKt6Ghgva7lxfiTJjrqQpd-mDap5poulaq3U7C9r5KHl5EYArDZ1ArWXGgWhdzBDtPE1QE78tP9RbcH2QCvzEe9b2TBhPAET1fkkN0a39Kl6eBCl8tD87lr2z_Ac59cu-k0vymHtiXrZP4oJ7RCAJLLPD9JpwGGVie97vvy2zj7eFGLUUuu-lulGNE1LIDeMkYyymreoPV4736xYnQZZtEu9HlG0iJSGwN7wP9WCi8ocVRlftZX9DN9pGbpk7ogS4yV6mqlDG20uNXrwINQLESjgnbpDgzicDLUMn_027oHqp447mfkPNchKuv_lSiXPO3OiYFvhDIDxlFaWuwV26WBNRgV1ugVr2gKF9Q2rK1V5my7RnBbZ8ha10llOgRTN8iQxPx4VEuwAkbFBw5duMypaxH_a0Q6AqiCQ_Am75bfXUB7Mplb-kN2y8-nYXzJfozmcznQ07D9ew6nK5WttVWO6sue4jdnEBVWPj7EYnuKRQmfAn-5HGzsXFddwUdf080tFBlNlFWcdbIAI1XO4s4gTOhy6Wr1QmwPVbZUlq1bM5i8GjmuZJNbH2iSWgPmC1cudIgv0FbK_H15GRAiku9628J1LOn_5__2-4qiPeT7Iu06Zc5rcA5LXAdr4nRKNeo-cvzyJQerQlhJD0q1Sn-83Wxj5OKUyqZqHx0Z2ikjOySK1pgpCNUl59xgHFdBJPYb3Mz3hlyg%3D%3D)
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " **_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8 ** _
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. **

And if you're reading this -- _maybe it 's yours, too. _

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Peter.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
**Erika Kirk** CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [ _**Support Turning Point USA**_ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=481a8182c4b64aa49fcb269c1f007e4d&_e=PK9eVaeQafHLKt6Ghgva7lxfiTJjrqQpd-mDap5poulaq3U7C9r5KHl5EYArDZ1ArWXGgWhdzBDtPE1QE78tP9RbcH2QCvzEe9b2TBhPAET1fkkN0a39Kl6eBCl8tD87lr2z_Ac59cu-k0vymHtiXrZP4oJ7RCAJLLPD9JpwGGVie97vvy2zj7eFGLUUuu-lulGNE1LIDeMkYyymreoPV4736xYnQZZtEu9HlG0iJSGwN7wP9WCi8ocVRlftZX9DXR80ZeWdiDT3OzttMSBPLkJY-8KSDzVbxLkCKLu1MmakIogFDgUppVK-cQwHU6cHYVchsQZoomzLNE2RA4VuL7-jPVWxxjmW-sGz-GOCmJKvOGqLYTmxvzoBiSuMNGgYuT8kc720TXd-EjlH7QqptLhFyklHL94JD-vAQlrazRaleRL9LKUV91GBYwLetli7CzdUGks5aboEhuRswpsbh67oBckrXlBbRXEVOC82pPz6sIpxnxtBHzt-RxpTOfvQJgn8MSOpwViq0KUTx2Ylho28mQmg-4kOE36svv4MfiKE4tDlJzVMVaiUAR3TD4JE053ZYRNjEnWZmY0ova_gAMb61T27tUPGzqQcYzLYlexWSjlAKHmPfLwbu9vwV0onZ_-UOPfVYgBVZgA2VO1zkL2Qqq5WfNttx1gkFOTFK8unVl7jnXxyXNemFZRRJztnSpvPXO7EJvzuPFhhP0mSqg%3D%3D)
**P.S.** Peter, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It's why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Peter, that's why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... _

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=481a8182c4b64aa49fcb269c1f007e4d&_e=PK9eVaeQafHLKt6Ghgva7lxfiTJjrqQpd-mDap5poulaq3U7C9r5KHl5EYArDZ1ArWXGgWhdzBDtPE1QE78tP9RbcH2QCvzEe9b2TBhPAET1fkkN0a39Kl6eBCl8tD87lr2z_Ac59cu-k0vymHtiXrZP4oJ7RCAJLLPD9JpwGGVie97vvy2zj7eFGLUUuu-lulGNE1LIDeMkYyymreoPV4736xYnQZZtEu9HlG0iJSGwN7wP9WCi8ocVRlftZX9Dvl_oaMhfGp-qZd9BloC1u2zHZg6XEjFGmY2i6KxNQUbK3HFzmJ_69yjl4RJQu2lAN2JN8zc1uTTvTDgw9nMUegQ3AELpFk_T81AU9Hxdvqb3uxBJqw7NIt167MaBlOcqkvfXHrbwIivcm19XuqiAWW91vuBeRqgqRdXUc2vx3MZNpO5lt2Vn2crTW1LYnzUZuH8VwXPN8Cnk3uHk0QBGWxHRCJZlOjHFU_Xrwn-tTZfDPLXDWYgHEIo_WFlWusGmQ8lEQ_TtK3bhE3622xwYEAhCsB0BIXalaeCtLxedFEB_gsHiOKUN6kls4fEn7zsXgI6VvpMie0RP5aW1nXDjgCLWwE3_ZBaM4DsYHUMZWmZA6egrB8i-qLQmkDseBCJJd68keDP4W_Mxmx3gL-qSeK6Ctn5S6hbhrUFLd_93pME_7G4MMIlnAHgaV4UaoSPvQ7n15aCAaiYzkTbisen8Mg%3D%3D)
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He's in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It's how I first met him -- _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. _

Just Charlie. _In his element. _

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise -- just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**" Work harder. Be better." **_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. _

**That 's what I see in this photo -- _Greatness. _**

**To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. **

_Because this was his prime... _

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... _

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he'd be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Peter, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop...

**Because it 's alive in me. It's alive in our children. It's alive in the millions he's inspired. **
** **
**And if you 're reading this, I know it's alive in you, too. **

Peter, Charlie's life -- it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he's running his race where it really counts -- _where it never ends. _

**Charlie, I miss you. **

I pray you're having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**" Well done, my good and faithful servant." **_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise... **

**I 'll carry the torch you lit from here. _We 'll all carry it from here. _**
[ **Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=481a8182c4b64aa49fcb269c1f007e4d&_e=PK9eVaeQafHLKt6Ghgva7lxfiTJjrqQpd-mDap5poulaq3U7C9r5KHl5EYArDZ1ArWXGgWhdzBDtPE1QE78tP9RbcH2QCvzEe9b2TBhPAET1fkkN0a39Kl6eBCl8tD87lr2z_Ac59cu-k0vymHtiXrZP4oJ7RCAJLLPD9JpwGGVie97vvy2zj7eFGLUUuu-lulGNE1LIDeMkYyymreoPV4736xYnQZZtEu9HlG0iJSGwN7wP9WCi8ocVRlftZX9DsBKAK5aAKEfhM-QUoHuynQYWlfEfhXW0ktqc8POCgcTpaSQegS9SYLoFFt8LOCU6EvwkDzJx4Ra1uwzmStM4oYc7vAjXh8Pj31CFYirbgI01627mXGoWQ1hLtE8pVd-d0i_G-iYFa9fHx2jPgUw3tFLD4UgbQEqbZW4vrruzi--tDcdBt2Mi6RxT9R9XNuw-6lUBmZzH5f2VEYTa7fJRrbRB9NTRvKBuO2rPgWxzQjsNOWOPHmz2XCClafjD36tjoQxoD_PrdOfBqW_Eyf32ncQOyg0aaLW4xnHdtC-orVWboAH__faCzXCKmE7tnk78ucR-zVfAwFmcIqX8QKXphSagjpPVcDKnpfPFcIjxPuxGc_xSPfJrZJmvB9CxugyriELKhhUGPI6P9WVjXVsGpfQWpAYVD54bI8cPp1f8iIwkJ75_zjXlFJsCa2SQGHLBeSOo0iX1aOBeKinpjSZeow%3D%3D)

clean_body: I miss him. Every day. I don’t know how else to begin except with this: | Peter, I don't know how else to begin except with this: I miss him. Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him. My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life. You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation. But to me... He was just Charlie. He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy. The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: " How can I love you better today?" That's who Charlie really was. That 's who I fell in love with. And I want to tell you that story, Peter. We met at what I thought was a job interview. Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 -- very Charlie-like -- short, direct, and bold: " Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently." I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn't. He took me to Bill's Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future. Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn't know what to think. Then Charlie looked at me and said: " I'm not going to hire you. I'm going to date you." I froze. I told him, "Maybe we should just be friends first." He didn't skip a beat: " I have enough friends." That was Charlie. Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right. God knew I needed someone who would say, "I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you." God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." We fell fast -- and we fell deep. It wasn't glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights. But we understood each other... Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine -- to stand by his side. He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. Charlie also believed in you, Peter. He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before. He believed in the greatness of America -- even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all. Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior. But above all, Charlie was obedient... Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart. Charlie and I didn 't just build a life together -- we built a calling. And now... I don 't just bear his calling -- I will lead. I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie 's name and for God's glory. Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other: "And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.' " ~ Isaiah 6:8 Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it 's my turn. And if you're reading this -- maybe it 's yours, too. We are all being called. To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters. Because Charlie's life was not taken in vain. The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder. We will carry the torch, Peter. Together. And the mission Charlie started -- it will become greater than we ever imagined. Because God is not done. And neither are we. With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope... Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them. That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, even when they couldn 't yet see it in themselves. That 's what I see in this photo -- Greatness. To me, this is Charlie 's "Jordan" photo. Because this was his prime... Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for -- his purpose, his calling, his mission... And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. Forever. Peter, I want you to know -- his mission didn't end. It won't ever stop... Peter,

We know you’re hearing a lot about the extreme gerrymander that lawmakers in Missouri just passed, which will take power away from voters and allow Donald Trump to thwart the will of the people in this midterm election. But there’s another shocking piece of this legislation that hasn’t gotten as much attention: **Republican legislators want to keep voters from being able to organize and pass ballot initiatives.** **In a moment, we’ll explain more about what this attack on democracy means for Missourians and people across the country.** [**If you’re ready to fight back, can you donate to help ensure Republicans don’t succeed in silencing the voice of the people?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115724916/571259200/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MissouriFollowUp_email_20250922-NDRC-Tier1-MissouriFollowUp_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250922-NDRC-Tier1-MissouriFollowUp_&utm_campaign=MissouriFollowUp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5MzkzMjZiLWZhOTctZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=quMR4J5rtHldTNxJVOKQyUsi1BejnqwyFUtVS3HEVUY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Peter, ballot initiatives are one of the most powerful tools in our democracy. They ensure voters have a say when extremist politicians side with powerful interests over their constituents.
In Missouri, voters have passed successful ballot initiatives, overturning an abortion ban, expanding Medicaid, increasing the minimum wage, and legalizing marijuana.
**With this move, anti-democracy lawmakers are not only rigging maps to hold on to power, they’re making it harder for voters to fight back in the future.**
Let’s be clear: Republicans are hell-bent on silencing the voice of the people. If this attempt at voter suppression succeeds in Missouri, Republican-controlled states across the country will follow suit. They will put a direct check on their own voters’ ability to influence state policy — a direct attack on democracy and free _and_ fair elections.
Republicans have made it clear they will stop at nothing to undermine the will of the people, so we must do everything in our power to stop them. [**Rush a donation to the NDRC and help fight back against attacks on voting rights and fair representation in Missouri and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115724923/571259207/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MissouriFollowUp_email_20250922-NDRC-Tier1-MissouriFollowUp_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250922-NDRC-Tier1-MissouriFollowUp_&utm_campaign=MissouriFollowUp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5MzkzMjZiLWZhOTctZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=quMR4J5rtHldTNxJVOKQyUsi1BejnqwyFUtVS3HEVUY=)

clean_body: We have to stop this anti-voter legislation | Peter, We know you’re hearing a lot about the extreme gerrymander that lawmakers in Missouri just passed, which will take power away from voters and allow Donald Trump to thwart the will of the people in this midterm election. But there’s another shocking piece of this legislation that hasn’t gotten as much attention: Republican legislators want to keep voters from being able to organize and pass ballot initiatives. In a moment, we’ll explain more about what this attack on democracy means for Missourians and people across the country. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Peter, ballot initiatives are one of the most powerful tools in our democracy. They ensure voters have a say when extremist politicians side with powerful interests over their constituents. In Missouri, voters have passed successful ballot initiatives, overturning an abortion ban, expanding Medicaid, increasing the minimum wage, and legalizing marijuana. With this move, anti-democracy lawmakers are not only rigging maps to hold on to power, they’re making it harder for voters to fight back in the future. Let’s be clear: Republicans are hell-bent on silencing the voice of the people. If this attempt at voter suppression succeeds in Missouri, Republican-controlled states across the country will follow suit. They will put a direct check on their own voters’ ability to influence state policy — a direct attack on democracy and free and fair elections. Republicans have made it clear they will stop at nothing to undermine the will of the people, so we must do everything in our power to stop them. = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. Today, I’ll be bringing in the new year with my wife, and we want to wish all of those celebrating with us a Shana Tova! Rosh Hashanah marks the beginning of the new year in Judaism. It is the start of a ten-day period of reflection and repentance leading up to Yom Kippur. Family, friends, and community members are coming together to dip apples in honey and hope for a sweet year ahead. I am wishing the Jewish community happiness, health, and prosperity in the coming year. Chag Sameach! Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=5a5494f445bb4cb9a709cf3c0612e2a7&_e=2w0Ouok7itBIALQfpc_FTzLa68IKnEMETWIt5Koeb83OqEYfPWHbU6szLL6rMNR3utdHcE4pKh4olRHAaoVOb-3osRK9Ie_jrk48RP3qpCGq3QmYxWcBtaGHB4ivRDC4JC0MLwuKd6TB-P4KTmOCXJlA0ZBrVSj4csfhUfV3Pk5B7AXuF9hTkrf52eL-h21s5sFMApIWK2Gj1Sy13P_rpOQ0IsQVeswHEenmIZRD_THtkoYT0e8vnVvKLgtG68y9J6g6PyQAyqqkEwqqLHUX0EybHfv8mc5w1C7kg66SHbFJgWCxqmGqlivlwpbv7E53ziosgMtYRaooNdlyIlSVrn2NjubriRWyn-ZJc3rURjowJONEopyetrqUWxyA4LnWKrdT4_I4YwBiBOFMRK8Nu9_NG5Ezlgs6wqWbzr2BID8bMfViWBGpGTx2IKHho3fR0KTzcbZvOskIcBIf7pRrPapW9SzUd12WhrHUdDaYsYX4y_wu6n4p2cNQ4dx7kUmKakI1oCuClQMG3y880Zo_ilOeylRGa9_VXRNBFH8nOh9iwB6BbNRCHKiyoEQxNXiY)
