You've always stood by him, and you deserve to be recognized for that. 3. Of all the patriots in Your Hometown, you stood out to us for your dedication to making America great! We're so incredibly proud of Peter. Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

* Trump approves TikTok deal
* House Democrats vote against Charlie Kirk resolution, Republicans call them out
* CNN anchor reveals unbelievable message he received from Charlie Kirk right before his murder
* JFK's grandson weighs congressional run

# Gill lays down the law on Democrat lawmaker
GOP Rep. Brandon Gill **[clashed with Democrat Rep. Lateefah Simon](https://substack.com/redirect/44d3a5a6-ba5f-477f-9c4a-738bb50dfd38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over soft-on-crime policies in Democrat-led cities, releasing dangerous juvenile criminals back into the streets of America.
"The purpose of our justice system is not to rehabilitate criminals, it is to give criminals their just desserts! To lock them up so they cannot harm innocent people!" Gill said.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/44d3a5a6-ba5f-477f-9c4a-738bb50dfd38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Trump approves TikTok deal transferring majority control to U.S. investors**
President Trump is set to approve a comprehensive agreement this week that will transfer majority ownership of TikTok's U.S. operations to American investors while ensuring user data remains secure from foreign access, senior White House officials announced.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9f366310-d144-4658-9a57-77c775c20d75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump administration finalizes TikTok ownership structure** : President Trump is expected to sign an executive order this week approving a deal that **[transfers majority control of TikTok's U.S. operations to American investors](https://substack.com/redirect/f6df87c0-03d6-46ff-9f19-415eb2da5046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , with ByteDance retaining less than 20% ownership as required by federal law.
* **Oracle to handle data security and algorithm** : The tech giant will serve as TikTok's trusted security provider, storing American user data in secure U.S.-based cloud infrastructure and retraining the platform's algorithm to operate independently from ByteDance control.
* **New governance structure ensures American sovereignty** : A seven-member board of directors, with a majority of U.S. citizens, will govern the new joint-venture company, while Oracle monitors source code, algorithm operations and data security to prevent Chinese government access.
* **Deal preserves user experience while boosting economy** : The agreement maintains TikTok's global functionality for American users without service disruption and is projected to generate $178 billion in U.S. economic activity over four years while sustaining thousands of jobs.

The deal resolves a lengthy dispute that began when Congress enacted legislation banning TikTok over national security concerns, with the agreement delaying enforcement of the ban for up to 120 days while the new ownership structure takes effect.
* * *
# **58 House Democrats vote against Charlie Kirk resolution as Republicans call out hypocrisy**
House Republicans are accusing Democrats of partisan hypocrisy after **[58 Democrats voted against a resolution honoring slain conservative activist Charlie Kirk](https://substack.com/redirect/95548eaa-9a3b-4cb5-8f97-ff141bc6dbfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , contrasting sharply with unanimous bipartisan support for a similar measure condemning attacks on Minnesota Democratic lawmakers earlier this year.
* **Fractured Democratic vote draws Republican criticism** : The Friday resolution honoring Kirk's "life and legacy" split House Democrats, with 95 voting in favor, 58 opposing, 38 voting present and 22 not voting, prompting Republicans to highlight the stark difference from June's unanimous 424-0 vote condemning attacks on Minnesota state legislators.
* **Republicans frame vote as electoral liability** : GOP lawmakers including Reps. Andy Biggs, Nancy Mace and Greg Steube criticized Democrats for refusing to condemn political violence consistently, with Steube predicting the fractured vote will hurt Democrats in the 2026 midterm elections.
* **Democrats cite discomfort with Kirk's praise** : Several Democrats who opposed the measure said they objected to language lauding Kirk as promoting "respectful, civil discourse" and "unity," with Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez calling his rhetoric "ignorant" and Rep. Shri Thandear saying Kirk "repeatedly disparaged minorities, especially Black Americans."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cd0ade57-b70a-482a-97a6-887701421db4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Comments in question:** Ocasio-Cortez misquoted Kirk from when he debated about the Civil Rights Act,**[claiming it should have been more specific](https://substack.com/redirect/e7583dc8-99ed-4df2-8ef6-7a8e30f67c39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to race so as not to be used as it is currently, by the transgender community for men to play in female sports.
* **Democrats ' Issues with Resolution**: While the Minnesota resolution focused primarily on condemning political violence, the Kirk measure included extensive praise for the conservative activist's character and contributions, with Republicans describing him as "one of the most prominent voices in America."

The Democrat votes against the resolution underscore deepening partisan divisions over how Congress should respond to political violence, with Republicans arguing Democrats apply different standards based on victims' political affiliations while Democrats maintain they cannot endorse what they view as 'divisive' rhetoric.
* * *
# CNN anchor actually shared amazing message from Charlie Kirk just hours before assassination: "Let's be gentleman, together"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ac629592-7b53-40cc-821a-976dd06fa485?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Kirk reached out for dialogue amid public dispute** : Conservative activist Charlie Kirk sent CNN analyst Van Jones a direct message on September 9 inviting him for a **[respectful conversation](https://substack.com/redirect/40b8c73a-eab6-409a-9280-555a9f04a9b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about crime and race on his show or on CNN as the two engaged in a heated public disagreement over multiple issues.
* **Assassination prevented response** : Jones never had the chance to reply to Kirk's outreach, as Kirk was assassinated the next day during a speaking event at Utah Valley University in Utah.
* **Jones cites message as proof of Kirk's character** : The CNN personality used Kirk's final communication as evidence that the Turning Point USA founder preferred dialogue over division, condemning those who would exploit Kirk's death to promote violence or censorship, going against the majority of Democrats who have been actively spreading hateful and divisive rhetoric about the assassinated activist.

* * *
# JFK's liberal, unhinged grandson debates NYC congressional run. He may have a chance...
* **JFK's grandson considers Manhattan House run** : Jack Schlossberg, 32-year-old **[grandson of President John F. Kennedy,](https://substack.com/redirect/1332a4db-da97-4dcf-8933-23b3d82e9c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is exploring a bid for Democratic Rep. Jerry Nadler's Upper West Side congressional seat after the 17-term incumbent announced he won't seek re-election in 2026.
* **Online presence raises eyebrows** : Schlossberg gained notoriety for his provocative social media behavior, including impersonating First Lady Melania Trump, mocking his cousin RFK Jr.'s speech condition, and posting content that is both offensive and concerning to observers...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/efebd04c-2584-447b-9ddb-f56840e8f8b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Limited political experience, strong social media following** : Despite having no significant public service background--which Nadler has criticized--Schlossberg has over 707,000 Instagram followers. 90% encouraged him to run for office in a recent poll, and has launched a YouTube podcast interviewing political figures.
* **Faces established competition in Democratic primary** : Schlossberg would compete against Nadler's endorsed Micah Lasher, a Manhattan assemblyman, along with several city council members and assembly members, though there are some political observers suggest his Kennedy name recognition and social media savvy could give him a viable path to victory

* * *
# **[A Life of Faith, A Legacy that Endures: Remembering Charlie Kirk](https://substack.com/redirect/097191b6-4131-42fb-974a-0503bedca80b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Gill lays down the law on Democrat lawmaker GOP Rep. Brandon Gill over soft-on-crime policies in Democrat-led cities, releasing dangerous juvenile criminals back into the streets of America. "The purpose of our justice system is not to rehabilitate criminals, it is to give criminals their just desserts! To lock them up so they cannot harm innocent people!" Gill said. | | ---|---|--- What we are seeing right now is truly historic. President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan. But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview... "There could be a little disruption. Look, what I have to do is build a strong country." If you want to learn more about , go ahead read this that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against. Read now. Yours truly, Sean Hannity Trump approves TikTok deal transferring majority control to U.S. investors President Trump is set to approve a comprehensive agreement this week that will transfer majority ownership of TikTok's U.S. operations to American investors while ensuring user data remains secure from foreign access, senior White House officials announced. Trump administration finalizes TikTok ownership structure : President Trump is expected to sign an executive order this week approving a deal that , with ByteDance retaining less than 20% ownership as required by federal law. Oracle to handle data security and algorithm : The tech giant will serve as TikTok's trusted security provider, storing American user data in secure U.S.-based cloud infrastructure and retraining the platform's algorithm to operate independently from ByteDance control. New governance structure ensures American sovereignty : A seven-member board of directors, with a majority of U.S. citizens, will govern the new joint-venture company, while Oracle monitors source code, algorithm operations and data security to prevent Chinese government access. Deal preserves user experience while boosting economy : The agreement maintains TikTok's global functionality for American users without service disruption and is projected to generate $178 billion in U.S. economic activity over four years while sustaining thousands of jobs. The deal resolves a lengthy dispute that began when Congress enacted legislation banning TikTok over national security concerns, with the agreement delaying enforcement of the ban for up to 120 days while the new ownership structure takes effect. 58 House Democrats vote against Charlie Kirk resolution as Republicans call out hypocrisy House Republicans are accusing Democrats of partisan hypocrisy after , contrasting sharply with unanimous bipartisan support for a similar measure condemning attacks on Minnesota Democratic lawmakers earlier this year. Fractured Democratic vote draws Republican criticism : The Friday resolution honoring Kirk's "life and legacy" split House Democrats, with 95 voting in favor, 58 opposing, 38 voting present and 22 not voting, prompting Republicans to highlight the stark difference from June's unanimous 424-0 vote condemning attacks on Minnesota state legislators. Republicans frame vote as electoral liability : GOP lawmakers including Reps. Andy Biggs, Nancy Mace and Greg Steube criticized Democrats for refusing to condemn political violence consistently, with Steube predicting the fractured vote will hurt Democrats in the 2026 midterm elections. Democrats cite discomfort with Kirk's praise : Several Democrats who opposed the measure said they objected to language lauding Kirk as promoting "respectful, civil discourse" and "unity," with Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez calling his rhetoric "ignorant" and Rep. Shri Thandear saying Kirk "repeatedly disparaged minorities, especially Black Americans." Comments in question: Ocasio-Cortez misquoted Kirk from when he debated about the Civil Rights Act, to race so as not to be used as it is currently, by the transgender community for men to play in female sports. Democrats ' Issues with Resolution: While the Minnesota resolution focused primarily on condemning political violence, the Kirk measure included extensive praise for the conservative activist's character and contributions, with Republicans describing him as "one of the most prominent voices in America." The Democrat votes against the resolution underscore deepening partisan divisions over how Congress should respond to political violence, with Republicans arguing Democrats apply different standards based on victims' political affiliations while Democrats maintain they cannot endorse what they view as 'divisive' rhetoric. CNN anchor actually shared amazing message from Charlie Kirk just hours before assassination: "Let's be gentleman, together" Kirk reached out for dialogue amid public dispute : Conservative activist Charlie Kirk sent CNN analyst Van Jones a direct message on September 9 inviting him for a about crime and race on his show or on CNN as the two engaged in a heated public disagreement over multiple issues. Assassination prevented response : Jones never had the chance to reply to Kirk's outreach, as Kirk was assassinated the next day during a speaking event at Utah Valley University in Utah. Jones cites message as proof of Kirk's character : The CNN personality used Kirk's final communication as evidence that the Turning Point USA founder preferred dialogue over division, condemning those who would exploit Kirk's death to promote violence or censorship, going against the majority of Democrats who have been actively spreading hateful and divisive rhetoric about the assassinated activist. JFK's liberal, unhinged grandson debates NYC congressional run. He may have a chance... JFK's grandson considers Manhattan House run : Jack Schlossberg, 32-year-old is exploring a bid for Democratic Rep. Jerry Nadler's Upper West Side congressional seat after the 17-term incumbent announced he won't seek re-election in 2026. Online presence raises eyebrows : Schlossberg gained notoriety for his provocative social media behavior, including impersonating First Lady Melania Trump, mocking his cousin RFK Jr.'s speech condition, and posting content that is both offensive and concerning to observers... | | ---|---|--- Limited political experience, strong social media following : Despite having no significant public service background--which Nadler has criticized--Schlossberg has over 707,000 Instagram followers. 90% encouraged him to run for office in a recent poll, and has launched a YouTube podcast interviewing political figures. Faces established competition in Democratic primary : Schlossberg would compete against Nadler's endorsed Micah Lasher, a Manhattan assemblyman, along with several city council members and assembly members, though there are some political observers suggest his Kennedy name recognition and social media savvy could give him a viable path to victory | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . subject: Trump’s playing politics with public health

Peter –
The Trump administration is cutting back critical CDC grant funding that supports public health programs nationwide — and Colorado joined states across the nation that sued to get these vital grants restored.
States that have sued the Trump Administration have retained nearly 80% of grants, and states that haven’t have retained less than 5%. This means one thing, Peter – who the next Attorney General is matters. As Attorney General, I’ll stand up to Donald Trump and his MAGA allies, especially when they threaten to take away resources from Colorado communities. Chip in $25 today to help me win this race and fight for our state. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg&amount=25]
I’ve spent my career standing up to Donald Trump and fighting for Coloradans. As Secretary of State, I challenged him when he threatened our democracy. As Attorney General, I’ll take on Trump again when he threatens our health and safety.
But to get there, we have to show that grassroots supporters are ready to fight back. Can you donate today to help us defend the Colorado way of life? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Health care is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Republicans are speeding head-first into a government shutdown. |
#
---
Peter — on September 30, the federal government funding will expire unless Congress passes a budget bill to continue funding the government. **Right now, Republicans are speeding headfirst into a government shutdown to uphold Trump’s extreme agenda that attacks everyday people.** Congressional Republicans won't negotiate at all with Democrats, and instead are intent on continuing the cuts to health care, food benefits, and other programs that millions of Americans rely on. **Let me be crystal clear: House Democrats will not allow this assault on our government and our health care to continue. ** The GOP controls the House, the Senate, and the White House. If a government shutdown happens on their watch because _**they**_ refuse to restore health care to millions of Americans, then it's Republicans who will own it. While Republicans continue to pander to billionaires, Democrats are fighting for the American people. And the American people deserve to know who is fighting for them in Congress. **I’m standing strong with Democrats in the House to fight for the American people and stop Trump’s reckless policies in their tracks, but we can’t hold him accountable without control of the House. ** **[I’m fighting to help flip the House blue and win back New York for Democrats, and I could really use your support before my campaign’s FEC deadline at the end of this month. clean_body: Republicans are speeding head-first into a government shutdown. | Peter — on September 30, the federal government funding will expire unless Congress passes a budget bill to continue funding the government. Right now, Republicans are speeding headfirst into a government shutdown to uphold Trump’s extreme agenda that attacks everyday people. Congressional Republicans won't negotiate at all with Democrats, and instead are intent on continuing the cuts to health care, food benefits, and other programs that millions of Americans rely on. Let me be crystal clear: House Democrats will not allow this assault on our government and our health care to continue. The GOP controls the House, the Senate, and the White House. If a government shutdown happens on their watch because they refuse to restore health care to millions of Americans, then it's Republicans who will own it. While Republicans continue to pander to billionaires, Democrats are fighting for the American people. And the American people deserve to know who is fighting for them in Congress. I’m standing strong with Democrats in the House to fight for the American people and stop Trump’s reckless policies in their tracks, but we can’t hold him accountable without control of the House. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your time and continued support, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, retired
subject: Whatever their price tag is, double it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
It seems leaders like Donald Trump, people who value perception over true force projection, can always find money for their vanity projects.
#
Peter, Paul Eaton here. Major General, U.S. Army, retired.
I’ve seen media coverage indicating initial estimates for the cost of Trump’s Department of War rebrand start at around $1 billion.
As someone with decades of service in the Army, I can give you some perspective on cost estimates like that: Whatever the first number is, double it.
It seems leaders like Donald Trump, people who value perception over true force projection, can always find money for their vanity projects. He can find hundreds of millions of dollars to throw himself a birthday party with 5000 Troops and dozens of tanks and helicopters, all at taxpayer expense. One million dollars a day to make National Guard Troops pick up trash on the National Mall in Washington. At least a billion dollars for this rebrand.
However, they can’t afford to hire desperately needed staff at the VA, where Veterans are regularly delayed (or, increasingly, denied) access to care.
But this is not up to Donald Trump. Per the Constitution, Congress still holds the power of the purse, and it would take an act of Congress to turn the Department of Defense into the Department of War. We can still have an impact on that process.
VoteVets is mobilizing our supporters and allies to stop this needless, wasteful rebrand. And to ensure we have the resources needed to defeat this, we’re humbly asking you:
[**Make a donation to VoteVets and help us stop the Department of War before it starts.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.qP0qt0&refcode=em250922-1-120&t=1&akid=34634%2E3013755%2EgLhnKO)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.lqjbzh&refcode=em250922-1-120&t=20&akid=34634%2E3013755%2EgLhnKO)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.UPYoEK&refcode=em250922-1-120&t=21&akid=34634%2E3013755%2EgLhnKO)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.68-c3Y&refcode=em250922-1-120&t=22&akid=34634%2E3013755%2EgLhnKO)**
---
****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.JbudzM&refcode=em250922-1-120&t=23&akid=34634%2E3013755%2EgLhnKO)**

****

Thank you for your support.
Very respectfully,
Paul Eaton

Senior Advisor, VoteVets

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: This is the story of Charlie I want to tell
body:
| | | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e41151791/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvN3NmTUZLNjNnYg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjI/LbmNsTjdvSVhNVw/qP2hpZHM9bmM5UkRTSzQxVEJqelhscw/gaNHMqA/s1p2818218f) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Patriot.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Patriot.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Patriot.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**P.S.** Patriot, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Patriot, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Patriot, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Patriot, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---

clean_body: | | | Patriot, I don’t know how else to begin except with this: I miss him. Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him. My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life. You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation. But to me... He was just Charlie. He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy. The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: “How can I love you better today?” That’s who Charlie really was. That’s who I fell in love with. And I want to tell you that story, Patriot. We met at what I thought was a job interview. Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold: “Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.” I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t. He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future. Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think. Then Charlie looked at me and said: “I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.” I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.” He didn’t skip a beat: “I have enough friends.” That was Charlie. Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right. God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.” God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie." We fell fast — and we fell deep. It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights. But we understood each other... Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — to stand by his side. He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement. Charlie also believed in you, Patriot. He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before. He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all. Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior. But above all, Charlie was obedient... Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart. Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — we built a calling. And now... I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead. I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory. Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other: "And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'” ~ Isaiah 6:8 Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn. And if you’re reading this — maybe it’s yours, too. We are all being called. To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters. Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain. The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder. We will carry the torch, Patriot. Together. And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined. Because God is not done. And neither are we. With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope... Erika Kirk CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA P.S. Patriot, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways... Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much. He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them. Patriot, that’s why this photo... One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie... ...Took the breath right out of my chest: Because I know that look... I fell in love with that look. He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused. It’s how I first met him — driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments. Just Charlie. In his element. I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement. We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college. He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: “Work harder. Be better.” He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them. That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves. That’s what I see in this photo — Greatness. To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo. Because this was his prime... Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission... He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home. He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul. And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. Forever. Patriot, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop... Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired. ** And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too. Patriot, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics... It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal. And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — where it never ends. Charlie, I miss you. I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven. And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent. I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise. I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart always strived to hear: “Well done, my good and faithful servant.” You lived life well. You earned it. And I promise... I’ll carry the torch you lit from here.We’ll all carry it from here. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

While scientists, doctors, and health care workers protect our communities, RFK Jr. is busy dismantling an industry that’s saved millions of lives and developed life-saving treatments for crippling diseases like polio. Now, just a few years removed from the worst pandemic in centuries, RFK Jr. has Cancelled $500M in vaccine research that would help us fight future pandemics Sowed distrust of safe, reliable drugs like Tylenol Defunded programs that brought locally grown, healthy food to schools Jeopardized the safety of public health workers | — Team Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. Mark Warner and Tim Kaine here — also known as Donald Trump’s least favorite senators.

On Friday night during a meltdown about a U.S. attorney he himself nominated failing to produce criminal charges against one of his perceived political enemies, Trump turned his wrath to us... Warner and Kaine.

Two bad guys!

Bad senators!

They do a terrible job for the people of Virginia! Now we may be biased, but we tend to disagree with Trump’s assessment of our work. We’ve both served as Governor of Virginia and as U.S. Senator to this great Commonwealth, and we love the people of Virginia. We’ve fought for our state to be a great place to live, do business, and raise a family — and it is!

We’ve been so proud to work with each other, with our strong congressional delegation from across VA, and with our great partners in Richmond to get things done for folks — expanding broadband access, securing funds for hospitals and other job centers, lowering costs, making communities safer, strengthening our schools, and so much more.

**But Derek, Trump can attack us all he wants. Our focus isn’t on the President’s temper tantrums, but on making life better for Virginians — and winning in 2025 and 2026.**

name: Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie answered the call. Now I will too.
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhxzoaqfv7r1th4nb4pjtry3fu93whjuk3eodiy6u1nmi6cz8ekjr4cond8h95i0sm15n661hcdtxfvuirjuxs&__stmp=t30hbe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | |
---
Friend, I don’t know how else to begin except with this:

** _I miss him._**

Every breath. Every heartbeat. Every memory I now replay in my mind... I miss him.

My husband, Charlie Kirk, was the love of my life.

You may know him as a fighter for freedom. A warrior for truth. The founder of Turning Point USA. The host of a nationally syndicated radio show. A bold conservative voice that gave courage to a generation.

But to me... _He was just Charlie._
---
---
He was my best friend. The father of our two precious babies. The man who made me laugh when the world felt too heavy.

The man who, every single morning without fail, would look at me and ask: _“How can I love you better today?”_

That’s who Charlie really was. _That’s who I fell in love with._

**And I want to tell you that story, Friend.**

We met at what I thought was a job interview.

Charlie messaged me in August of 2018 — very Charlie-like — short, direct, and bold:

_“Hey, I need to meet with you. Urgently.”_

I thought it was about a position with Turning Point. It wasn’t.

He took me to Bill’s Burgers in NYC. I thought I was about to be grilled for a role... and instead, I was grilled about Aristotle, theology, the Constitution, and how I saw my future.

Three and a half hours of deep conversation, and by the end of it, I still didn’t know what to think.

**Then Charlie looked at me and said:**

_**“I’m not going to hire you. I’m going to date you.”**_

I froze. I told him, “Maybe we should just be friends first.”

He didn’t skip a beat: _“I have enough friends.”_

That was Charlie.

Clarity. Conviction. A heart that always knew exactly what it wanted. And completely unshakable when he knew what was right.

God knew I needed someone who would say, “I'm not playing games. I'm not going to play with your heart. I'm a loyal person. I'm a good person. I'm a God-fearing person. I want to date you.”

**God just knew that I needed someone like that. And He said, "Here's Charlie."**

We fell fast — and we fell deep.

It wasn’t glamorous. Our lives were chaotic. Travel, pressure, early mornings, and late nights.

_But we understood each other..._

Charlie had found his mission. And I had found mine — _to stand by his side._
---
---
**He loved God. He loved me and our family. He loved America. He loved this movement.**

**Charlie also believed in you, Friend.**

He believed in the students who had never heard the truth before.

He believed in the greatness of America — even when things were dark or felt hopeless to us all.

Charlie was a father, a husband, a leader, and a warrior.

But above all, Charlie was obedient...

Obedient to God. To his conscience. To the mission placed on his heart.

**Charlie and I didn’t just build a life together — _we built a calling._**

And now...

**I don’t just bear his calling — I will lead.**

**I will lead the movement he built forward, in Charlie’s name and for God’s glory.**
---
---
Before Charlie died, he often repeated one verse more than any other:
---
_**"And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?' Then I said, 'Here I am! Send me.'”**_ _**~ Isaiah 6:8** _
---
**Charlie answered that call every day of his life. Now, it’s my turn.**

And if you’re reading this — _maybe it’s yours, too._

We are all being called.

To serve. To love boldly. To stand. To fight for what matters.

Because Charlie’s life was not taken in vain.

The evil that tried to silence him has only made his voice louder.

We will carry the torch, Friend.

Together.

And the mission Charlie started — it will become greater than we ever imagined.

Because God is not done.

And neither are we.

With faith, love, strength, and unshakable hope...
---
---
**Erika Kirk**
CEO & Chair of the Board Turning Point USA [_**Support Turning Point USA**_](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30hbe&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Friend, you may have seen this already, but I want to share this with you anyways...

Charlie loved witnessing excellence. It’s why he loved sports so much.

He loved watching the best of the best perform at the level of greatness God intended for them.

Friend, that’s why this photo... _One of the very last photos ever taken of Charlie..._

...Took the breath right out of my chest:
---
---
Because I know that look... _**I fell in love with that look.**_

He’s in athlete mode. Locked in. Dialed. Focused.

It’s how I first met him — _driven, intense, humble, and joyful in the simplest moments._

Just Charlie. _In his element._

I remembered the early days of dating, us on a basketball court. No lights, no crowd, no noise — just the sound of sneakers on pavement.

We bonded over how Jordan was the GOAT, and he told me about his basketball days in high school and I told him about my basketball days in college.

He wore a red bracelet on his wrist that read: _**“Work harder. Be better.”**_

He never took it off. Until one day, a student came up to him after a speech and asked about it. Charlie slipped it off and gave it to them.

That was who he was. He saw greatness in others, _even when they couldn’t yet see it in themselves._

**That’s what I see in this photo — _Greatness._**

**To me, this is Charlie’s “Jordan” photo.**

_Because this was his prime..._

_Because this was Charlie at the height of everything he lived for — his purpose, his calling, his mission..._

He trained his whole life for this exact moment, the moment he’d be called home.

He gave it everything. Mind. Body. Soul.

And now, this image is permanently etched in time, held in my heart, as I admire his greatness. _Forever._

Friend, I want you to know — his mission didn’t end. It won’t ever stop...

**Because it’s alive in me. It’s alive in our children. It’s alive in the millions he’s inspired.**
****
**And if you’re reading this, I know it’s alive in you, too.**

Friend, Charlie’s life — it was so much bigger than politics...

It was about a man laying down his life, every single day, for something eternal.

And now, he’s running his race where it really counts — _where it never ends._

**Charlie, I miss you.**

I pray you’re having the most amazing time in Heaven.

And Charlie, baby, I promise I will never let your legacy slow or go silent.

I promise I'll make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen. I promise.

I love you, baby. Rest in the arms of our Lord as he blankets you with the words I know your heart _always_ strived to hear:

_**“Well done, my good and faithful servant.”**_

You lived life well. You earned it.

**And I promise...**

**I’ll carry the torch you lit from here._We’ll all carry it from here._**
---
[**Help Me Carry the Torch That Charlie Lit.**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t30hbe&__onlt=h)

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: EMILYs List endorsed Carol Obando-Derstine early this cycle because we know the path to a Democratic U.S. House majority runs through this critical swing district, and we know Carol has what it takes to win. | = Friends, EMILYs List endorsed Carol Obando-Derstine early this cycle because we know the path to a Democratic U.S. House majority runs through this critical swing district, and we know Carol has what it takes to win. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Carol is a mom, an immigrant, an engineer, an educator, and a lifelong community leader. She’s spent her career delivering results for families in Pennsylvania — making housing, groceries, and utilities more affordable, expanding opportunity for children, and serving her neighbors with compassion and grit. This is exactly the kind of leadership Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District needs. Right now, this seat is held by Trump ally Ryan Mackenzie — a MAGA extremist pushing an anti-choice, anti-worker agenda. We need to elect a pro-choice, EMILYs List woman to this seat who can deliver real results for everyday Americans. We know Carol has what it takes to win. That’s why we’re backing her campaign. We’re going to be with her every step of the race, but to get her across the finish line in a race this competitive, she needs you by her side, too. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with Carol and with EMILYs List women across the country. subject: Under a microscope

body:
Jon Ossoff has a fundraising deadline approaching and he needs your help.
#

[
---
Peter, it’s James Carville. I’ll get right to it: Jon Ossoff’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is QUICKLY approaching and he NEEDS supporters to step up and donate to his campaign today. If you already know the stakes of this race and are ready to fight for this seat, chip in here at MY personal link: [**https://act.electjon.com/go/Carville**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250922-1-f&t=2&akid=803%2E5691347%2E5kQCEQ) Otherwise, let me give my expert opinion on why fundraising deadlines ARE CRITICAL for Jon’s campaign: After this end-of-quarter deadline, Jon’s team has to publicly report their fundraising numbers. Everyone from those nasty far-right dark money groups to Donald Trump’s TOP cronies will be watching those numbers closely. I call it like it is. And, Peter, it doesn’t take a genius to see that Jon is facing a tough reelection. He’s the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Donald Trump won in 2024, and that alone makes him MAGA’s #1 target. This campaign is under a microscope — Republicans are watching Jon and his team closely for any signs of weakness they can jump on. So that’s how I know for sure if Jon doesn’t report the STRONGEST numbers possible, they’ll take advantage of any signs of weakness and flood Georgia with even more attacks. Look, Jon and his team defeated the GOP in 2021 — and they can do it again. But in order to win and win BIG in 2026, supporters need to step up in moments like this. [**So listen up: If you’re with me and are ready to help Jon CRUSH this end-of-quarter deadline, rush a donation of any amount to his campaign today. Anything helps in a race this critical.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250922-1-f&t=3&akid=803%2E5691347%2E5kQCEQ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.Tufhdl&refcode=em250922-1-f&t=22&akid=803%2E5691347%2E5kQCEQ)**

name: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding
subject: Our communities deserve more than fear.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
It's Hispanic Heritage Month!
This month is supposed to be a time of joy. A time for music, food, parades, and honoring our history and contributions.
Instead, deep fear is in the air. Across the country, celebrations are being canceled. Festivals moved indoors. Parades scaled back. Families afraid to gather.
Why? Because Donald Trump, White House deputy chief of staff Stephen Miller, and a Supreme Court stacked with extremists have given ICE the green light to racially profile our communities. To seize people because they look Latino, speak Spanish, or work a low-wage job.
No one should fear celebrating who they are because they could be targeted for deportation...
This is not about “public safety.” It’s fascism in plain sight.
Movement for Freedom was built for moments like this. When communities are told to shrink back in fear, when our culture is under attack, when our democracy is at stake. We will not be silent. We will not stop organizing. And we will not let Trump’s authoritarian playbook define our future.
If you’re able, chip in to help us expand our on-the-ground work supporting families, mobilizing communities, and building the power we need to fight back. This is an urgent fight, and we need to meet the moment—today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250922_iceraids_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We are citizens, not subjects. And we will not let fear cancel our joy.
In solidarity,
— Stephany
Lead spokesperson, Movement for Freedom

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: This isn’t about public safety. It’s authoritarianism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Donald Trump is trying to turn the machinery of our government into a tool for his own authoritarian aims.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250922-5457-footer&t=1&akid=5457%2E420207%2E5ygB1f)
Peter,
The pattern is clear: Donald Trump is trying to turn the machinery of our government into a tool for his own authoritarian aims.
First, he pushed to drastically **expand ICE** in an attempt to build a deportation force that’s loyal to him personally. Then, he **deployed the National Guard** in Washington, D.C., and he continues to threaten more deployments in other cities across the country.
**This isn’t about public safety. It’s authoritarianism.** And we can’t stay silent while Trump tries to turn government soldiers and officers into his own personal army to crush dissent.
The good news is that _all of us_ have the power to stand up and speak out. That’s why I’m organizing all over the country and working to ensure as many people as possible are trained in the nonviolent resistance tactics that have been most effective at stopping dictators around the world.
But building the movement we’ll need to defend our democracy takes resources, Peter. And unlike Donald Trump, I don’t have billionaires or corporate PACs funding my campaign. I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you.
[**Can I count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can today to power our grassroots movement and build up nonviolent resistance across the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250922-1?refcode=em20250922-5457&amount=3&refcode2=5457_420207_5ygB1f&akid=5457%2E420207%2E5ygB1f)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250922-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250922-5457&refcode2=5457_420207_5ygB1f&akid=5457%2E420207%2E5ygB1f)**
Trump is betting that we’ll be too scared to speak out. But I’m betting that this country is stronger than that. I’m betting on the people — and when we organize together, people power _always_ wins.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250922-5457-footer&t=2&refcode2=5457_420207_5ygB1f&akid=5457%2E420207%2E5ygB1f)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’ve never been for sale
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40180%2E3422442%2EmpvMmm)
Peter,
A few years ago I attended a reception for newly elected Members in DC. A lobbyist came up to me and said “Well, I guess you’re one of the new Members we’ll never see.” I asked him why. He said it was because I didn’t take direct corporate donations.
**Since that day, I’ve said clearly—if groups want to meet with me, they better bring their good ideas, not their checkbooks.**
I’ve never been for sale. And my campaign for governor is no different.
I’m not running to be part of the status quo. I’m focused on putting power back where it belongs—with you.
That’s why I have never taken donations from corporations or lobbyists. And that’s why I bring a plan, not an agenda paid for by special interests.
This campaign is powered by real people. And every single donation makes a difference.
**[If you’re ready for a governor who’s not afraid to take on entrenched power, I’m asking you to chip in right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250922_1_ak?refcode=em20250922-40180&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40180_3422442_mpvMmm&akid=40180%2E3422442%2EmpvMmm)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Time is running out to ensure only U.S. citizens vote in our elections!
body:
Your input is needed to require documented proof of citizenship to vote.
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/01000199739d41ce-faf17146-299a-4ce5-957d-1965e7a04339-000000/N1u8MIWwCsFoAj1lkDrYcGdBJ86dBh0yQN0iHPs43D0=423)Patriot–Right now we need to make our voices heard. If you believe only citizens should register and vote in federal elections, now is your chance to let the bureaucrats in Washington know. The U.S. Election Assistance Commission (EAC) is currently [_**taking public comment**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/1/01000199739d41ce-faf17146-299a-4ce5-957d-1965e7a04339-000000/TM4H7Rgh6kCA1wnOT7wx8mXamY4GLxGz-TrvsDqJY1I=423) on a petition to require documentary proof of U.S. citizenship on the National Mail Voter Registration Form. We have created an online form to submit your comments to the EAC.**The comment window closes** **Monday, October 20th**.[SUBMIT COMMENT](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/2/01000199739d41ce-faf17146-299a-4ce5-957d-1965e7a04339-000000/xHSGC-cYWeghhyQnFgsWDxK4Zh64EEPAP0dHPZoTeIs=423)In a brief statement, explain why proof of citizenship matters, how it protects everyone’s vote, and why it’s worth the little bit of work it takes to show proof. [_We put together a myth vs. fact sheet_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp-resources.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fdocuments%2FOnlyCitizensVote-Myths.pdf/1/01000199739d41ce-faf17146-299a-4ce5-957d-1965e7a04339-000000/FGT4oLr_H1wY9A9veCeRLLyA-fpXvUEATbPEG32DLjg=423) and below are some sample comments that you may find useful as you write your own comment.**Sample 1** :_“To get a marriage license, open a bank account, or obtain a government-issued ID, you must show up in person with documentation. I hereby request that the U.S. Election Assistance Commission also require an in-person registration with documentation on the National Mail Voter Registration Form as a common-sense safeguard to protect our elections”_**Sample 2** :_“Under current federal law the National Mail Voter Registration Form only requires you to check a box and attest that you’re a citizen—no documentary proof is required, and election officials can’t verify it under current rules. We know that 10–27% of noncitizens reported being registered to vote. How would other nations act if U.S. citizens illegally voted in their elections? As a citizen of the United States and a voter, I respectfully call for the U.S. Election Assistance Commission to require proof of citizenship at registration, closing the loophole and setting a clear, uniform standard to secure American ballots now and for future generations.”_**What about the SAVE Act?**
** _This does not replace our push for the SAVE Act._** Even if the EAC grants this petition and updates the federal form, we still need Congress to pass the SAVE Act so the standard is _codified in law_ and can’t be rolled back by future bureaucrats. Think of this as doing both: take the win we can work on today while we keep pressing for the long-term win in Congress.You can bet the Left will flood the EAC with comments against this. They _despise_ the idea of requiring proof of citizenship to register to vote. Furthermore, this would be the rule under which the 2026 election would operate, even if the Senate hasn’t passed the SAVE Act by then.**Don’t sit this one out.** It may seem like one of those actions that doesn’t matter much, or you might think other people will leave enough comments to drown out the Left’s—but both of these thoughts are incorrect! The EAC will not make this rule change if it looks like Americans don’t care. It will also make it much harder to get the SAVE Act passed because the senators who oppose it or are on the fence will see that our side doesn’t care enough to submit a simple comment.If you’ve worked elections, include what you’ve seen. Make sure you point out that those who are opposed to this rule change lie when they say it will disenfranchise voters, such as married women who have changed their last names. **Ask the EAC to** **grant the petition and amend its regulations and the federal registration form accordingly**. So, remember:
* **Comment by** **October 20th**. Use this page to submit your comment: [_**Tea Party Patriots EAC Comment**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/3/01000199739d41ce-faf17146-299a-4ce5-957d-1965e7a04339-000000/SgWIXdPrv_qwIje9xa1TffXEnwQAj6foW27IS8oflHs=423)
* Fill out the form including your comment and click “Submit my comment” box
* Share this call to action with everyone you know who believes that only Americans should vote in American elections.

Let’s get this done—**comment now, keep pushing the SAVE Act, and protect our elections!** In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/01000199739d41ce-faf17146-299a-4ce5-957d-1965e7a04339-000000/-NMWPNBEdn1fp79KMK4PH_Ee8ct5wE9Qu3q_PMuOO2k=423) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/01000199739d41ce-faf17146-299a-4ce5-957d-1965e7a04339-000000/LBwzfrXVAdOx_axRwwg3vOaEYsdRc7Gy_7PpTSiOp9k=423)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/01000199739d41ce-faf17146-299a-4ce5-957d-1965e7a04339-000000/GyExLkTLauQxB2eH3OKOWIt40k5kZcDIr8vv49o2B5w=423) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/01000199739d41ce-faf17146-299a-4ce5-957d-1965e7a04339-000000/tyG3RkezGNlUJRUJcRf-EPKQN8AntOjWlpxabCZJjFY=423).
---

This isn’t fiscal responsibility, it’s ineptitude dressed up as policy. Families will go hungry. Working families will lose their healthcare. Caregivers will lose wages. Immigrant families will live in fear and employers will struggle to find workers.

I’ve been calling the OBBB a self-inflicted wound, because it doesn’t solve problems. It creates them. And the communities paying the price are the very ones who can least afford it.

That’s why I’m asking you to step in today. **[We’ve set a $10,000 mid-month goal to make sure we can keep fighting back against these cuts. clean_body: | Hi Peter, Speaker Johnson and President Trump celebrated the passage of their OBBB tax bill. But let’s tell the truth: there is nothing beautiful about slashing Medicaid, gutting SNAP, and targeting essential immigrant workers. This isn’t fiscal responsibility, it’s ineptitude dressed up as policy. Families will go hungry. Working families will lose their healthcare. Caregivers will lose wages. Immigrant families will live in fear and employers will struggle to find workers. I’ve been calling the OBBB a self-inflicted wound, because it doesn’t solve problems. It creates them. And the communities paying the price are the very ones who can least afford it. That’s why I’m asking you to step in today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: = = = = = = We can’t sit this one out. If we let these cuts stand unchallenged, the damage will ripple through our district for years to come. — Jimmy If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can 't stay quiet._ **Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=009ea493ea1e493e8b152b7a749c2142&_e=BTQOknL4yaXo780qoNUMsY78yOBHLw8h_pcxUZCxwZr80Qoc8jASD7jc6NzCpKQwyaFfKWKNk4TVPWREnApA8Heuz5N6AbiTVIupYsZqXzW0vkZqbP_m1iPu6Lur5wFQSWTI6aJ3cx9ieCRucQtK7kFA4aiQG8wfqSqJY3Wkgsd-TiqOHJwxtt7JXmygZAGcARX5fP1n1j_wvF8hX2Li-0NP4i4OaBvHJRfseApIO5PTFrIXc4UZLZ4hh2AxTEiVjnc6LA9reRhLgyE-e5TAbVpPmCAzP8r748itmQCS1sgxNNUi2XseC1x8H-urcyVTbK-eTkg4VZV3QzcDlR_gBrbbFnixs_9eUwQcxYx0I-IDEHFESAVZ9L5B5wBbPmOm3-96R7kJ3jNn8ZWS5wyLea_iJg2-Rk1nYhkRTmbGkbhYkcxqYLbxP5v0sZnXvmODPG3y9flxET0VQgcDP51emivm0q9aHwZjO3ALf5LZDOnVqv3fEvxxnfpBVOmCGMsMr4_0po94Dta2c6qf58C3hePre0OywWHqjVUygvfCt92nYVI2Vo5jpkMtAeW5Ex6TDRavLB8zWlVAfHV4Vjvcq0FoXxXo8Ymxy2W34oV_unJUQJq9b322fSe-I9XGdALJCU5yEXeYA9_TJa627gAAMmUBe1GpcSvxT-6aw_-FEeK8H1U6Bf6YGIVnCqDeSxHiXPxnOcdi0KFH97TZoktb7UQtXS-WlQ5RfEIAjPZ3veI%3D)

In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie. America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. ** _We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don 't you dare quit."**_ Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth. That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight. **And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right. Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn 't just start a movement... _he started a revival. _** And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision... **_Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let’s make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That’s how we honor him best.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=009ea493ea1e493e8b152b7a749c2142&_e=BTQOknL4yaXo780qoNUMsY78yOBHLw8h_pcxUZCxwZr80Qoc8jASD7jc6NzCpKQwyaFfKWKNk4TVPWREnApA8Heuz5N6AbiTVIupYsZqXzW0vkZqbP_m1iPu6Lur5wFQSWTI6aJ3cx9ieCRucQtK7kFA4aiQG8wfqSqJY3Wkgsd-TiqOHJwxtt7JXmygZAGcARX5fP1n1j_wvF8hX2Li-0NP4i4OaBvHJRfseApIO5PTFrIXc4UZLZ4hh2AxTEiVtP0Tys4v5aV5JIpDFffxrgxKRxqxBceOsYmguH9KIZtpKEP9C3_xk1ijeksHsDKQaE5YMtPzOw3C0WVgFCwP23tlQpA3e0Ag01FObg_Bt6YDRl7etKuMme2o7vTB-oIrVNvubUKF0neT5k3md1QkeUwlcWaQL_L7qWuP5apoP6VMTbLjmPhWMfqbiD4fyMe5BmXoaL8l8vcSvM0Z4qw2AZ9cak2rxwA0PlRE5trOgA-27vCxew102rhejqXotnej4yiFgPj-hcchzeaTHviLeJ2YuJQBthQKRHh3CK_Hr2ZucgTM7ei3r8SyejCIX8EBbcDAJ7ecaEWNYzSglqanti5gLmEL2N33pma0oeY5V-aTaorzxFPlS_SDzepTeHVoYjREVe4hG5N_cP6OvHPoc2k3XrbCLru32pP4HQHgAf1VE4EYFavrSrvaNytCny5jAQjG8D61iFdZcYx5dM1Bto_55fhssdZ9IKl0TgLkhHQ%3D)**

subject: Read before midnight: Operational Update

body:
The other side is pouring in money. We need fast movers.| | | Friend, This isn’t politics as usual. This is a mission with real consequences for Michigan families. The Left has marked our state as a **_TOP RACE_**. Their cash advantage is real. Their media echo is loud. But they can’t match a disciplined ground game backed by Patriots who refuse to quit. Here’s the brief:
* **Objective:** Keep Michigan free, safe, and pro-family.

body:
We can’t lose sight of these critical state-level elections that will determine the future of our democracy.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115728392/571270671/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0OWVlOGRiLTA3OTgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vE00jXZNVTzaU6NIDmbVlLLJMwBQgIq8lJojqD1hu0M=&emci=f71913ab-fb97-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=549ee8db-0798-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)

I’ll cut right to the chase, Peter: We’re in the thick of election season in Pennsylvania and Virginia. We’re working tirelessly to push back on Republicans’ attempts to redraw maps in states from Texas to Utah. **But we can’t lose sight of these critical state-level elections that will have an outsized impact on the future of our democracy. **
* In **Pennsylvania** , control of the State Supreme Court will determine whether there’s a backstop against attacks on voting rights and egregiously gerrymandered maps. There are three seats at stake on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, and the Republican Party has pledged to spend “seven figures” on judicial elections across the country this year — evidence of just how critical these races are.

* In **Virginia** , we’re fighting to elect Democracy Defenders to the Governor’s Mansion and in the House of Delegates. Ensuring Virginia has pro-democracy champions like Abigail Spanberger at the helm will be crucial in the fight for fair representation in the years ahead.

[**With so much at stake in these elections in just over six weeks, we’re asking — will you pitch in a donation to help the NDRC elect Democracy Defenders in key state-level elections across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115728393/571270672/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_2025ElectionUpdate_email_20250922-NDRC-Tier1-2025ElectionUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250922-NDRC-Tier1-2025ElectionUpdate_&utm_campaign=2025ElectionUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0OWVlOGRiLTA3OTgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vE00jXZNVTzaU6NIDmbVlLLJMwBQgIq8lJojqD1hu0M=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Action Alert via Conroy for Congress
subject: Hey Baumgartner – what happened to releasing the Epstein files?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONROY FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | | | | _You're receiving this message because you stood with us during the 2024 election, or a mutual friend shared your information with us. We’re proud to have you in our network, but if you'd prefer not to receive these updates, you can unsubscribe_[ _here_](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=2c7cc2a69f&t=b&e=a7b299e420&c=a03d979ac5) _._
---
[|
---](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=d4af657576&e=a7b299e420)
| | Peter,

National GOP leaders are flooding the system with distractions to hide the fact that they’ve failed to deliver on one of their campaign promises: **releasing the Epstein files.**

Michael Baumgartner himself has even said, _“As much information as possible on Epstein should be released.”_

But when it came time to act? He caved. Instead of standing with survivors, Baumgartner used his power to protect rich and powerful abusers, voting to take an extended summer vacation to delay a vote – hoping we’d all forget.

Now, a bipartisan group of House members, every Democrat and four Republicans, are demanding an official House floor vote to release the files. **They only need one more Republican to join them to make it happen.**

[**Instead of stepping up, Baumgartner is hiding. His silence is unacceptable. Add your name today to demand Baumgartner stop protecting predators and deliver justice for survivors.**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=8886d20a83&e=a7b299e420)
---
| **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=1a0aea502b&e=a7b299e420)**
---
| | Carmela Conroy couldn’t be a sharper contrast. As a deputy prosecutor in Spokane County, she took on some of the toughest cases in the Juvenile Division – including special assault cases involving children. She heard victims’ stories firsthand. She fought for them when others wouldn’t.

She took on those painful cases because she knew the people of Washington wanted justice – just like the American people want justice for Epstein’s victims.

[**Baumgartner’s cowardice is embarrassing for Eastern Washington. We don’t protect predators here. Join us in making sure he can’t keep running from accountability:**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=e2bb6ce06a&e=a7b299e420)

name: Rob (personal)
subject: A quick thank you from me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250922 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250922]
Friends, I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you to this incredible grassroots team for all of your birthday wishes.
You truly made my day! Especially now, as this second Trump administration brings daily challenges and relentless attacks on our rights and freedoms, knowing you’re with me keeps me ready to fight.
My parents, who were social justice warriors throughout their whole lives, taught me a long time ago that people power is the most potent power there is. That still holds true today, and it’s why this team matters so much.
We the people can take down bullies. Stand up for the downtrodden. Demand justice, equity, and safety for all people.
Believing that inspires me to keep fighting, and makes me so grateful to stand alongside you in this work.
Together, we are not just powerful — together, we are unstoppable.
Thank you for being with me, not just on my birthday, but every single day.
Gratefully,
Rob

name: Justice Democrats
subject: A big step forward to Block the Bombs →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

We have some good news to share,
Peter:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250922-cpc-block-the-bombs-act/?source=em20250922-37045&akid=37045%2E1203867%2Ep4RY7C ]Tweet by Prem Thakker: NEWS: The Congressional Progressive Caucus —
which represents nearly 100 members — has voted to endorse the Block the
Bombs Act, to block weapon sales to Israel. First time any major caucus
has backed a bill to end US aid for Israel’s destruction of Gaza.

The Congressional Progressive Caucus, led by Rep. Greg Casar, just
officially endorsed Rep. Delia Ramirez’s Block the Bombs Act, which would
block U.S. weapons sales to Israel to stop the genocide.

This is a big step forward in our fight to hold Israel accountable for its
genocide and ethnic cleansing of Palestinians in Gaza while escalating
attacks on neighboring countries.

The CPC represents nearly 100 Democrats in the House, about double the
number of members who previously signed onto the bill, which just goes to
show that the pressure we’re building is working!

The vast majority of Democrats and voters across party lines are opposed
to our government enabling Israel’s war crimes by sending more bombs and
weapons — and Congress is finally listening.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250922-cpc-block-the-bombs-act/?source=em20250922-37045&akid=37045%2E1203867%2Ep4RY7C ]But EVERY Democrat in Congress should stand against this genocide. Add
your name to demand the rest of the Democratic Party join the CPC in
supporting the Block the Bombs Act NOW →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250922-cpc-block-the-bombs-act/?source=em20250922-37045&akid=37045%2E1203867%2Ep4RY7C ]Add Your Name

There is no excuse for any member of the Democratic Party to oppose this
legislation. Let’s continue to make that clear and get this bill passed
ASAP.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

subject: The GOP’s anti-democracy recipe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Fair Fight is pushing back. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115729139/571273073/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250922_T1_GOPAgenda_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2M3NTFiNy0wYTk4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QlvF2HkJHNkLfZBsS1hr02100bUcx4sQu4DspePUiIw=&emci=27c751b7-0a98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2cc751b7-0a98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)

| | Here's a recipe for ending free and fair elections: ❌ Purge massive lists of voters from the rolls
❌ Block courts from protecting voting rights
❌ Seize control of voting machines
❌ Redraw maps to rig the outcome
❌ Add red tape to voter registration
❌ Prosecute election officials
❌ Ban mail voting And here’s the thing: That’s exactly the GOP agenda right now under the Trump Regime. He's no stranger to taking on the corrupt and powerful, as well as anyone who stands in the way of real results for working families. **[He’s fighting for a brighter future for Florida as the state’s next Attorney General — but he needs your support. As a workers' rights lawyer, Jose fought for janitors, security guards, and cab drivers whose wages were stolen – **and won.**
When he served in the Florida Legislature, Jose took on special interests and utility giants, proposing legislation that would have helped families access solar energy. FPL's CEO was so furious that he told his team to "make Jose's life a living hell" for it.
As Assistant Secretary of Labor, Jose led job training programs to strengthen our national workforce and expand opportunities for workers across the country.
**And he's just getting started.[But defeating the current Republican Attorney General — James Uthmeier — will not be easy. That's why Jose needs your help.
