### [Democrat Ruben Gallego Files Legislation to Block Military Funeral Honors for Ashli Babbitt ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76743&L=36079&F=H&&hash=3c6acedfeb244262d5491e2163ba48863a5da400d4ea715a3ae4e67bbca18c8c) Breitbart In a letter to the Babbitt family posted by Judicial Watch, Lohmeier stated, “After reviewing the circumstances of Ashli’s death, and considering the information that has come forward since then, I am persuaded that the previous determination was incorrect.”

The Pentagon initially denied the Babbitt family’s request for military funeral honors for her. It stated in a letter that the circumstances preceding her death — that she was “fatally shot after having illegally entered” the Capitol — resulted in the determination that conferring the honor would “bring discredit on the Air Force.” The letter was posted by Judicial Watch, a Washington, D.C.-based conservative legal group, that lobbied for the Pentagon to provide honors to Babbitt. In its request to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, the organization cited President Trump’s clemency for more than 1,500 Jan. 6 defendants. Thank you to Judicial Watch for standing with parents and defending their rights, and to D181 for finally listening to its parents.”

With the help of Judicial Watch Senior Attorney Michael Bekesha, McCloy began pressing the district to respect her rights to opt out of exposing her child to such materials. Hey folks,
I finally got to sit down with my friend and fellow truth-teller **Jessica Craven** for a wide-ranging, emotionally raw conversation. We talked Jimmy Kimmel, consumer power, RFK's latest nonsense, and how we stay grounded and active in a time of nonstop chaos. Jessica always brings clarity, hope, and a fierce urgency that I really needed this week.
* [00:04:01] Jessica reflects on the emotional toll of staying politically engaged--and why this moment feels different
* [00:13:18] Why Jimmy Kimmel's reinstatement matters--and how Disney misread the cultural moment
* [00:24:02] Americans' hidden superpower: how collective consumer action forced a corporate retreat
* [00:36:40] What the Colbert and Kimmel firings reveal about the future of media and independent platforms
* [00:52:09] Jessica and I get candid about hope, burnout, and building a resilient progressive movement

**[This one is equal parts catharsis and firestarter. If you're feeling overwhelmed but want to stay engaged--if you're looking for a space that's honest, energized, and ready to act--become a paid subscriber today.](https://substack.com/redirect/eae57fa3-8baa-4cea-8bc5-ff2e72062dbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Exactly two weeks from now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We need all hands on deck!
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4590%2E400544%2Ef9xN78)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250922_2_help?amount=5&refcode=em20250922-4590&refcode2=4590_400544_f9xN78&akid=4590%2E400544%2Ef9xN78)
**The next big test for our campaign is coming up quickly.**
Exactly TWO weeks from now, we’ll hit our last public fundraising deadline of 2025. As we head into the election year, the media, our opponents, and right-wing super PACs will scrutinize just how much we’ve raised and how many people have pitched into our campaign so far.
**[Will you chip in $5 – or more – before our last 2025 major deadline to help show our strong grassroots momentum? We still need a lot of supporters to chip in to show we have what it takes to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250922_2_help?amount=5&refcode=em20250922-4590&refcode2=4590_400544_f9xN78&akid=4590%2E400544%2Ef9xN78)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250922_2_help?amount=5&refcode=em20250922-4590&refcode2=4590_400544_f9xN78&akid=4590%2E400544%2Ef9xN78)**
**It’s no secret that Donald Trump and National Republicans have their sights on New Mexico.** They would love _nothing_ more than to flip our state red, and I don’t need to tell you why that would be an absolute disaster for our state.
If there's any sign we’re starting to lose energy, they won’t miss the opportunity to pounce on us, flooding this race with dark money and attack ads.
**That’s why we need all hands on deck to prove we’re here to win and fight for the bright future we deserve.**
[**Every single donation right now matters. Your contribution of $5 or anything you can spare will help us send a powerful message to everyone watching this race that momentum and grassroots power are on our side.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250922_2_help?amount=5&refcode=em20250922-4590&refcode2=4590_400544_f9xN78&akid=4590%2E400544%2Ef9xN78)
Be fierce,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250922-2&t=2&refcode2=4590_400544_f9xN78&akid=4590%2E400544%2Ef9xN78)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4590%2E400544%2Ef9xN78)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)

name: Kyle Sweetser
subject: Fresh from SiriusXM: My courage isn’t optional.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kyle for Alabama
body:
| Kyle Sweetser is running for Senate because he knows that Alabama deserves real representatives, not party pawns. He believes that honest people who welcome accountability and transparency are how we save the American Dream. If you would like to unsubscribe from this list, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ftyCir6CcU6Y5W3bkJVHYQ2?unsubscribedata=GBGJV5eQjy%2FcNtgYfmZov9zswpi6Z2WTYNNrut7jqQ1P9nqaA%2F3LND68jFbXUbzriLW9xIQT9YCXj9yCsPrbeVtcnDuGLk8Dhb53mbdChleDVih36ymF7Vb6JhqXGp6KdHUlipoIqNnYFXvvaf6XYXOLuHjLLHmpTAbs3zJ1bpmjr7D6wfmMnLgioW35x%2B4Ybk6ScKhNfKnGDbhevEzV3oeUmFhLiXkmz%2BRQfjOKL7xADTYPlbQuHqie87B7bTN3qGtWzVDvmfB634Djcvs2iTegPiIZs4ea5%2BLsanoSPkynxHPxqXPuUbeLZb0daeYs3Jc4dLWNYlP%2Fr8a58YyW5EW7s8qXQrUmo1bwQXwwV%2BoIaZ8LgPAieKcj%2BAqZprqG0FYiBYfQVirNAfx4oTSanPVy9qvxbAGi3zRthnM8oEw%2B2athF4wM5XyleiaWkyO%2F) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115729351/571273726/-181333179?source=EM_NBI_KS_20250922_FR_podcastsiriusxm_0_3MO_Kyle_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThkN2FmYWYtMGM5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s1-qjvNVPjmbSc7EPLRXe5MsacG5geR2GC8OYgFpPV4=&emci=0fd7afaf-0c98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=18d7afaf-0c98-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6708998)
---
Hi Peter,

I spoke on SiriusXM recently about why I’m running for the U.S. Senate and why Alabama can’t afford more of the same broken politics.

Here’s what I told them:
* One-party rule has failed us. For too long, Alabama has been trapped under a system where the same politicians cling to power, ignore voters, and protect themselves instead of the people they serve. It’s left us close to last in income, life expectancy, and opportunities.
* Tariffs are crushing families. MAGA Republicans promised these policies would help. Instead, they’ve driven up prices on food, clothing, and household goods, punishing working families while billionaires laugh all the way to the bank.
* We need courage, not cowardice. I left a party that no longer represents the people. I chose to speak out instead of staying silent. That’s the same courage I’ll bring to the Senate every single day.

This campaign is about breaking the cycle and ending the stranglehold of one-party rule and building a movement that actually delivers for Alabama families.

But I can’t do it alone. If you’re ready for a new kind of leadership: honest, accountable, and unafraid. I need you with me.

[Will you chip in today so we can take this fight all the way to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115729352/571273727/996072422?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KS_20250922_FR_podcastsiriusxm_0_3MO_Kyle_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThkN2FmYWYtMGM5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s1-qjvNVPjmbSc7EPLRXe5MsacG5geR2GC8OYgFpPV4=) | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115729353/571273728/996072422?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KS_20250922_FR_podcastsiriusxm_0_3MO_Kyle_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThkN2FmYWYtMGM5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s1-qjvNVPjmbSc7EPLRXe5MsacG5geR2GC8OYgFpPV4=)
---
Thank you for standing with me,

— Kyle Sweetser

clean_body: | Kyle Sweetser is running for Senate because he knows that Alabama deserves real representatives, not party pawns. He believes that honest people who welcome accountability and transparency are how we save the American Dream. If you would like to unsubscribe from this list, | Hi Peter, I spoke on SiriusXM recently about why I’m running for the U.S. Senate and why Alabama can’t afford more of the same broken politics. Here’s what I told them: One-party rule has failed us. For too long, Alabama has been trapped under a system where the same politicians cling to power, ignore voters, and protect themselves instead of the people they serve. It’s left us close to last in income, life expectancy, and opportunities. Tariffs are crushing families. MAGA Republicans promised these policies would help. Instead, they’ve driven up prices on food, clothing, and household goods, punishing working families while billionaires laugh all the way to the bank. We need courage, not cowardice. I left a party that no longer represents the people. I chose to speak out instead of staying silent. That’s the same courage I’ll bring to the Senate every single day. This campaign is about breaking the cycle and ending the stranglehold of one-party rule and building a movement that actually delivers for Alabama families. But I can’t do it alone. If you’re ready for a new kind of leadership: honest, accountable, and unafraid. I need you with me. = | | = Thank you for standing with me, — Kyle Sweetser = | Follow us on , and ! Roanoke College released a poll of our race for Governor.
In May, they claimed we were ahead by 17 points. _Now, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points._
Peter, I'll put it plainly: **This election will be really close.**
We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025.
_But this work is hard, it's expensive — and it can only continue with your support._

| | Hi Friend, I recently joined Reverend Al Sharpton on MSNBC to call out Trump’s military occupation of Blue cities led by Black mayors — authoritarianism and racism at its finest. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115729623/571274167/1756016667?&refcode=E15268-20250918-MSNBC-Image-Trump&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmI4MWIxOGMtMGQ5OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NnsSQTFiaZxaGbO7ITBrdJRP2-4ldtNYfo3jhoYfniY=) **Let me make one thing clear: This isn’t about safety, it’s about control. ** I am the granddaughter of a Black veteran. He fought for Americans’ freedom — not for National Guardsmen to be turned into political pawns to advance a president’s vendetta. The mayors of Oakland, Chicago, and D.C. didn’t ask for this. The governors didn’t ask for this. The people didn’t ask for this. Trump is imposing martial law while slashing programs that actually keep people safe and healthy, like SNAP and Head Start. If Trump really cared about safety, he’d trust local officials and fund community groups on the ground. He’d work with leaders like Brandon Johnson or Brandon Scott, who are determined to make their cities safer. Instead, Trump is carrying out an authoritarian attack on majority Black cities. We have to stand strong against this injustice. [**The people of Oakland deserve a leader in Washington who represents our values, wants, and needs. And, I am that voice proudly. But Donald Trump is on a rampage against those opposing his authoritarian takeover.
